PF2E - MUO Maps Remake.name:
PF2E - MUO 地图重制
PF2E - MUO Maps Remake
PF2E - MUO Maps Remake.description:
这个免费模组是 PF2E 初学者盒子地图的重制版。它们是增强地图，并包含棋子、预制件、物品以及一些日志笔记。

该模组依赖于 Paizo 的 PF2E 初学者盒子战役（用于 FVTT）。

如果你喜欢这套地图和工具，请考虑在 https://ko-fi.com/wisewhun 支持我；在那里你可以找到其他推广者包（免费）以及一些高级地图，并获得加入我们社区 Discord 的许可。

请查看 GM Read Me，并在其中了解其他开发者合作伙伴。

本产品、Wise Promoter Pack 241.2.1 及其中的任何包使用了 Paizo Inc. 拥有的商标和/或版权，依据 Paizo 的社区使用政策（paizo.com/communityuse）进行使用。我被明确禁止向你收取费用以使用或获得对此内容的许可。本产品、Wise Promoter Pack 241.2.1 及其中的任何包并非由 Paizo 出版、认可或特别批准。有关 Paizo Inc. 与 Paizo 产品的更多信息，请访问 paizo.com。

This FREE module is a remake of the PF2E's Beginner Box Maps. They are Enhanced Maps and include tokens, prefabs, items, and some journal notes.

This module has a dependency for Paizo's PF2E Beginner Box Campaign for FVTT.

If you enjoy this set of maps and tools, then please consider supporting me at https://ko-fi.com/wisewhun where you can find other Promoter Packs (Free) and some Premium Maps as well as gain access to our community's Discord.

Please review the GM Read Me and check out other developer partners therein.

This product, Wise Promoter Pack 241.2.1 and any packs within it uses trademarks and/or copyrights owned by Paizo Inc., used under Paizo's Community Use Policy (paizo.com/communityuse). I am expressly prohibited from charging you to use or access this content. This product, Wise Promoter Pack 241.2.1 and any packs within it is not published, endorsed, or specifically approved by Paizo. For more information about Paizo Inc. and Paizo products, visit paizo.com.

Cinder Rat (BB).name:
烬灰鼠（BB）
Cinder Rat (BB)

Smoke Vision.name:
烟雾视觉
Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description:
煤渣鼠无视烟雾造成的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

The cinder rat ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition from smoke.

Fetid Fumes.name:
恶臭烟雾
Fetid Fumes
Fetid Fumes.description:
一团烟雾笼罩着余烬鼠。所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]{5 feet} 内的生物（包括余烬鼠在内）都会因这团烟雾获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} 状态。进入余烬鼠 5 feet 内的生物，或在其 5 feet 内开始其回合的生物，必须在 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22] 豁免中成功，否则在 1 轮内对所有检定与 DC 承受 -1 状态减值 （使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}）。

A cloud of smoke surrounds the cinder rat. All creatures within @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]{5 feet}, including the cinder rat, gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition from this smoke. A creature that comes within 5 feet of the cinder rat or begins its turn within 5 feet must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22] save or take a -1 status penalty to all checks and DCs for 1 round (Use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}).

Cinder Rat (BB).publicNotes:
火元素是火之位面的破坏性显现。它们有时会在炽热与烈焰交织的强力之地来到这个世界，那里会形成元素漩涡，例如在火山中。

灰烬鼠是由闷燃木炭与元素之火构成的巨型啮齿动物。恶臭的烟雾不断从它们燃烧的血肉中喷涌而出。与陆生老鼠十分相似，灰烬鼠会寻找隐蔽的巢穴，若不加以遏制，其数量很快便会激增。

Fire elementals are destructive manifestations of the Plane of Fire. They sometimes come to the world in powerful places of heat and flame where elemental vortexes form, such as in volcanoes.

Cinder rats are oversized rodents made of smoldering charcoal and elemental fire. Noxious fumes continually bellow from their flaming flesh. Much like terrestrial rats, cinder rats seek out secluded dens and can quickly multiply in number if left unchecked.

Giant Rat (BB).name:
巨鼠（BB）
Giant Rat (BB)
Giant Rat (BB).publicNotes:
巨鼠是常见害兽的巨大版本。它们通常数量众多，但由于它们无法挤进普通老鼠常躲藏的缝隙里，因此更容易被找到并消灭。事实上，找到并杀死一只巨鼠，是许多冒险者的成人礼。这样的差事很快就会令人厌烦，所以许多老手会把灭鼠工作转包给新冒险者。

巨鼠大多生活在下水道里，在那里它们能从上方街道上捡拾残渣，但也有一些巨鼠家族生活在更偏远的地点，例如阴湿的洞穴、森林或丘陵。老鼠是极其擅长生存的物种，几乎在世界任何地方都能找到，不过与寒冷地区相比，它们更偏好温带或温暖气候。

尽管它们的啮咬本身除了对极其虚弱者外并不致命，但一些巨鼠携带一种在全球啮齿动物中常见的危险疾病——一种足以蹂躏乡村社区的瘟疫。这些老鼠仅是携带者，自身不会有感染并死于该疾病的风险。

Giant rats are enormous versions of the common vermin. They're typically found in abundant numbers, but since they can't fit in the nooks where ordinary rats typically hide, they're much easier to locate and exterminate. In fact, finding and slaying a giant rat is a rite of passage for many an adventurer. Such tasks get tiresome quickly, so many veterans subcontract extermination to new adventurers.

Giant rats mostly live in sewers where they can scavenge from the streets above, but some families of giant rats live in more remote locations, such as dank caves, forests, or hills. Rats are incredibly adept survivors and can be found nearly anywhere in the world, though they tend to favor temperate or warm climates as opposed to cold regions.

Although their bite alone isn't lethal except to the very weak, some giant rats carry a dangerous disease common to rodents around the world-a pestilence more than capable of ravaging rural communities. The rats are merely carriers with no risk of succumbing to the disease themselves.

Giant Spider (BB).name:
巨型蜘蛛（BB）
Giant Spider (BB)

Descend on a Web.name:
降落在蛛网上
Descend on a Web
Descend on a Web.description:
巨型蜘蛛沿直线向下移动最多40尺，悬挂在一条蛛网丝线上。它可以悬挂在蛛网上或脱离下落。它以蛛网下降的距离不计入坠落伤害。生物可以攻击蛛网；蛛网AC为20且有8 HP。如果蛛网的HP降至0，蜘蛛会坠落。

The giant spider moves straight down up to 40 feet, suspended by a web line. It can hang from the web or drop off. The distance it Descends on a Web doesn't count for falling damage. A creature can Strike the web, which has AC 20 and 8 HP. If the web is reduced to 0 HP, the spider falls.

Giant Spider Venom.name:
巨型蜘蛛毒液
Giant Spider Venom
Giant Spider Venom.description:
被蜘蛛毒牙伤害的一个目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16] 豁免，否则受到 @Damage[1d10[poison]] 伤害并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态，持续 1 轮。

A target damaged by the spider's fangs must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16] save or take @Damage[1d10[poison]] damage and gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition for 1 round.

Web Trap.name:
蛛网陷阱
Web Trap
Web Trap.description:
被巨型蜘蛛的蛛网打击命中的生物会被粘在最近的表面上。它无法移动，直到它成功@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}（DC 17）。

A creature hit by the giant spider's web Strike gets stuck to the nearest surface. It can't move until it successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes} (DC 17).

Giant Spider (BB).publicNotes:
很少有日常害虫能像臭名昭著的蜘蛛那样令人畏惧。巨型蜘蛛的体型各不相同。人类体型的版本，有时被称为狩猎蜘蛛，是最常见的巨型蜘蛛类型，尽管并非最大。

Few everyday vermin inspire as much dread as the infamous spider. Giant spiders vary in size. The human-sized versions, sometimes called hunting spiders, are the most common type of giant spider, though not the largest.

Juvenile Horned Dragon (BB).name:
幼年角龙（BB）
Juvenile Horned Dragon (BB)
Juvenile Horned Dragon (BB).tokenName:
幼年角龙
Juvenile Horned Dragon

Twisting Tail.name:
扭动尾巴
Twisting Tail
Twisting Tail.description:
当10英尺内的一个生物使用移动动作，或在其正在使用的移动动作中离开一个方格时，巨龙可以使用其反应动作（）以-2减值对该生物进行一次尾巴打击。若命中，该生物在巨龙使用此反应动作（）时所在的方格停止移动。

When a creature within 10 feet uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action it's using, the dragon can use their reaction to make a tail Strike at the creature with a -2 penalty. If it hits, the creature stops moving in the square it was in when the dragon used this reaction.

Draconic Frenzy.name:
龙狂乱
Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次尾击打击。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name:
龙族动能
Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙在一次打击获得大成功时，他们会为自己的毒息充能。

When the dragon gets a critical success on a Strike, they recharge their Poison Breath.

Poison Breath.name:
毒息
Poison Breath
Poison Breath.description:
巨龙吐出一团有毒云雾，在@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内造成@Damage[5d6[poison]]伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:21|basic:true]豁免。

巨龙在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Poison Breath]]{1d4 rounds}内无法再次使用其毒息。

The dragon breathes a toxic cloud that deals @Damage[5d6[poison]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:21|basic:true] save.

The dragon can't use their Poison Breath again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Poison Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Kobold Boss Zolgran (BB).name:
狗头人首领佐尔格兰（BB）
Kobold Boss Zolgran (BB)
Kobold Boss Zolgran (BB).tokenName:
狗头人首领佐尔格兰
Kobold Boss Zolgran

Command.name:
命令
Command
Command.description:
你大声喊出一道难以忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你、逃跑（如同其具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}状态）、放开其正握着的东西、趴下@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或原地站定。在其服从你的命令之前，它不能@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.A72nHGUtNXgY5Ey9]{Delay}或进行任何反应动作。其效果取决于目标的意志豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 在其下个回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须使用单动作照你命令行事。

大失败 目标必须在其下个回合使用其全部动作来服从你的命令。

升阶（5环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

You shout a command that's hard to ignore. You can command the target to approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.A72nHGUtNXgY5Ey9]{Delay} or take any reactions until it has obeyed your command. The effects depend on the target's Will save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to do as you command.

Critical Failure The target must use all its actions on its next turn to obey your command.

Heightened (5th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Detect Magic.name:
侦测魔法
Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，用以登记魔法的存在。除魔法是否存在外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。

只有当幻术魔法的效果等级低于你侦测魔法法术的环阶时，你才会侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如隐形药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你会得知该法术在射程内所侦测到的最高等级效果的魔法学派。若多个效果同样强大，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环）如同3级，但你还会锁定最高等级魔法的来源。就像模糊感官一样，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5英尺立方体以内（若其大于该范围，则为最近的位置）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Figment.name:
虚影
Figment
Figment.description:
你创造一个简单的幻觉声音或影像。声音会为该法术添加听觉（特征），且该声音不能包含可理解的词语或复杂的音乐。影像会添加视觉（特征），尺寸不超过一个5英尺立方体，并且若在15英尺内观看，会明显显得粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你可以用该幻觉尝试进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造佯动}，使你的欺瞒检定获得+2环境加值。若该尝试对某个生物失败，则该生物会不再相信该拟像。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：拟像}

You create a simple illusory sound or vision. A sound adds the auditory trait to the spell and the sound can't include intelligible words or elaborate music. A vision adds the visual trait, can be no larger than a 5-foot cube, and is clearly crude and undetailed if viewed from within 15 feet. When you Cast or Sustain the Spell, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} with the illusion, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to your Deception check. If the attempt fails against a creature, that creature disbelieves the figment.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{Spell Effect: Figment}

Force Barrage.name:
力场齐射
Force Barrage
Force Barrage.description:
你向一个你能看见的生物射出一枚凝固的魔法碎片。它自动命中并造成 1d4+1 点力场伤害。你在施放法术时每额外使用 1 个动作，射出的碎片数量增加 1 枚，最多在使用 3 个动作时射出 3 枚碎片。你分别为每枚碎片选择目标。如果你向同一目标射出多枚碎片，在应用对伤害的加值或减值、抗性、弱点等之前，先将伤害合并。

升阶 (+2) 你每花费 1 个动作，就额外射出 1 枚碎片。

You fire a shard of solidified magic toward a creature that you can see. It automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage. For each additional action you use when Casting the Spell, increase the number of shards you shoot by one, to a maximum of three shards for 3 actions. You choose the target for each shard individually. If you shoot more than one shard at the same target, combine the damage before applying bonuses or penalties to damage, resistances, weaknesses, and so forth.

Heightened (+2) You fire one additional shard with each action you spend.

Gouging Claw.name:
挖掘利爪
Gouging Claw
Gouging Claw.description:
你暂时将你的肢体变形为带爪的附肢。对你的目标的AC进行一次近战法术攻击掷骰。若你命中，你可选择造成2d6挥砍伤害或2d6穿刺伤害，外加@Damage[(@item.level +1)[bleed]]伤害。在大成功时，你造成双倍伤害与双倍流血伤害。

升阶 (+1) 伤害增加1d6，且持续性流血伤害增加1。

You temporarily morph your limb into a clawed appendage. Make a melee spell attack roll against your target's AC. If you hit, you deal your choice of 2d6 slashing damage or 2d6 piercing damage, plus @Damage[(@item.level +1)[bleed]] damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage and double bleed damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6 and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1.

Message.name:
信息
Message
Message.description:
你轻声念出词句，但它们并不是从你的口中发出，而是直接传入目标的耳中。其他人听到你的话并不会比你平时仅仅动嘴时更清楚，但目标能听见你的话，就仿佛他们正站在你身旁。若目标愿意，他们可以以一个反应动作（）给出简短回应，或在其下一个回合以一个自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能够看见你且处于射程内才能这么做。若他们回应，他们的回应会像原始信息一样，直接传入你的耳中。

强化（3环） 该法术的射程增加至500尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you. The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Sneak Attack.name:
偷袭
Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
佐尔格兰对带有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态的生物造成额外 1d6 伤害。

Zolgran deals an extra 1d6 damage to creatures that have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition.

Kobold Scout (BB).name:
狗头人斥候（BB）
Kobold Scout (BB)

Leather Armor.name:
皮甲
Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的煮制皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时保持最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Bolts.name:
弩矢
Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但结构相似，是弩使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Scamper.name:
急奔
Scamper
Scamper.description:
如果狗头人邻接至少一个敌人，则狗头人疾走至多30尺，并在此移动所触发的反应下获得对AC的+2环境加值。狗头人必须在一个不与任何敌人邻接的空间中结束此次移动。

If the kobold is adjacent to at least one enemy, the kobold Strides up to 30 feet and gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against reactions triggered by this movement. The kobold must end this movement in a space that's not adjacent to any enemy.

Sneak Attack.name:
偷袭
Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
狗头人斥候对具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态的生物造成额外1d6 伤害。

The kobold scout deals an extra 1d6 damage to creatures that have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition.

Kobold Scout (BB).publicNotes:
大多数在防御严密的巢穴或洞窟之外遇到的狗头人都是狗头人斥候，受训于潜行与狩猎。他们负责将食物和贵重物品带回社群。狗头人因必要而擅长协同作战，并且他们经常设置伏击或打了就跑的袭击，使他们能够在不让自己承受太大风险的情况下造成尽可能多的伤害。

Most kobolds encountered outside of a well-defended warren or lair are kobold scouts, trained for stalking and the hunt. They're charged with bringing food and valuable goods back to the community. Kobolds are skilled at working together by necessity, and they often set up ambushes or hit-and-run assaults that allow them to do the most damage possible without putting themselves at much risk.

Kobold Trapmaster (BB).name:
狗头人陷阱大师 (BB)
Kobold Trapmaster (BB)
Kobold Trapmaster (BB).tokenName:
狗头人陷阱大师
Kobold Trapmaster

Leather Armor.name:
皮甲
Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的煮制皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时保持最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Spike Trap.name:
尖刺陷阱
Spike Trap
Spike Trap.description:
该基础陷阱由隐藏的尖刺构成，依靠生物的冲势在其进入陷阱所在的方格时撕裂或可能将其刺穿，造成2d8穿刺伤害。该生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:17|basic:true]豁免掷骰。

This basic snare consists of hidden spikes that rely on a creature's momentum to lacerate or potentially impale it as it enters the snare's square, dealing 2d8 piercing damage. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|basic:true] saving throw.

Quick Trap.name:
快速陷阱
Quick Trap
Quick Trap.description:
狗头人陷阱大师在相邻的一个方格中部署他们的一个尖刺陷阱。

一旦此陷阱被部署在一个方格中，它会对任何踩到该方格的人造成 @Damage[2d8[piercing]|name:Spike Trap] 伤害，并且他们必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|basic:true] 豁免。英雄在大成功时不受伤害，成功时受一半伤害，失败时受全部伤害，大失败时受双倍伤害。这些陷阱可以通过一次成功的 @Check[type:thievery|dc:15|traits:action:disable-a-device] 检定来解除。

The kobold trapmaster deploys one of their spike traps in an adjacent square.

Once this trap is deployed in a square, it deals @Damage[2d8[piercing]|name:Spike Trap] damage to anyone who steps on that square and they must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|basic:true] saving throw. A hero takes no damage on a critical success, half damage on a success, full damage on a failure, and double damage on a critical failure. These traps can be disabled with a successful @Check[type:thievery|dc:15|traits:action:disable-a-device] check.

Scamper.name:
疾奔
Scamper
Scamper.description:
如果狗头人邻接至少一名敌人，则狗头人疾走最多30尺，并在该移动所触发的反应中获得对AC的+2环境加值。狗头人必须在一个不与任何敌人邻接的空间结束该移动。

If the kobold is adjacent to at least one enemy, the kobold Strides up to 30 feet and gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against reactions triggered by this movement. The kobold must end this movement in a space that's not adjacent to any enemy.

Sneak Attack.name:
偷袭
Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
狗头人陷阱大师对具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态的生物造成额外 1d6 伤害。

The kobold trapmaster deals an extra 1d6 damage to creatures that have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition.

Kobold Trapmaster (BB).publicNotes:
狗头人陷阱大师是负责在狗头人巢穴中制作并实施狡猾陷阱的幕后主谋，并在他们族群中广受尊敬。

Kobold trapmasters are the masterminds behind crafting and implementing wily traps in kobold lairs, and are widely respected among their kind.

Kobold Warrior (BB).name:
狗头人战士（BB）
Kobold Warrior (BB)

Leather Armor.name:
皮甲
Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的煮制皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时保持最大灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Scamper.name:
疾奔
Scamper
Scamper.description:
如果狗头人毗邻至少一名敌人，狗头人疾走至多30尺，并在此次移动所触发的反应中，对AC获得+2环境加值。狗头人必须在一个不毗邻任何敌人的空间结束此次移动。

If the kobold is adjacent to at least one enemy, the kobold Strides up to 30 feet and gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against reactions triggered by this movement. The kobold must end this movement in a space that's not adjacent to any enemy.

Sneak Attack.name:
偷袭
Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
狗头人战士对具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态的生物造成额外 1d4 伤害。

The kobold warrior deals an extra 1d4 damage to creatures that have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition.

Kobold Warrior (BB).publicNotes:
典型的狗头人会使用简单武器进行训练。狗头人能够对毫无戒心的敌人打出阴险一击，但如果他们的队伍无法至少以二比一的人数优势压过敌人，他们也会同样迅速地溜走以确保安全。

狗头人信奉实用主义，而一名战败的狗头人宁可投降也不愿面对死亡。如果另一种选择是英年早逝，他们甚至可能抛弃自己的狗头人同族，承认臣服并为胜利者效劳。

A typical kobold trains with simple weaponry. Kobolds are capable of landing sneaky strikes against unsuspecting foes, but they're just as quick to scamper off to safety if their group wouldn't outnumber their enemies by at least two to one.

Kobolds believe in pragmatism, and a defeated kobold would rather surrender than face death. One might even abandon their kobold kin and concede to serve the victor if the alternative is an untimely demise.

Mermaid Fountain (BB).name:
人鱼喷泉（BB）
Mermaid Fountain (BB)
Mermaid Fountain (BB).disable:
@Check[type:thievery|dc:20|traits:complex,hazard|name:Disable Mechanism] 于每个角落机关（必须解除所有三个仍在运作的角落才能解除该陷阱）

每个角落机关具有硬度 8 和 15 HP

@Check[type:thievery|dc:20|traits:complex,hazard|name:Disable Mechanism] on each corner mechanism (must disable all three working corners to disable the trap)

Each corner mechanism has hardness 8 and 15 HP
Mermaid Fountain (BB).routine:
每个回合，喷泉使用 1 个动作。掷骰 [[/r 1d10]]{1d10} 并查阅下表结果，以确定它在该轮使用哪个动作。

  • 1-4 单一目标 雕像旋转并向房间内一个随机单一目标喷射水流。掷骰 [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} 并从你左侧的玩家开始，按你掷出的点数顺数，以确定哪个英雄受到攻击。该喷射为一次远程打击。
  • 5-7 角落喷射 雕像旋转，向房间内每个仍有可运作角落装置的角落各喷射一道水流。它会命中与角落装置相邻的任何生物，造成 @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。每位英雄必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:15|basic:true|traits:hazard]，大成功不受伤害，成功承受一半伤害，失败承受全额伤害，大失败承受双倍伤害。
  • 8-9 半个房间 雕像旋转，向房间的一半喷射水流。掷任意骰。若结果为偶数，则喷射西半边；否则喷射东半边。这会对该半边房间内的每个生物造成 @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并且每位英雄必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:15|basic:true|traits:hazard] 豁免。
  • 10 全房间 其运作方式与半房间攻击完全相同，但它以房间内所有人为目标。

Each turn, the fountain uses 1 action. Roll a [[/r 1d10]]{1d10} and look up the result on the following list to determine which action it uses that round.

  • 1-4 Single Target The statue spins about and sprays water at a single random target in the room. Roll a [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} and count to the number you rolled, starting with the player on your left, to determine which hero gets attacked. The spray is a ranged Strike.
  • 5-7 Corner Spray The statue spins about, firing a spray of water at each corner of the room that still has a functioning corner mechanism. This hits any creature adjacent to the corner mechanism, dealing @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage. Each hero must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:15|basic:true|traits:hazard], taking no damage on a critical success, half damage on a success, full damage on a failure, and double damage on a critical failure.
  • 8-9 Half Room The statue spins about, spraying half of the room with water. Roll any die. If the result is even, it sprays the west half; otherwise, it sprays the east half. This deals @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage to each creature in that half of the room, and each hero must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:15|basic:true|traits:hazard] save.
  • 10 Full Room This works just like the half-room attack, but it targets everyone in the room.

Skeleton Guard (BB).name:
骷髅守卫（BB）
Skeleton Guard (BB)

Arrows.name:
箭矢
Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行中由一端的羽翎保持稳定，另一端则带有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Skeleton Guard (BB).publicNotes:
由邪恶的死灵术将骨头拼合在一起制成的骷髅（特征），常常出没于古老的地城，巡逻于被遗忘的墓园。许多邪恶的幕后主使更偏好让永远警觉的不死生物充当爪牙，以避免为活体守卫提供食物与满足其心理需求所需的维护成本。

简单的骷髅（特征）卫兵仍是最常见的骷髅（特征）仆从。这些骷髅（特征）没有心智，这意味着它们无法真正推理，但能执行其基本的警戒职责：留意并攻击入侵者。一支守卫同一地点的骷髅（特征）小队通常由近战战士与弓箭手组成，弓箭手会在远处射出箭矢。

Made from bones held together by foul necromancy, skeletons can often be found haunting old dungeons and patrolling forgotten cemeteries. Many evil masterminds prefer to keep eternally vigilant undead as minions to avoid the upkeep required to feed and satisfy the psychological needs of living guardians.

Simple skeleton guards remain the most common skeletal minions. These skeletons are mindless, meaning they can't truly reason but can execute their basic guard duties of watching out for and attacking intruders. A group of several skeletons defending the same location usually consists of melee fighters and archers who shoot arrows from afar.

Xulgath Leader (BB).name:
地蜥人领袖（BB）
Xulgath Leader (BB)

Breastplate.name:
胸甲
Breastplate
Breastplate.description:
尽管被称为胸甲，这种护甲由数块板甲或半身板甲护甲组成，用以保护躯干、胸部、颈部，有时也保护髋部和小腿。它在策略上提供了板甲的部分防护，同时允许更高的灵活性和速度。

Though referred to as a breastplate, this type of armor consists of several pieces of plate or half-plate armor that protect the torso, chest, neck, and sometimes the hips and lower legs. It strategically grants some of the protection of plate while allowing greater flexibility and speed.

Stench.name:
恶臭
Stench
Stench.description:
任何进入地蜥人（特征）@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]范围内且能闻到地蜥人（特征）气味的生物都必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:19]豁免。在一次失败时，该生物在对所有检定和DC都承受-1状态减值，直到它使用一个动作干呕为止。成功通过其豁免的生物在1分钟内不受任何地蜥人（特征）的恶臭影响（使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}）。

A creature that comes within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] of the xulgath and can smell the xulgath must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:19] save. On a failure, the creature takes a -1 status penalty to all checks and DCs until it uses an action to retch. A creature that succeeds at its save isn't affected by any xulgaths' stenches for 1 minute (Use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}).

Swipe.name:
横扫
Swipe
Swipe.description:
地蜥人（特征）头目以其巨斧对两个相邻的敌人各进行一次攻击，这两个敌人都在其触及范围内，且获得+1环境加值。第二次攻击使用与第一次相同的多重攻击减值，但地蜥人（特征）头目在此之后进行的攻击承受-10多重攻击减值（或其爪为-8多重攻击减值）。

The xulgath boss makes two Strikes with their greataxe against two adjacent foes, both of whom are within their reach, with a +1 circumstance bonus. The second attack uses the same multiple attack penalty as the first, but attacks the xulgath boss makes after this take a -10 multiple attack penalty (or a -8 multiple attack penalty for its claw).

Xulgath Leader (BB).publicNotes:
地蜥人领袖比地蜥人社群中的其他成员展现出更强的力量，并且对暴力更有亲和力。

Xulgath leaders exhibit greater strength and more affinity for violence than other members of a xulgath community.

Xulgath Warrior (BB).name:
地蜥人战士（BB）
Xulgath Warrior (BB)
Xulgath Warrior (BB).tokenName:
地蜥人（特征）战士
Xulgath Warrior

Stench.name:
恶臭
Stench
Stench.description:
任何进入地蜥人 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 范围内且能闻到地蜥人气味的生物，必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16] 豁免。在一次失败时，该生物在所有检定与DC上承受-1状态减值，直到它使用一个动作进行干呕为止。一名在其豁免中成功的生物在1分钟内不受任何地蜥人恶臭影响（使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}）。

A creature that comes within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] of the xulgath and can smell the xulgath must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16] save. On a failure, the creature takes a -1 status penalty to all checks and DCs until it uses an action to retch. A creature that succeeds at its save isn't affected by any xulgaths' stenches for 1 minute (Use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}).

Xulgath Warrior (BB).publicNotes:
生活在地下的爬行类类人生物，地蜥人（特征）（许多地表居民称其为穴居人）会对进入其领地的入侵者一见即发动攻击。它们以家族为单位组成社群，为了生存与敌对群体以及其他具攻击性的地下居民战斗。它们偶尔会袭击地表聚居地，通常是受残忍嗜血的首领指使。典型的地蜥人（特征）拥有暗淡的浅灰、深灰或灰白色鳞片，带着一条长尾巴，并在脊柱长度方向长有骨质突起。

Reptilian humanoids living underground, xulgaths (known as troglodytes to many surface dwellers) attack intruders in their territory on sight. They live in familial communities, battling rival groups and other aggressive underground inhabitants to survive. They occasionally raid surface settlements, usually at the behest of cruel, bloodthirsty leaders. A typical xulgath has dull gray, dark gray, or ashen scales with a long tail and bony protrusions down the length of their spine.

Zombie Shambler (BB).name:
丧尸蹒跚者（BB）
Zombie Shambler (BB)

Jaws.name:
颚
Jaws
Jaws.description:
需求 该丧尸具有一个生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}。

Requirements The zombie has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}.

Slow.name:
缓慢
Slow
Slow.description:
丧尸（特征）在其回合中只有2个动作，并且无法使用反应。

A zombie has only 2 actions on its turn, and it can't use reactions.

Grab.name:
擒抱
Grab
Grab.description:
当丧尸以其拳击打击成功时，它可以在其后立即使用该动作来尝试对目标进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}。该擒抱不会受到丧尸的多重攻击减值影响，也不会计入丧尸的多重攻击减值。

When the zombie succeeds at its fist Strike, it can use this action immediately after to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} the target. This Grapple doesn't apply or count toward the zombie's multiple attack penalty.

Zombie Shambler (BB).publicNotes:
丧尸唯一的欲望就是吞噬生者。丧尸是不知思考、永远蹒跚而行的死亡先兆，只有在被摧毁时才会停下脚步。在行尸走肉之中，丧尸最常被用作炮灰，在更强大的不死生物到来并给予致命一击之前先行消磨防御。丧尸无法真正独立思考，但它们可以受其他盟友不死生物与强大死灵法师的命令驱使。

A zombie's only desire is to consume the living. Unthinking and ever-shambling harbingers of death, zombies stop only when they're destroyed. Among the living dead, zombies are most often used as fodder, wearing down defenses before more powerful undead arrive to deal the killing blow. Zombies can't truly think for themselves, but they can be commanded by other allied undead and powerful necromancers.

Central Spears (BB).name:
中央长矛（BB）
Central Spears (BB)

Spear Barrage.name:
长矛齐射
Spear Barrage
Spear Barrage.description:
当任一生物移动进入所勾勒区域中的任意方格时，该陷阱会从西侧墙壁射出三支长矛。它会对每一行中最西侧的生物各进行一次远程打击。

When a creature moves into any of the squares in the outlined area, the trap shoots three spears from the western wall. It makes one ranged Strike against the westernmost creature in each row.

Central Spears (BB).disable:
一名英雄必须在触发的地砖或西墙上的墙壁插槽上成功通过一次 @Check[type:thievery|dc:18|traits:hazard|name:Disable Mechanism] 检定。

A hero must succeed at a @Check[type:thievery|dc:18|traits:hazard|name:Disable Mechanism] check on the triggering floor tiles or the wall sockets in the western wall.
Central Spears (BB).reset:
中央长矛在 1 分钟后重置。

The central spears reset after 1 minute.

Falling Ceiling (BB).name:
坠落的天花板（BB）
Falling Ceiling (BB)
Falling Ceiling (BB).tokenName:
坠落的天花板
Falling Ceiling

Falling Stones.name:
坠落的石块
Falling Stones
Falling Stones.description:
当一名生物踏上最靠近北门的方格时，陷阱会沿着走廊全程落下石块。它会对两扇门之间的每一名生物各进行一次远程打击。

When a creature steps on the square closest to the north door, the trap drops blocks of stone all along the hallway. It makes one ranged Strike against each creature between the two doors.

Falling Ceiling (BB).disable:
一名英雄必须在触发的方格或天花板上成功进行一次 @Check[type:thievery|dc:18|traits:hazard|name:Prevent Blocks from Falling] 检定，以防止石块坠落。

A hero must succeed at a @Check[type:thievery|dc:18|traits:hazard|name:Prevent Blocks from Falling] check on the triggering square or the ceiling to prevent the stone blocks from falling.

Hidden Pit (BB).name:
隐藏陷坑（BB）
Hidden Pit (BB)

Pitfall.name:
陷阱
Pitfall
Pitfall.description:
如果生物走到活板门上，除非它成功通过一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:16] 豁免以抓住边缘，否则该生物会掉入其中。坑洞深20英尺，对任何跌到底部的人造成 @Damage[10[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

If a creature walks onto the trapdoor, that creature falls in unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:reflex|dc:16] save to grab hold of the edge. The pit is 20 feet deep, dealing @Damage[10[bludgeoning]] damage to anyone who falls to the bottom.

Hidden Pit (BB).disable:
@Check[type:thievery|dc:12|traits:hazard|name:移除活板门] 以移除活板门。

@Check[type:thievery|dc:12|traits:hazard|name:Remove the Trapdoor] to remove the trapdoor.
Hidden Pit (BB).hazarddescription:
一扇木制活板门盖住了一个10英尺见方、深20英尺的坑。

A wooden trapdoor covers a 10-foot square pit that's 20 feet deep.
Hidden Pit (BB).stealthdetails:
（或 @Check[type:perception|dc:0|traits:hazard] 如果活板门被禁用或损坏）

(or @Check[type:perception|dc:0|traits:hazard] if the trapdoor is disabled or broken)

Spike Trap - Snare.name:
尖刺陷阱 - 圈套
Spike Trap - Snare

Spikes! - Critical Fail Save.name:
尖刺！- 豁免大失败
Spikes! - Critical Fail Save
Spikes! - Critical Fail Save.description:
触发 一个生物走到陷阱上

效果 触发的生物受到@Damage[((2d8)*2)[piercing]] 伤害

Trigger A creature walks onto the trap

Effect The triggering creature takes@Damage[((2d8)*2)[piercing]] damage

Spikes! - Fail.name:
尖刺！ - 失败
Spikes! - Fail
Spikes! - Fail.description:
触发 一名生物走上陷阱

效果 触发的生物受到@Damage[((2d8))[piercing]] 伤害

 

Trigger A creature walks onto the trap

Effect The triggering creature takes@Damage[((2d8))[piercing]] damage

Spikes! - Success Save.name:
尖刺！- 成功 豁免
Spikes! - Success Save
Spikes! - Success Save.description:
触发 一个生物走到陷阱上

效果 触发的生物受到@Damage[((2d8)/2)[piercing]] 伤害

Trigger A creature walks onto the trap

Effect The triggering creature takes@Damage[((2d8)/2)[piercing]] damage

Spike Trap - Snare.disable:
@Check[type:thievery|dc:17|name:移除活板门|traits:mechanical,trap] 以移除活板门

@Check[type:thievery|dc:17|name:Remove Trap Door|traits:mechanical,trap] to remove the trapdoor
Spike Trap - Snare.hazarddescription:
这个基础陷阱由隐藏的尖刺组成，依靠生物的冲势在其进入陷阱的方格时撕裂或可能将其刺穿，造成2d8穿刺伤害。该生物必须尝试一次DC 17 基础反射豁免掷骰。

This basic snare consists of hidden spikes that rely on a creature's momentum to lacerate or potentially impale it as it enters the snare's square, dealing 2d8 piercing damage. The creature must attempt a DC 17 Basic Reflex saving throw.

Speech (Common).name:
语言（通用语）
Speech (Common)
Speech (Common).description:
它理解并会说你所知晓的一种语言。

It understands and speaks a language you know.

Share Senses.name:
共享感官
Share Senses
Share Senses.description:
每 10 分钟一次，你可以使用带有专注（特征）的单动作，将你的感官投射到你的魔宠中。当你这么做时，你会失去来自自身身体的所有感官信息，但可以通过你的魔宠的身体进行感知，最长 1 分钟。你可以解消此效果。

Once every 10 minutes, you can use a single action with the concentrate trait to project your senses into your familiar. When you do, you lose all sensory information from your own body, but can sense through your familiar's body for up to 1 minute. You can Dismiss this effect.

Scent.name:
嗅觉
Scent
Scent.description:
它可以在30英尺内将嗅觉作为一种模糊感官使用。

It can use scent as an imprecise sense within 30 feet.

Familiar of Ongoing Misery.name:
持续苦痛魔宠
Familiar of Ongoing Misery
Familiar of Ongoing Misery.description:
你的魔宠似乎对除你以外的所有生物都充满敌意，如果它们靠得太近就会对其嘶嘶作响。当你施放或维持一个妖术时，你的魔宠可以诅咒其15英尺内的一个生物，使任何影响该生物的负面状况的持续时间延长1轮。这是一个诅咒效果。此延长仅适用于具有计时持续时间的状况（例如“1轮”或“直到你下个回合结束”），并且不会阻止状况通过其他方式被移除。

Your familiar seems hostile to all creatures other than you, hissing at them if they get too near. When you Cast or Sustain a hex, your familiar can curse a creature within 15 feet of it, prolonging the duration of any negative conditions affecting it by 1 round. This is a curse effect. This prolongs only conditions with a timed duration (such as "1 round" or "until the end of your next turn") and doesn't prevent conditions from being removed by other means.

Cat.name:
猫
Cat
Cat.description:
你的伙伴是一只大型猫科动物，例如豹或虎。

体型 小型

近战 1 颚（灵巧），伤害 1d6 穿刺

近战 1 爪（敏捷，灵巧），伤害 1d4 挥砍

Str +2，Dex +3，Con +1，Int -4，Wis +2，Cha +0

生命值 4

技能 潜行

感官 微光视觉，嗅觉（模糊，30 尺）

速度 35 尺

特殊 你的猫对措手不及的目标造成额外 1d4 精准伤害。

支援增益 当你创造破绽时，你的猫会让你的敌人失去平衡。直到你下个回合开始前，你对你的猫所威胁的生物造成伤害的打击，会使目标 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 直到你下个回合结束。

进阶战技 猫扑

Your companion is a big cat, such as a leopard or tiger.

Size Small

Melee 1 jaws (finesse), Damage 1d6 piercing

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse), Damage 1d4 slashing

Str +2, Dex +3, Con +1, Int -4, Wis +2, Cha +0

Hit Points 4

Skill Stealth

Senses low-light vision, scent (imprecise, 30 feet)

Speed 35 feet

Special Your cat deals 1d4 extra precision damage against off-guard targets.

Support Benefit Your cat throws your enemies off-balance when you create an opening. Until the start of your next turn, your Strikes that deal damage to a creature that your cat threatens make the target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.

Advanced Maneuver Cat Pounce

Cat Support Benefit.name:
猫 支援 增益
Cat Support Benefit
Cat Support Benefit.description:
当你创造破绽时，你的猫会让你的敌人失去平衡。直到你下个回合开始前，你对位于你的猫的触及范围内的一个生物造成伤害的打击会使该目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}直到你下个回合结束。

Your cat throws your enemies off-balance when you create an opening. Until the start of your next turn, your Strikes that deal damage to a creature within your cat's reach make the target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn.

Versatile Heritage.name:
多才传承
Versatile Heritage
Versatile Heritage.description:
人类的多才多艺与雄心壮志助推了其崛起，使其成为世界上大多数国家中最常见的族裔。在你满足先决条件的前提下，选择一个你自选的一般专长（与你的族裔专长一样，你可以在创建角色期间的任意时间选择该一般专长）。

Humanity's versatility and ambition have fueled its ascendance to be the most common ancestry in most nations throughout the world. Select a general feat of your choice for which you meet the prerequisites (as with your ancestry feat, you can select this general feat at any point during character creation).

Diehard.name:
顽强
Diehard
Diehard.description:
要杀死你比杀死大多数人更难。你在濒死（状态）5时才会因濒死（状态）而死亡，而不是濒死（状态）4。

It takes more to kill you than most. You die from the dying condition at dying 5, rather than dying 4.

Hunter.name:
猎人
Hunter
Hunter.description:
你追踪并猎杀野外的动物和其他生物。剥皮、取肉以及烹饪也同样是你训练的一部分，这些都能在你冒险时为你提供有用的资源。

选择两个能力提升。一个必须提升敏捷或感知，另一个为自由能力提升。

你受训于生存（技能）和制革学识（技能）。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.tGIXuk0XeWmG04CX]{勘察野生动物} 技能专长。

You stalked and took down animals and other creatures of the wild. Skinning animals, harvesting their flesh, and cooking them were also part of your training, all of which can give you useful resources while you adventure.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Wisdom, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Survival skill and the Tanning Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.tGIXuk0XeWmG04CX]{Survey Wildlife} skill feat.

Survey Wildlife.name:
调查野生动物
Survey Wildlife
Survey Wildlife.description:
你可以研究荒野中的细节以确定附近生物的存在。你可以花费10分钟评估你周围的区域，以根据巢穴、粪便和植被上的痕迹找出附近有哪些生物。进行一次生存检定，对抗由GM根据这些迹象有多明显而决定的DC。成功时，你可以尝试一次回忆知识检定，并带有-2减值，仅凭这些迹象来了解这些生物的更多信息。如果你在生存方面是大师，你不承受该减值。

You can study details in the wilderness to determine the presence of nearby creatures. You can spend 10 minutes assessing the area around you to find out what creatures are nearby, based on nests, scat, and marks on vegetation. Attempt a Survival check against a DC determined by the GM based on how obvious the signs are. On a success, you can attempt a Recall Knowledge check with a -2 penalty to learn more about the creatures just from these signs. If you're a master in Survival, you don't take the penalty.

Javelin.name:
标枪
Javelin
Javelin.description:
这把细长的长矛在投掷时平衡良好，但并非为近战使用而设计。

This thin spear is well balanced for throwing but is not designed for melee use.

Bastard Sword.name:
手半剑
Bastard Sword
Bastard Sword.description:
这种宽刃剑有时也被称为手半剑，握柄更长，因此既可单手持用，也可双手使用以提供额外的劈砍威力。

This broad-bladed sword, sometimes called the hand-and-a-half sword, has a longer grip so it can be held in one hand or used with two hands to provide extra slashing power.

Hide Armor.name:
兽皮护甲
Hide Armor
Hide Armor.description:
这种护甲由毛皮、结实的兽皮，有时还会加入塑形的煮制皮革混合而成。它依靠多层皮革提供保护，不过其笨重会让穿戴者行动变慢并降低机动性。

A mix of furs, sturdy hide, and sometimes molded boiled leather, this armor provides protection due to its layers of leather, though its bulkiness slows the wearer down and decreases mobility.

Healing Potion (Minor).name:
治疗药水（次等）
Healing Potion (Minor)
Healing Potion (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶宝石红色的液体，饮用者的伤口迅速愈合时会带来刺痛般的感觉。当你喝下治疗药水时，你恢复[[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 生命值}。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain [[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 Hit Points}.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳背包而不是将其背在背上，它的负载为轻型而不是可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水袋大约装有足够供一名小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有时间捕捉火花时点燃火焰很有用，尽管在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗费时代而不太实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也需要至少使用3个动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为一把临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Grappling Hook.name:
抓钩
Grappling Hook
Grappling Hook.description:
你可以投掷一把系着绳子的抓钩，让攀爬更容易。要固定抓钩，使用你的简易武器熟练度进行一次远程攻击掷骰，对抗一个取决于目标的DC，通常至少为DC 20。此攻击具有秘密（特征）。成功时，你的抓钩牢牢钩住；但在大失败时，抓钩看起来似乎能钩住，但实际上会在你爬到一半时脱落

You can throw a grappling hook with a rope tied to it to make a climb easier. To anchor a grappling hook, make a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your hook has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the hook seems like it will hold but actually falls when you're partway up

Natural Ambition.name:
天生抱负
Natural Ambition
Natural Ambition.description:
你从小被培养得雄心勃勃，总是努力触及群星，这让你在所选择的领域里进步飞快。你获得一个你职业的1级职业专长。你必须满足先决条件，但你可以在创建角色流程的后期再选择该专长，以便确定你满足哪些先决条件。

You were raised to be ambitious and always reach for the stars, leading you to progress quickly in your chosen field. You gain a 1st-level class feat for your class. You must meet the prerequisites, but you can select the feat later in the character creation process in order to determine which prerequisites you meet.

Raging Intimidation.name:
狂暴威吓
Raging Intimidation
Raging Intimidation.description:
你的狂怒令敌人心生恐惧。当你处于狂暴时，你的挫志与恐吓致死动作（分别来自威吓（技能）与一个威吓（技能）专长）获得狂暴（特征）特征，使你能在狂暴时使用它们。一旦你满足技能专长威吓怒视与恐吓致死的先决条件，你便获得这些专长。

Your fury fills your foes with fear. While you are raging, your Demoralize and Scare to Death actions (from the Intimidation skill and an Intimidation skill feat, respectively) gain the rage trait, allowing you to use them while raging. As soon as you meet the prerequisites for the skill feats Intimidating Glare and Scare to Death, you gain these feats.

Sudden Charge.name:
突袭冲锋
Sudden Charge
Sudden Charge.description:
你快速冲刺，冲向你的敌人并挥击。疾走两次。若你在移动结束时处于至少一名敌人的近战触及范围内，你可以对该敌人进行一次近战打击。若你具有对应的移动类型，你可以在掘地、攀爬、飞行或游泳时使用突袭冲锋以替代疾走。

With a quick sprint, you dash up to your foe and swing. Stride twice. If you end your movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, you can make a melee Strike against that enemy. You can use Sudden Charge while Burrowing, Climbing, Flying, or Swimming instead of Striding if you have the corresponding movement type.

Barbarian.name:
野蛮人
Barbarian
Barbarian.description:
狂怒在战斗中吞噬你。你乐于大肆破坏，使用强力武器劈开敌人，依靠惊人的耐久性，而不需要复杂的技巧或刻板的训练。你的狂怒源自一种凶猛的本能，你可能将其与某种动物、某个灵体，或你自身的一部分联系在一起。对许多野蛮人而言，蛮力就是锤子，而每个问题看起来都像钉子；而另一些人则试图压抑体内的情绪风暴，只在最关键的时候才释放怒火。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.lvuutBI9BSCU6cWe]{野蛮人}

Rage consumes you in battle. You delight in wreaking havoc and using powerful weapons to carve through your enemies, relying on astonishing durability without needing complicated techniques or rigid training. Your rages draw upon a vicious instinct, which you might associate with an animal, a spirit, or some part of yourself. To many barbarians, brute force is a hammer and every problem looks like a nail, whereas others try to hold back the storm of emotions inside them and release their rage only when it matters most.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.lvuutBI9BSCU6cWe]{Barbarian}

Instinct.name:
本能
Instinct
Instinct.description:
你通过一种本能来引导你的狂暴。你决定你的本能对你意味着什么。它可以是你氏族所珍爱的某个生物或象征，或是你狂暴的纯粹内在源头或滤镜，例如一种信念、诅咒、传承或精神状态。每种本能都会赋予一种本能能力，以及更多你可以通过将该本能列为先决条件的专长获得的能力。它还决定你在狂暴抗力中抗力的是什么类型的伤害，并且在更高等级时，提高你在你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.WZUCvxqbigXos1L9]{Rage} 时造成的额外伤害。

每种本能都会列出对其而言属于禁忌的行为。每当你进行此类行为时，你会失去该本能的能力以及任何将你的本能列为先决条件的专长，直到你花费 1 天的休整模式让自己重新居中为止，不过你仍保留你其他所有的野蛮人能力。

You channel your rage through an instinct. You decide what your instinct means to you. It could be a creature or symbol beloved by your clan, or a purely internal source or filter of your rage, such as a belief, curse, heritage, or state of mind. Each instinct grants an instinct ability, plus more abilities you can gain via feats that list that instinct as a prerequisite. It also determines what damage you resist with raging resistance and, at higher levels, increases the additional damage you deal when you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.WZUCvxqbigXos1L9]{Rage}.

Each instinct lists acts that are anathema to it. Whenever you perform such acts, you lose the instinct's abilities and any feats that list your instinct as a prerequisite until you spend 1 day of downtime re-centering yourself, though you keep all of your other barbarian abilities.

Rage.name:
狂暴
Rage
Rage.description:
需求 你未处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} 或狂暴（特征）状态。

你唤起内心的怒火并开始狂暴（特征）。你获得等同于你的等级加上你的体质调整值数量的临时生命值。这种狂怒持续 1 分钟，直到你无法察觉到任何敌人，或直到你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}，以先发生者为准。你不能自愿停止狂暴（特征）。当你处于狂暴（特征）时：

  • 你用近战武器和徒手攻击造成额外 2 点伤害。如果你的武器或徒手攻击具有 agile，则该额外伤害减半。
  • 你的 AC 承受 -1 减值。
  • 你不能使用带有专注（特征）的动作，除非它们也具有狂暴（特征）。你可以在狂暴（特征）时 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}。

在你停止狂暴（特征）后，你失去来自 Rage 的任何剩余临时生命值，并且你在 1 分钟内不能再次 Rage。

Requirements You aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} or raging.

You tap into your inner fury and begin raging. You gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to your level plus your Constitution modifier. This frenzy lasts for 1 minute, until there are no enemies you can perceive, or until you fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, whichever comes first. You can't voluntarily stop raging. While you are raging:

  • You deal 2 additional damage with melee weapons and unarmed attacks. This additional damage is halved if your weapon or unarmed attack is agile.
  • You take a -1 penalty to AC.
  • You can't use actions with the concentrate trait unless they also have the rage trait. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} while raging.

After you stop raging, you lose any remaining temporary Hit Points from Rage, and you can't Rage again for 1 minute.

Giant Instinct.name:
巨人本能
Giant Instinct
Giant Instinct.description:
你的狂暴赋予你巨人的原始力量与体型。这并不一定意味着你崇敬巨人——你可能会嘲笑他们，甚至渴望屠戮他们！或者，由于你非凡的力量或夸张到近乎巨大的情绪与自我，旁人反而会觉得你像个巨人。

禁忌

未能直面一项个人的力量挑战属于禁忌。

泰坦碎颅者（本能能力）

如果你是小型或中型（无论平时还是狂暴时），你可以使用为大型生物打造的武器。如果你不是小型或中型，你可以使用为比你大一级体型的生物打造的武器。你获得对这种更大武器的许可，其武器类型必须是在创建角色时本来可用的任意武器类型。它具有符合其体型的武器的正常价格与负载。在战斗中挥舞此类武器时，将你从狂暴获得的额外伤害从2提高至6，但由于武器笨重的体型，你会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 1} 状态。当你挥舞该武器时，你无法以任何方式移除该笨拙状态或无视其减值。

专精能力等级 7

当你使用更大武器时，将狂暴的伤害从6提高至10；若你拥有强效武器专精，则将其从10提高至18。

狂暴抗力等级 9

你获得对钝击伤害的抗力，以及对寒冷、电击或火焰之一的抗力（在你获得狂暴抗力时选择）。

注：当你进入狂暴时，你需要手动应用笨拙（状态） 1。记得调整你武器的体型，以确保你的本能能力正确生效。

Your rage gives you the raw power and size of a giant. This doesn't necessarily mean you revere giants-you might scoff at them or even aspire to slay them! You could instead seem like a giant to other people due to your exceptional strength or larger-than-life emotions and ego.

Anathema

Failing to face a personal challenge of strength is anathema.

Titan Mauler (Instinct Ability)

You can use a weapon built for a Large creature if you are Small or Medium (both normally and when raging). If you're not Small or Medium, you can use a weapon built for a creature one size larger than you. You gain access to this larger weapon, of any weapon type otherwise available at character creation. It has the normal Price and Bulk for a weapon of its size. When wielding such a weapon in combat, increase your additional damage from Rage from 2 to 6, but you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} condition because of the weapon's unwieldy size. You can't remove this clumsy condition or ignore its penalties by any means while wielding the weapon.

Specialization AbilityLevel 7

Increase the damage from Rage when using a larger weapon from 6 to 10; if you have greater weapon specialization, increase it from 10 to 18.

Raging ResistanceLevel 9

You resist bludgeoning damage and your choice of cold, electricity, or fire, chosen when you gain raging resistance.

Note: You need to manually apply Clumsy 1 when you enter rage. Remember to alter the size of your weapon to ensure your Instinct Ability works correctly.

Human.name:
人类
Human
Human.description:
如同格拉利昂的任何民族一样难以预测且多种多样，人类拥有卓越的干劲，以及忍耐与扩张的能力。尽管在人类崛起之前已有许多文明繁荣昌盛，但在人类历史进程中，他们建立了一些最伟大也最可怖的社会，而在今天，他们是内海周边诸国中人口最多的族群。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{人类}

As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand. Though many civilizations thrived before humanity rose to prominence, humans have built some of the greatest and the most terrible societies throughout the course of history, and today they are the most populous people in the realms around the Inner Sea.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{Human}

Intimidating Glare.name:
威吓凝视
Intimidating Glare
Intimidating Glare.description:
你只需怒目而视即可威吓。当你这样做时，威吓失去听觉（特征）并获得视觉（特征），且如果该生物不理解你的语言，你不会承受减值。

You can Demoralize with a mere glare. When you do, Demoralize loses the auditory trait and gains the visual trait, and you don't take a penalty if the creature doesn't understand your language.

Human.name:
人类
Human
Human.description:
如同格拉利昂的任何民族一样难以预测且多种多样，人类拥有非凡的进取心，以及忍耐与扩张的能力。尽管在人类崛起至显赫地位之前已有许多文明繁荣兴盛，但在人类历史进程中，人类建立了一些最伟大、也最可怕的社会；而在今天，他们是内海周边诸国中人口最多的民族。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{人类}

As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand. Though many civilizations thrived before humanity rose to prominence, humans have built some of the greatest and the most terrible societies throughout the course of history, and today they are the most populous people in the realms around the Inner Sea.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{Human}

Merchant.name:
商人
Merchant
Merchant.description:
在满是尘土的商店、集市摊位或商队中，你用货物换取钱币与贸易品。你学到的技能依然适用于冒险生活：在其中，一笔护甲的好买卖可能会避免你的死亡。

选择两个属性提升。其一必须分配给智力或魅力，其二为自由属性提升。

你受训于交涉（技能）与商业学识（技能）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5nc5ridFBfYpn2Om]{Bargain Hunter}技能专长。

In a dusty shop, market stall, or merchant caravan, you bartered wares for coin and trade goods. The skills you picked up still apply in the adventuring life, in which a good deal on a suit of armor could prevent your death.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Intelligence or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Diplomacy skill and the Mercantile Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5nc5ridFBfYpn2Om]{Bargain Hunter} skill feat.

Bargain Hunter.name:
捡漏猎手
Bargain Hunter
Bargain Hunter.description:
你可以使用交涉来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{谋生}，把每天的时间花在寻找便宜货并以利润转卖上。你也可以花时间专门嗅出一件物品的超级便宜货；这如同你使用交涉进行谋生一样运作，但不是获得钱，而是以等同于你本会获得的钱的折扣来购买该物品；如果你谋生获得的收入等于或高于其成本，你就能免费获得该物品。最后，如果你在创建角色时于1级选择了便宜货猎人，你在开始游戏时额外获得2 gp。

You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income} using Diplomacy, spending your days hunting for bargains and reselling at a profit. You can also spend time specifically sniffing out a great bargain on an item; this works as if you were using Earn Income with Diplomacy, except instead of gaining money, you purchase the item at a discount equal to the money you would have gained, gaining the item for free if your earned income equals or exceeds its cost. Finally, if you select Bargain Hunter during character creation at 1st level, you start play with an additional 2 gp.

Wizard.name:
法师
Wizard
Wizard.description:
你是宇宙奥秘的永恒求学者，运用你对魔法的精通来施放强大而毁灭性的法术。你把魔法当作一门科学来对待，将最新的实用施法术文与古老的秘传典籍相互对照，以发现并理解魔法如何运作。然而，魔法理论浩瀚无边，你不可能将其全部研究透彻。你要么专精于八大学派之一的魔法，从而在那些法术的细微之处获得高于一切的更深理解；要么偏好更为广泛的路径，以牺牲深度为代价，强调所有魔法如何汇聚为一体。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.wDukeO3euLEGn6FA]{法师}

You are an eternal student of the arcane secrets of the universe, using your mastery of magic to cast powerful and devastating spells. You treat magic like a science, cross-referencing the latest texts on practical spellcraft with ancient esoteric tomes to discover and understand how magic works. Yet magical theory is vast, and there's no way you can study it all. You either specialize in one of the eight schools of magic, gaining deeper understanding of the nuances of those spells above all others, or favor a broader approach that emphasizes the way all magic comes together at the expense of depth.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.wDukeO3euLEGn6FA]{Wizard}

Arcane School.name:
奥术学派
Arcane School
Arcane School.description:
大多数法师从正规的教育机构获得他们的法术知识，例如阿坎纳米瑞姆或玛迦安比亚。在第1等级时，你选择你的奥术学派，这会赋予你魔法能力。

你从你就读学派所教授的课程中获得额外的法术与法术位。奥术学派在第198页有详细描述。一些法师遵循统一魔法理论学派，这种学派试图通过独立学习并从大量文本与导师那里汲取信息来打造一个新的学派。尽管采用这种方法的法师缺乏正规训练的专注，他们却拥有更高的灵活性。

Most wizards acquire their knowledge of spells from a formal educational institution, such as the Arcanamirium or the Magaambya. At 1st level, you choose your arcane school, which grants you magical abilities.

You gain additional spells and spell slots from the curriculum taught at the school you attended. Arcane schools are described in detail on page 198. Some wizards follow the school of unified magical theory, which attempts to forge a new school by studying independently and drawing information from a multitude of texts and tutors. Though a wizard with this approach lacks the focus of formal training, they have greater flexibility.

Arcane Thesis.name:
奥术论文
Arcane Thesis
Arcane Thesis.description:
在你学习成为一名真正的法师期间，你撰写了一篇独特的魔法研究论文。你会根据论文研究的主题获得一项特殊增益。本书中提供的奥术论文主题如下；你的具体论文可能有一个更长、更技术性的标题，例如“论法术插值的方法以及对魔法基石的新理解之起源。”

During your studies to become a full-fledged wizard, you produced a thesis of unique magical research. You gain a special benefit depending on the topic of your thesis research. The arcane thesis topics presented in this book are below; your specific thesis probably has a much longer and more technical title like "On the Methods of Spell Interpolation and the Genesis of a New Understanding of the Building Blocks of Magic."

Arcane Bond.name:
奥术联结
Arcane Bond
Arcane Bond.description:
你将一些魔法力量灌注到一件已绑定物品中。每天当你准备法术时，你可以指定你拥有的一件物品作为你的已绑定物品。这通常是一件与施法相关的物品，例如魔杖、戒指或法杖，但你也可以自由指定一把武器或其他物品。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.v82XtjAVN4ffgVVR]{Drain Bonded Item} 自由动作（）。

You place some of your magical power in a bonded item. Each day when you prepare your spells, you can designate a single item you own as your bonded item. This is typically an item associated with spellcasting, such as a wand, ring, or staff, but you are free to designate a weapon or other item. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.v82XtjAVN4ffgVVR]{Drain Bonded Item} free action.

Wizard Spellcasting.name:
法师法术施放
Wizard Spellcasting
Wizard Spellcasting.description:
通过专注的研习与实践，你能够以学术上的严谨来塑造奥术魔法，从而构筑法术。你是一名施法者，并且你可以使用施法（行动）来施放奥术根源的法术。作为一名法师，当你施放法术时，你的咒文很可能会明确指出你在呼唤何种力量以及如何塑形，而你的手势会精确地塑造并引导你的魔法，同时一圈圈奥术符文会迸发光芒、跃然成形。

在1级时，你每天早晨可以从你的法术书中的法术（见下文）准备至多两个1环法术和五个戏法，以及从你的奥术学派中额外准备一个课程戏法和每个你能施放的环阶各一个额外课程法术。已准备的法术会一直可用，直到你施放它们，或直到你再次准备你的法术。你能准备的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为法师的等级提升，你每天能够准备的法术数量会增加，你能施放的最高环阶法术也会提升，如“法师每日法术”表所示。

你的某些法术需要你尝试一次法术攻击来判断其效果如何，或让你的敌人对你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键属性是智力，你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC都使用你的智力调整值。关于如何计算这些数据的细节见第403页。

升阶法术

当你获得2环及更高环阶的法术位时，你可以用这些法术位来填入低环阶法术的更强版本。这会提高该法术的环阶，使其升阶以匹配法术位。许多法术在被升阶至特定环阶时会获得明确的提升。

戏法

你的某些法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不会消耗法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天施放任意次数。戏法总是会自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）——这通常等于你所拥有的最高环阶法师法术位。例如，作为1级法师，你的戏法是1环法术；作为5级法师，你的戏法是3环法术。

法术书

每个奥术法术都有其书写版本，你会将其记录在你个性化的法术书中。你起始拥有一本价值10 sp或更低的法术书，你免费获得它，并且必须每天研读它以准备你的法术。你的法术书的形式与名称由你决定。它可能是一本发霉的皮革装帧巨著，或是一组用黄铜环串联的薄金属圆盘；它的名字可能深奥玄秘，例如《寂影之典》，或更具学术气息，例如《贾尔梅里元素理论的高等火系应用》。

该法术书包含你选择的10个奥术戏法和五个1环奥术法术。你从奥术法术列表中的通用法术中选择它们，或从你获得许可的其他奥术法术中选择。你还会从你的奥术学派的课程中加入两个1环法术（统一魔法理论学派除外，如该学派中所述）。

每当你获得一个等级，你都会向法术书中加入两个奥术法术，环阶不限，但必须是你拥有对应法术位的法术环阶；这些法术从你的根源的通用法术中选择，或从你获得许可并通过“学习法术”学会的其他法术中选择。当你获得新环阶的法术位时，你还会从你学派的课程中额外加入一个法术（除非是统一魔法理论学派）。

Through dedicated study and practice, you can construct spells with academic rigor by shaping arcane magic. You are a spellcaster, and you can cast spells of the arcane tradition using the Cast a Spell activity. As a wizard, when you cast spells, your incantations likely specify exactly what forces you call on and how to shape them, and your gestures precisely shape and direct your magic while circles of arcane runes flare to life.

At 1st level, you can prepare up to two 1st-rank spells and five cantrips each morning from the spells in your spellbook (see below), as well as one extra curriculum cantrip and one extra curriculum spell of each rank you can cast from your arcane school. Prepared spells remain available to you until you cast them or until you prepare your spells again. The number of spells you can prepare is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a wizard, the number of spells you can prepare each day increases, as does the highest rank of spell you can cast, as shown in the Wizard Spells per Day table.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are, or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key attribute is Intelligence, your spell attack modifier and spell DC use your Intelligence modifier. Details on calculating these statistics appear on page 403.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank, heightening it to match the spell slot. Many spells have specific improvements when they are heightened to certain ranks.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of wizard spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level wizard, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level wizard, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Spellbook

Every arcane spell has a written version, which you record in your personalized book of spells. You start with a spellbook worth 10 sp or less, which you receive for free and must study each day to prepare your spells. Your spellbook's form and name are up to you. It might be a musty, leather-bound tome or an assortment of thin metal disks connected to a brass ring; its name might be esoteric, like The Tome of Silent Shadows or something more academic, like Advanced Pyromantic Applications of Jalmeri Elemental Theory.

The spellbook contains your choice of 10 arcane cantrips and five 1st-rank arcane spells. You choose these from the common spells on the arcane spell list or from other arcane spells you gain access to. You also add two 1st-rank spells from the curriculum of your arcane school (except in the case of the school of unified magical theory, as described in that school).

Each time you gain a level, you add two arcane spells to your spellbook, of any spell rank for which you have spell slots, chosen from common spells of your tradition or others you gain access to and learn via Learn a Spell. When you gain spell slots of a new rank, you also add an additional spell from your school's curriculum (unless it's the school of unified magical theory).

Reach Spell.name:
触及法术
Reach Spell
Reach Spell.description:
你可以延伸你的法术的射程。如果你接下来使用的动作是施放一个具有射程的法术，使该法术的射程增加30英尺。按照增加法术射程的常规规则，如果该法术通常具有接触射程，你将其射程延伸至30英尺。

You can extend your spells' range. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase that spell's range by 30 feet. As is standard for increasing spell ranges, if the spell normally has a range of touch, you extend its range to 30 feet.

School of Unified Magical Theory.name:
统一魔法理论学派
School of Unified Magical Theory
School of Unified Magical Theory.description:
你摒弃了“魔法可以通过任何单一学派或学院的教义被整齐表达”的想法，而是将自学方向调整为汲取每个魔法学派中最精华的部分。如此一来，你会发现位于各学派交汇处的真理，更接近奥术魔法的理想本质。总有一天，你会揭开那套阐明所有魔法的、唯一而优雅的理论（也许这套理论会冠以你的名字？），但在那之前，你的研究仍将继续。

无课程 你没有固定课程，因此你没有课程法术，也无法从那些专门影响课程法术的能力中获益。取而代之，你获得一个额外的1级法师（职业）职业专长，并将一个你选择的1环法术加入你的法术书，以代表你多元的研究。

你对魔法本质的研究让你能更高效地运用它——你不再只能每天使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.v82XtjAVN4ffgVVR]{Drain Bonded Item}，而是对于你能施放的每个法术环阶，每天都可以使用一次，并且每次都能回忆一个该环阶的法术。

学派法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.bSDTWUIvgXkBaEv8]{Hand of the Apprentice}；进阶：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.sGenGMmE1ntkXCtN]{Interdisciplinary Incantation}

You eschew the idea that magic can be neatly expressed by the teachings of any single school or college, instead directing your self-study to pick up the best of every school of magic. In doing so, you'll find the truths that lie at the intersection of each school, coming closer to the ideal nature of arcane magic. One day, you'll uncover that single elegant theory detailing all magic (perhaps a theory bearing your name?), but until then, your studies continue.

No Curriculum You don't have a set curriculum, and so you don't have curriculum spells and can't benefit from abilities that specifically affect them. Instead, you gain an additional 1st-level wizard class feat, and you add one 1st-rank spell of your choice to your spellbook to represent your diverse studies.

Your studies into the very nature of magic itself have let you use it more efficiently—instead of using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.v82XtjAVN4ffgVVR]{Drain Bonded Item} only once per day, you can use it once per day for each rank of spell you can cast, recalling a spell of that rank each time.

School Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.bSDTWUIvgXkBaEv8]{Hand of the Apprentice}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.sGenGMmE1ntkXCtN]{Interdisciplinary Incantation}

Widen Spell.name:
拓宽法术
Widen Spell
Widen Spell.description:
你操纵法术的能量，使其扩散并影响更广的区域。若你接下来的动作是施放一个具有爆发、锥形或线形区域且没有持续时间的法术，则增加该法术的区域。将通常半径至少为10英尺的爆发半径增加5英尺（半径更小的爆发不受影响）。将通常长度为15英尺或更短的锥形或线形长度增加5英尺，并将更大的锥形或线形长度增加10英尺。

You manipulate the energy of your spell, causing it to spread out and affect a wider area. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has an area of a burst, cone, or line and does not have a duration, increase the area of that spell. Add 5 feet to the radius of a burst that normally has a radius of at least 10 feet (a burst with a smaller radius is not affected). Add 5 feet to the length of a cone or line that is normally 15 feet long or smaller, and add 10 feet to the length of a larger cone or line.

Experimental Spellshaping.name:
实验性塑法
Experimental Spellshaping
Experimental Spellshaping.description:
你的论文主张，通过在施放时改变变量与参数，可以更高效地实现法术塑形的魔法实践，模仿久远年代的法师——他们必须自行钻研并创造自己的法术。这使你能够高效许可多种法术塑形效果。

你获得一个你选择的1环法术塑形法师专长。从4级开始，在你的每日准备期间，你可以获得一个你选择的法术塑形法师专长，其等级需求不超过你等级的一半，你可以使用该专长直到你的下一次每日准备。

Your thesis posits that the magical practice of spellshaping can be realized more efficiently by altering variables and parameters as you cast, imitating the wizards of long ago who had to work out their own spells themselves. This allows you efficient access to various spellshape effects.

You gain one 1st-rank spellshape wizard feat of your choice. Starting at 4th level, during your daily preparations, you can gain a spellshape wizard feat of your choice that has a level requirement of no more than half your level, which you can use until your next daily preparations.

Drain Bonded Item.name:
汲取契约物品
Drain Bonded Item
Drain Bonded Item.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你的联结物品在你身上。

你消耗储存在你联结物品中的魔法力量。在当前回合内，你可以施放一个你今天已准备且已经施放过的法术，而无需消耗一个法术位。你仍然必须施放法术并满足该法术的其他需求。

Frequency once per day

Requirements Your bonded item is on your person.

You expend the magical power stored in your bonded item. During the current turn, you can cast one spell you prepared today and already cast, without spending a spell slot. You must still Cast the Spell and meet the spell's other requirements.

Cast a Spell.name:
施放法术
Cast a Spell
Cast a Spell.description:
你施放一个你已准备或在你的法术池中的法术。施法（行动）是一种特殊行动，它所需的动作数会因法术而异，如每个法术的数据表中所列。一旦施法所需的动作完成，法术效果立即发生。

有些法术以反应动作（）或自由动作（）施放。在这些情况下，你以反应动作（）或自由动作（）来施放（视情况而定），而不是作为一个行动。此类情况会在法术的数据表中注明——例如，“[reaction] 言语”。

长施法 时间 有些法术需要数分钟或数小时才能施放。这些法术的施法（行动）包含所列法术成分的混合，但不需要细分你在某一时刻提供的是哪一种。施放此类法术期间你不能使用其他动作或反应动作（），不过在GM裁量下，你可能可以说几句话。与其他耗时很长的行动一样，这些法术具有探索（特征），并且你不能在遭遇中施放它们。如果你在施放其中一个时爆发战斗，你的法术会被扰乱。

法术成分 每个法术在动作图标或文字之后列出施放所需的法术成分，例如“[three-actions] 材料、姿势、言语”。如下所述的法术成分会为施法（行动）增加特征与需求。如果你无法提供这些成分，你施法失败。

  • 材料（操作）
  • 姿势（操作）
  • 言语（专注）
  • 器具（操作）

被扰乱与失去的法术 某些能力与法术可以扰乱一个法术，使其没有效果并失去。当你失去一个法术时，你已经消耗了法术位，支付了该法术的代价并花费了动作，而且已经使用了施法（行动）。如果一个法术在 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{维持法术} 动作期间被扰乱，该法术立即结束。

You cast a spell you have prepared or in your repertoire. Casting a Spell is a special activity that takes a variable number of actions depending on the spell, as listed in each spell's stat block. As soon as the spellcasting actions are complete, the spell effect occurs.

Some spells are cast as a reaction or free action. In those cases, you Cast the Spell as a reaction or free action (as appropriate) instead of as an activity. Such cases will be noted in the spell's stat block-for example, "[reaction] verbal."

Long Casting Times Some spells take minutes or hours to cast. The Cast a Spell activity for these spells includes a mix of the listed spell components, but it's not necessary to break down which one you're providing at a given time. You can't use other actions or reactions while casting such a spell, though at the GM's discretion, you might be able to speak a few sentences. As with other activities that take a long time, these spells have the exploration trait, and you can't cast them in an encounter. If combat breaks out while you're casting one, your spell is disrupted.

Spell Components Each spell lists the spell components required to cast it after the action icons or text, such as "[three-actions] material, somatic, verbal." The spell components, described in detail below, add traits and requirements to the Cast a Spell activity. If you can't provide the components, you fail to Cast the Spell.

  • Material (manipulate)
  • Somatic (manipulate)
  • Verbal (concentrate)
  • Focus (manipulate)

Disrupted and Lost Spells Some abilities and spells can disrupt a spell, causing it to have no effect and be lost. When you lose a spell, you've already expended the spell slot, spent the spell's costs and actions, and used the Cast a Spell activity. If a spell is disrupted during a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{Sustain a Spell} action, the spell immediately ends.

Arcane Focus Spells.name:
奥术专注法术
Arcane Focus Spells

Hand of the Apprentice.name:
学徒之手
Hand of the Apprentice
Hand of the Apprentice.description:
你利用魔法最根本的教训之一来使你的武器悬浮并推进它。你将一把你正持握且受训的近战武器掷向目标，进行一次法术攻击掷骰。成功时，你如同以一次近战打击命中一样造成该武器的伤害，但在伤害中加入你的施法能力调整值，而非你的力量调整值。大成功或大失败时，你造成双倍伤害，并加入该武器的致命专精效果。无论结果如何，武器都会飞回你这里并回到你的手中。

You take advantage of one of the most fundamental lessons of magic to levitate and propel your weapon. You hurl a held melee weapon with which you are trained at the target, making a spell attack roll. On a success, you deal the weapon's damage as if you had hit with a melee Strike, but adding your spellcasting ability modifier to damage, rather than your Strength modifier. On a critical success, you deal double damage, and you add the weapon's critical specialization effect. Regardless of the outcome, the weapon flies back to you and returns to your hand.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name:
奥术准备法术
Arcane Prepared Spells

Caustic Blast.name:
腐蚀爆发
Caustic Blast
Caustic Blast.description:
你掷出一大团酸液并立刻引爆，喷溅附近的生物。区域内的生物受到1d8酸蚀伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免；在大成功或大失败时，该生物还会受到@Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]]伤害。

强化（+2） 初始伤害提高1d8，且在大成功或大失败时的持续伤害提高1。

You fling a large glob of acid that immediately detonates, spraying nearby creatures. Creatures in the area take 1d8 acid damage with a basic Reflex save; on a critical failure, the creature also takes @Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]] damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a critical failure increases by 1.

Detect Magic.name:
侦测魔法
Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以探测魔法的存在。除魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何其他信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。你只有在该幻术魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术的位阶时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

强化（3环）你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的位阶或等级，由GM裁定。

强化（4环）同3环，但你还会锁定最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5英尺立方体范围内（或若其大于该范围，则为最近的那个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Electric Arc.name:
电弧
Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跃向另一个目标。每个目标受到2d4电击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. Each target takes 2d4 electricity damage with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Light.name:
光
Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光球，以你选择的颜色在20英尺半径内发出明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内为昏暗光照）。如果你在与一名自愿生物相同的空间内创造这束光，你可以将光附着在该生物上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮在其附近。你可以维持该法术以将光移动至多60英尺；你可以将其附着到一个生物上或从一个生物上解除附着，作为此次移动的一部分。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在已经有四个光法术处于生效状态时施放该法术，你必须选择一个现有法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光}

升阶（4环） 该光球在60英尺半径内发光（并在接下来的60英尺内为昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Shield.name:
盾牌
Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一道魔法力场护盾。这算作用了“举盾”动作，使你在下个回合开始前获得+1 AC环境加值，但不需要空出一只手来使用。

在该法术生效期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} 反应动作（）。该护盾的硬度为5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作（）来减少来自任何法术或魔法效果的伤害，即使其不造成物理伤害也可以。在你使用Shield Block后，该法术结束，并且你在10分钟内无法再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

升阶（+2） 该护盾的硬度增加5。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Breathe Fire.name:
吐息喷火
Breathe Fire
Breathe Fire.description:
一股火焰从你口中喷涌而出。你对区域内的生物造成2d6火焰伤害，目标需进行一次基础反射豁免。

强化（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

A gout of flame sprays from your mouth. You deal 2d6 fire damage to creatures in the area with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Force Barrage.name:
力场弹幕
Force Barrage
Force Barrage.description:
你向一个你能看见的生物发射一枚凝结的魔法碎片。它会自动命中并造成 1d4+1 点力场伤害。你在施放法术时每额外使用 1 个动作，就将你发射的碎片数量增加 1 枚，至多在使用 3 个动作时发射 3 枚碎片。你为每一枚碎片分别选择其目标。如果你将多于一枚碎片射向同一个目标，在应用对伤害的加值或减值、抗力、弱点等之前，先将伤害合并。

升阶（+2） 你每花费 1 个动作，就额外发射 1 枚碎片。

You fire a shard of solidified magic toward a creature that you can see. It automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage. For each additional action you use when Casting the Spell, increase the number of shards you shoot by one, to a maximum of three shards for 3 actions. You choose the target for each shard individually. If you shoot more than one shard at the same target, combine the damage before applying bonuses or penalties to damage, resistances, weaknesses, and so forth.

Heightened (+2) You fire one additional shard with each action you spend.

Grim Tendrils.name:
阴森触须
Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
黑暗的卷须从你的指尖蜷曲而出，穿过空气疾驰。你对直线范围内的活体生物造成2d4虚空伤害和@Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]]伤害。直线范围内的每个活体生物都必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半虚空伤害，且不承受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物承受全部伤害。

大成功或大失败 该生物承受双倍虚空伤害和双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶 (+1) 虚空伤害增加2d4，持续流血伤害增加1。

Tendrils of darkness curl out from your fingertips and race through the air. You deal 2d4 void damage and @Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]] damage to living creatures in the line. Each living creature in the line must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half the void damage and no persistent bleed damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double void damage and double persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+1) The void damage increases by 2d4, and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1.

Staff.name:
法杖
Staff
Staff.description:
这根长木棍既能辅助行走，也能造成沉重一击。

This long piece of wood can aid in walking and deliver a mighty blow.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳背包而不是背在背上，它的负载为轻型而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水袋大约包含足够一名小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和火镰在你有足够时代去引燃火花时能用来生火，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常过于耗费时代而不实用。即便在理想条件下，用燧石和火镰点燃火焰也需要至少使用 3 动作，而且往往要更久得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它也可以作为一把临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Grappling Hook.name:
抓钩
Grappling Hook
Grappling Hook.description:
你可以掷出一把系着绳索的抓钩来让攀爬更容易。要固定抓钩，用你的简易武器熟练度进行一次远程攻击掷骰，对抗一个取决于目标的DC，通常至少为DC 20。此次攻击具有秘密（特征）。成功时，你的抓钩牢牢钩住；但在大失败时，抓钩看起来似乎能钩住，实际上会在你爬到一半时掉落

You can throw a grappling hook with a rope tied to it to make a climb easier. To anchor a grappling hook, make a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your hook has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the hook seems like it will hold but actually falls when you're partway up

Marvelous Miniature (Ladder).name:
奇妙微缩模型（梯子）
Marvelous Miniature (Ladder)
Marvelous Miniature (Ladder).description:
启动 1（操作）

每个奇妙微缩模型都是某个真实生物或物体的异常微小复制品。该模型由木头、白镴或其他简单材料制成，并在复制品底座的底面刻有一道符文。奇妙微缩模型有时会被打包在一起；例如，露营套组包含小船、营火与马匹模型。启动奇妙微缩模型会使其变形为另一种生物或物体，随后就可以像正常使用该物体一样使用它。每个模型只能启动一次，其中大多数会永久变成其描述中的物品。

启动时，该模型永久变形为一把长20英尺的木梯。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Every marvelous miniature is an exceptionally small replica of a real creature or object. The miniature is made from wood, pewter, or other simple materials, and features a rune etched into the underside of the replica's base. Marvelous miniatures sometimes come packaged together; for example, the camping set features the boat, campfire, and horse miniatures. Activating a marvelous miniature causes it to transform into another creature or object, which then can be used as normal for that object. Each miniature can be activated only once, with most of them permanently becoming the item in their description.

When activated, this miniature transforms permanently into a 20-foot-long wooden ladder.

Writing Set.name:
书写套装
Writing Set
Writing Set.description:
使用书写工具套装，你可以起草信件并抄写卷轴。套装包括文具，其中包括各种纸张和羊皮纸，以及墨水、羽毛笔或蘸水笔、封蜡和一个简单的印章。若你写了大量文字，你可以用额外的墨水和纸张补充你的套装。

Using a writing set, you can draft correspondence and scribe scrolls. A set includes stationery, including a variety of paper and parchment, as well as ink, a quill or inkpen, sealing wax, and a simple seal. If you've written a large amount, you can refill your kit with extra ink and paper.

Spellbook (Blank).name:
法术书（空白）
Spellbook (Blank)
Spellbook (Blank).description:
一本法术书保存着学习和准备各种法术所必需的书面知识，这对法师而言是必需品（他们通常会免费获得一本），对于其他施法者而言，则是在想要学习额外法术时很有用的奢侈品。每本法术书最多可容纳100个法术。所列的价格是空白法术书的价格。

A spellbook holds the written knowledge necessary to learn and prepare various spells, a necessity for wizards (who typically get one for free) and a useful luxury for other spellcasters looking to learn additional spells. Each spellbook can hold up to 100 spells. The Price listed is for a blank spellbook.

Explorer's Clothing.name:
探索者服饰
Explorer's Clothing
Explorer's Clothing.description:
不穿护甲的冒险者会穿着耐用的衣物进行旅行。虽然它不是护甲并使用你的无甲防御熟练度，但它仍然有敏捷上限，并且如果刻有强效符文，仍可给予AC物品加值。

Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with potency runes.

Wayfinder.name:
寻路徽章
Wayfinder
Wayfinder.description:
许可 开拓者协会成员

这个小巧的罗盘将远古科技改造再利用，从名为永劫石的神秘魔法物品中汲取奇异力量。它既是开拓者协会特工的职务徽章，也是各类冒险者之间的身份象征。寻路仪可作为罗盘使用。

寻路仪中央的凹槽可容纳一颗永劫石。将永劫石置入该凹槽后，你将获得如同永劫石环绕头顶时的全部益处，但它也能保护宝石不易被注意或盗走。你同时投入一件寻路仪及其中的永劫石，并且它们在你的投入上限中仅计作一件物品。嵌入寻路仪且已投入的永劫石也会赋予其共鸣力量。

若你在同一时间身上携带不止一件带有已投入永劫石的寻路仪，它们共鸣产生的破坏性干涉会使你无法从其中任何一件获得益处。你仍可从额外环绕头顶的永劫石获得益处，只是不能通过寻路仪。

启动—光亮 A（专注）

效果 该寻路仪成为一个1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light} 法术的目标。

Access member of the Pathfinder Society

This compact compass repurposes ancient technology to draw fantastic powers from the mysterious magical items called aeon stones. It serves as a badge of office for agents of the Pathfinder Society and as a status symbol among adventurers of any stripe. A wayfinder functions as a compass.
