An indentation in the middle of the wayfinder can hold a single aeon stone. Placing an aeon stone in this indentation provides you all the benefits of having the aeon stone orbiting your head, but it protects the stone from being noticed or stolen as easily. You invest a wayfinder and the aeon stone within it simultaneously, and they count as only one item toward your investiture limit. An invested aeon stone slotted in a wayfinder also grants its resonant power.

If you have more than one wayfinder with an invested aeon stone on your person at a given time, destructive interference from their resonance prevents you from gaining benefits from any of them. You can still benefit from additional aeon stones orbiting your head, just not in wayfinders.

Activate—Light A (concentrate)

Effect The wayfinder is targeted by a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light} spell.

Elixir of Life (Minor).name:
生命灵药（次级）
Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命药剂会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用该药剂后，你恢复[[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6生命值}，并在10分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命药剂（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Minor)}

Scroll of Grim Tendrils (Rank 1).name:
阴森触须卷轴（1环）
Scroll of Grim Tendrils (Rank 1)
Scroll of Grim Tendrils (Rank 1).description:
从卷轴施放法术需要用一只手持握卷轴，并以该法术正常所需的动作数量使用一次施法（行动）来激活它。

该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放法术，使用你的法术攻击调整和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你的根源相应的特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原初）。

任何实体成本都会在制作卷轴时提供，因此你从卷轴施放时不需要再提供。如果该法术需要一个法器，你必须拥有该法器才能从卷轴施法。

注：要制作某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料集或资料集浏览器拖入PC、NPC或战利品actor的物品栏中。

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when casting from a scroll. If the spell requires a locus, you must have that locus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Cooperative Nature.name:
合作天性
Cooperative Nature
Cooperative Nature.description:
人类短暂的寿命赋予你更广阔的视角，并从小教会你搁置分歧、与他人合作以成就伟业。你在协助的检定上获得+4环境加值。

The short human life span lends perspective and has taught you from a young age to set aside differences and work with others to achieve greatness. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus on checks to Aid.

Skilled Human (Society).name:
熟练的人类（社交）
Skilled Human (Society)
Skilled Human (Society).description:
你的聪颖使你能够训练各种各样的技能。你在你选择的一个技能上成为受训。到第5等级时，你在所选技能上成为专家。

Your ingenuity allows you to train in a wide variety of skills. You become trained in one skill of your choice. At 5th level, you become an expert in the chosen skill.

Witch Cult Lore.name:
女巫教团学识
Witch Cult Lore

Human.name:
人类
Human
Human.description:
如同格拉利昂的任何族群一样难以预料且多种多样，人类拥有非凡的动力，以及忍耐与拓展的能力。尽管在人类崛起并取得显赫地位之前，许多文明便已繁荣昌盛，但人类在历史长河中建立了一些最伟大、也最可怕的社会；而在今天，他们是内海周边诸国中人口最多的族群。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{人类}

As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand. Though many civilizations thrived before humanity rose to prominence, humans have built some of the greatest and the most terrible societies throughout the course of history, and today they are the most populous people in the realms around the Inner Sea.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{Human}

Cultist.name:
邪教徒
Cultist
Cultist.description:
你曾经（或仍然）是某个邪教的成员，其仪式可能包括神圣的舞蹈以确保丰收，或是召唤黑暗力量的可怕仪式。你可能为了推进邪教的目标而投身冒险，为了让自己入门这世间更宏大的奥秘，或为了逃离不光彩的行径或严苛的戒律。

选择两项属性提升。其中一项必须给智力或魅力，另一项为自由属性提升。

你受训于神秘技能，以及一项与你的神祇或邪教相关的学识（技能）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lEgYzFHransLkSvI]{受过秘密训练}技能专长。

You were (or still are) a member of a cult whose rites may involve sacred dances to ensure a strong harvest or dire rituals that call upon dark powers. You might have taken up adventuring to further your cult's aims, to initiate yourself into the world's grander mysteries, or to flee unsavory practices or strictures.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Intelligence or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Occultism skill and a Lore skill related to your deity or cult. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lEgYzFHransLkSvI]{Schooled In Secrets} skill feat.

Schooled In Secrets.name:
受训于秘密
Schooled In Secrets
Schooled In Secrets.description:
你会注意到神秘教团成员和其他秘密社团用来向同伴宣示其隶属关系的迹象与符号。你可以用奥秘学代替外交来对这类团体进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{搜集情报}，也可以用奥秘学代替欺瞒来冒充这些团体的成员。

如果你属于某个秘密教派、会所、宗派或类似组织，除非他们明确试图对你隐藏自身存在，否则你会自动识别出你团体的成员。除非你明确隐藏自己的地位，否则他们也会识别出你的地位。

You notice the signs and symbols that members of mystery cults and other secret societies use to declare their affiliation to fellow members. You can use Occultism in place of Diplomacy to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information} about such groups and in place of Deception to Impersonate a member of these groups.

If you belong to a secret cult, lodge, sect, or similar organization, you automatically recognize members of your group unless they are specifically attempting to conceal their presence from you. They also recognize your standing unless you are specifically concealing it.

Witch.name:
女巫
Witch
Witch.description:
你并非通过研习或对任何理想的虔诚来驾驭强大的魔法，而是作为某位神秘异界庇护者的容器或代理人——就连你自己也无法完全理解这位庇护者。这个存在可能是一位隐秘的神祇、一位强大的精类、自然能量的具现、一位远古灵体，或任何其他强大的超自然存在——但它的本质对你而言很可能与对其他任何人一样神秘。通过一只特殊的魔宠，你的庇护者赐予你多样的法术与强力的妖术，任你使用，但你永远无法确定这些馈赠最终是否会服务于庇护者更宏大的计划。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.fYJruhQfzs4dj0mp]{女巫}

You command powerful magic, not through study or devotion to any ideal, but as a vessel or agent for a mysterious, otherworldly patron that even you don't entirely understand. This entity might be a covert divinity, a powerful fey, a manifestation of natural energies, an ancient spirit, or any other mighty supernatural being-but its nature is likely as much a mystery to you as it is to anyone else. Through a special familiar, your patron grants you versatile spells and powerful hexes to use as you see fit, though you're never certain if these gifts will end up serving your patron's larger plan.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.fYJruhQfzs4dj0mp]{Witch}

Patron.name:
守护者
Patron
Patron.description:
你并非天生就拥有施放法术的力量，也未曾花费多年专注于崇拜、研习或揭开神秘的秘密。相反，你的魔法是由一位强大的存在赐予你的；祂知道通过如此赋能于你，你将会在世上推进该存在的计划，无论那计划是什么。这个实体通常神秘而疏离，很少透露其身份与动机。祂会以预兆、梦境或类似的微妙方式等抽象征兆向你昭示其意志，而非以言语。

你的宗主并不直接与你互动，而是通过一只魔宠行事——这是一种神秘的生物，它教导你，作为你宗主魔法的导管，并且或许还会监视你，以确保你正在推进你宗主那些难以捉摸的目的。

在第1等级时，选择你的宗主，这将决定你的施法根源，并赋予你该魔法根源的技能、你的第一个女巫教诲以及一种独特的魔宠能力。

You weren't born with the power to cast spells, nor have you spent years dedicated to worship, study, or uncovering mystical secrets. Your magic instead has been gifted to you by a potent being, one who knows that by empowering you so, you'll further the being's agenda in the world, whatever it may be. This entity is typically mysterious and distant, revealing little of their identity and motivations. They make their will known to you in abstract signs such as omens, dreams, or similar subtleties rather than words.

Rather than interacting with you directly, your patron works through a familiar—a mystical creature that teaches you, serves as the conduit for your patron's magic, and maybe even keeps an eye on you to ensure you're furthering your patron's nebulous ends.

At 1st level, choose your patron, which determines your spellcasting tradition and grants you the skill for that tradition of magic, your first witch's lesson and a unique familiar ability.

Familiar (Witch).name:
魔宠（女巫）
Familiar (Witch)
Familiar (Witch).description:
你的守护灵派来了一只魔宠，一种会教导你魔法并协助你施放法术的神秘生物。这只魔宠遵循魔宠的规则，不过由于它是你与守护灵之间的直接导管，它比典型的魔宠更强大。你的魔宠获得两个额外的魔宠能力：其中一个是基于你守护灵的独特能力，并且总是被选取；另一个则是一个额外的魔宠能力，可如常在每日选择。你的魔宠在第6、第12和第18等级时各再获得一个额外能力。

法术：你的魔宠是守护灵赐予你之法术的来源与储存之所，并且你必须与魔宠沟通，才能每日使用你的女巫施法来准备你的法术。你的魔宠起初知道10个戏法、五个1环法术，以及1个由你守护灵的初始课业决定的额外法术。你从由守护灵决定的根源之通用法术中选择这些法术，或从该根源中你获得许可的其他法术中选择。每当你获得一个等级，你的守护灵会教导你的魔宠两个任意环位的新法术（只要你拥有该环位的法术位），从你根源的通用法术或你获得许可的其他法术中选择。专长也能赋予你的魔宠额外法术。

学习法术：你的魔宠可以独立于守护灵学习新法术。它可以在1小时内通过物理性吞食该法术的书面版本，来学习你根源法术列表上的任何法术。这可以是该法术的卷轴，或者你也可以使用“学习法术”探索行动来准备一个书面版本。你与魔宠可以使用“学习法术”行动，从另一位女巫的魔宠处教导你的魔宠一个法术。两只魔宠必须在整个行动期间都在场，该法术必须在你施法根源的法术列表上，并且你必须支付该行动的通常费用，通常以向另一只魔宠的守护灵献祭的形式。你无法从另一位女巫的魔宠处准备法术。

不灭：如果你的魔宠死亡，你的守护灵会在你下一次每日准备期间替换它。新的魔宠可能是你先前魔宠的复制体或转世，也可能是全新的个体，但无论如何，它都知晓你先前魔宠所知的相同法术。你的魔宠之死不会影响你已经准备好的任何法术。

Your patron has sent you a familiar, a mystical creature that teaches you magic and facilitates your spells. This familiar follows the rules for familiars, though as it's a direct conduit between you and your patron, it's more powerful than typical familiars. Your familiar gains two additional familiar abilities: one of these is a unique ability based on your patron and is always selected, and the other is an additional familiar ability that can be selected daily as normal. Your familiar gains another extra ability at 6th, 12th, and 18th levels.

Spells: Your familiar is the source and repository of the spells your patron has bestowed upon you, and you must commune with your familiar to prepare your spells each day using your witch spellcasting. Your familiar starts off knowing 10 cantrips, five 1st-rank spells, and one additional spell determined by your patron's initial lesson. You choose these spells from the common spells of the tradition determined by your patron or from other spells of that tradition you gain access to. Each time you gain a level, your patron teaches your familiar two new spells of any rank for which you have spell slots, chosen from common spells of your tradition or others you gain access to. Feats can also grant your familiar additional spells.

Learning Spells: Your familiar can learn new spells independently of your patron. It can learn any spell on your tradition's spell list by physically consuming a written version of that spell over the course of 1 hour. This can be a scroll of that spell, or you can prepare a written version using the Learn a Spell exploration activity. You and your familiar can use the Learn a Spell activity to teach your familiar a spell from another witch's familiar. Both familiars must be present for the entirety of the activity, the spell must be on your spellcasting tradition's spell list, and you must pay the usual cost for that activity, typically in the form of an offering to the other familiar's patron. You can't prepare spells from another witch's familiar.

Undying: If your familiar dies, your patron replaces it during your next daily preparations. The new familiar might be a duplicate or reincarnation of your former familiar or a new entity altogether, but it knows the same spells your former familiar knew regardless. Your familiar's death doesn't affect any spells you have already prepared.

Hex Spells.name:
妖术法术
Hex Spells
Hex Spells.description:
作为你守护者偏爱的代理人，你可以祈唤其力量以获得更直接的魔法干预。巫咒是一种由你的守护者塑形并通过你的魔宠传递给你的法术，而不是你直接使用的一项能力。你的守护者期望你推进其利益，并不会善待反复请求援助的行为；因此，你每个回合只能使用一个巫咒，任何试图在该回合使用第二个巫咒的行为都会失败且动作会被浪费。

巫咒法术是一种聚能法术。施放一个聚能法术需要花费1点聚能点，而你起始拥有1点聚能点的聚能池。你在每日准备期间补满你的聚能池，并且你可以花费10分钟使用再聚能（行动）与魔宠共鸣以恢复1点聚能点。

聚能法术会自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整），与戏法相似。聚能法术不需要法术位，而且你不能使用法术位来施放它们。某些专长会给予你更多聚能法术。你的聚能池所能容纳的最大聚能点数等于你拥有的聚能法术数量，但绝不会超过3点。

你学习你选择的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aq1yonHeYpbaj3XI]{Patron's Puppet}巫咒或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rMOI8JFJ0nT2mrCF]{Phase Familiar}巫咒，它们分别让你指挥你的魔宠或保护它免受伤害。你从女巫课业中学习大多数其他巫咒。

巫咒戏法

巫咒戏法是特殊的巫咒，不消耗聚能点，因此你可以想施放多少次就施放多少次，不过你每轮仍然只能使用一个巫咒。巫咒戏法是你通过女巫施法所选择的戏法之外的额外戏法，并且不计入你已准备的戏法之中。

你获得一个由你所选择的守护者决定的巫咒戏法。

As a favored agent of your patron, you can invoke their power for a more direct magical intervention. A hex is a spell shaped by your patron and sent to you through your familiar, rather than an ability you use directly. Your patron expects you to advance its interests and does not take kindly to repeated requests for aid; as such, you can use only one hex each turn, and any attempts to use a second hex on that turn fail and the actions are lost.

Hex spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to commune with your familiar.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Certain feats give you more focus spells. The maximum Focus Points your focus pool can hold is equal to the number of focus spells you have, but it can never be more than 3 points.

You learn your choice of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aq1yonHeYpbaj3XI]{Patron's Puppet} hex or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rMOI8JFJ0nT2mrCF]{Phase Familiar} hex, which let you command your familiar or defend it from harm, respectively. You learn most other hexes from witch lessons.

Hex Cantrips

Hex cantrips are special hexes that don't cost Focus Points, so you can cast them as often as you like, though you can still use only one hex each round. Hex cantrips are in addition to the cantrips you choose with witch spellcasting and aren't counted toward your prepared cantrips.

You gain a hex cantrip determined by your choice of patron.

Witch Spellcasting.name:
女巫法术施放
Witch Spellcasting
Witch Spellcasting.description:
以你的魔宠作为导管，你的守护者赋予你施放法术的力量。你是一名施法者，并且你可以使用施法（行动）施放你守护者的根源的法术。作为一名女巫，当你施放法术时，你的咒语可能押韵，你的手势可能简单到只是阴森地伸出一根手指，或复杂到某种民间手势，而当守护者的魔法奔涌时，你的魔宠甚至可能轻微地回响你的言语或动作。

在1级时，你每天早晨可以从你的魔宠所知的法术中准备最多两个1环法术与五个戏法。已准备的法术会一直可供你使用，直到你将其施放，或直到你再次准备你的法术。你每天可以准备的法术数量称为你的法术位。随着你作为女巫的等级提升，你每天可以准备的法术数量会增加，你能施放的最高环阶法术也会提高，如“每日女巫法术”表所示。

你的一些法术需要你尝试进行一次法术攻击以判断其效果如何，或让你的敌人针对你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键属性是智力，你的法术攻击调整和法术DC使用你的智力调整值。

升阶法术

当你获得2环及更高环阶的法术位后，你可以用更强的低环阶法术版本来填充这些法术位。这会提高该法术的环阶，使其升阶以匹配该法术位。许多法术在升阶到特定环阶时会获得特定的增强。

戏法

你的一些法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不使用法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天任意次数。戏法总是自动升阶到你等级的一半（向上取整）——这通常等同于你拥有的最高环阶女巫法术位。举例来说，作为1级女巫，你的戏法是1环法术；作为5级女巫，你的戏法是3环法术。

Using your familiar as a conduit, your patron provides you the power to cast spells. You are a spellcaster, and you can cast spells of your patron's tradition using the Cast a Spell activity. As a witch, when you cast spells, your incantations might rhyme, your gestures might be as simple as an ominous pointing finger or a complex folk sign, and your familiar might even echo your words or movements slightly as your patron's magic surges.

At 1st level, you can prepare up to two 1st-rank spells and five cantrips each morning from the spells your familiar knows. Prepared spells remain available to you until you cast them or until you prepare your spells again. The number of spells you can prepare each day is called your spell slots. As you increase in level as a witch, the number of spells you can prepare each day increases, as does the highest rank of spell you can cast, as shown in the Witch Spells per Day table.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are, or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key attribute is Intelligence, your spell attack modifier and spell DC use your Intelligence modifier.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd-rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank, heightening it to match the spell slot. Many spells have specific improvements when they are heightened to certain ranks.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of witch spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level witch, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level witch, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

The Resentment.name:
怨恨
The Resentment
The Resentment.description:
你初次遇见你的守护主时，一种单一的情感从其身上辐射而出，如同火焰的热度般真切可感：渴望看到每一株高挺的罂粟被砍倒、每一枚骄傲的钉子被锤下去——无论这是为了正义地为小人物伸张公道，还是出于想看强者败北的卑劣冲动。你的守护主很可能远非其同类的上层阶级，例如被逐出集会的鬼婆（特征）、半神般的存在或低阶恶魔。这使它只能依靠更隐晦、更弱小的手段来达成目的：诅咒、妖术，以及你。

法术列表 occult

守护主技能 神秘学

力量无常课训 你的守护主教导你，夺取力量远比建立力量容易得多。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f45JpY7Ph2cAJGW2]{Evil Eye} 妖术戏法，而你的魔宠学会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J7Y7tl0bbdz7TcCc]{Enfeeble}。

延续苦难之魔宠 你的魔宠似乎对除你之外的一切生物都怀有敌意；若它们靠得太近，它便会对其嘶嘶作响。当你施放或维持一个妖术时，你的魔宠可以诅咒其15尺内的一个生物，使影响它的任何负面状态的持续时间延长1轮。这是一个诅咒效果。此延长仅适用于具有计时持续时间的状态（例如“1轮”或“直到你的下个回合结束”），并且不会阻止状态通过其他方式被移除。

A single feeling radiated from your patron in the moment you met them, as palpable as heat from a fire: the desire to see every tall poppy felled and every proud nail hammered down, whether to righteously bring justice for small folk or the base urge to see the powerful defeated. Your patron is likely far from the upper echelons of its kind, such as a hag ousted from its coven or a quasi-divinity or a lower-rank demon. This leaves it only subtler and weaker tools to see its ends met: curses, hexes, and you.

Spell List occult

Patron Skill Occultism

Lesson of Strength's Impermanence Your patron has taught you that power can be taken much more easily that it can be built. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f45JpY7Ph2cAJGW2]{Evil Eye} hex cantrip and your familiar learns @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J7Y7tl0bbdz7TcCc]{Enfeeble}.

Familiar of Ongoing Misery Your familiar seems hostile to all creatures other than you, hissing at them if they get too near. When you Cast or Sustain a hex, your familiar can curse a creature within 15 feet of it, prolonging the duration of any negative conditions affecting it by 1 round. This is a curse effect. This prolongs only conditions with a timed duration (such as "1 round" or "until the end of your next turn") and doesn't prevent conditions from being removed by other means.

Natural Ambition.name:
天生抱负
Natural Ambition
Natural Ambition.description:
你从小被培养得雄心勃勃，总是要触及星辰，使你在所选择的领域中进步迅速。你获得一个你职业的1级职业专长。你必须满足先决条件，但你可以在创建角色流程的后期再选择该专长，以便确定你满足哪些先决条件。

You were raised to be ambitious and always reach for the stars, leading you to progress quickly in your chosen field. You gain a 1st-level class feat for your class. You must meet the prerequisites, but you can select the feat later in the character creation process in order to determine which prerequisites you meet.

Cackle.name:
咯咯笑
Cackle
Cackle.description:
伴随着一阵短促的笑声，你延长你所创造的一个魔法效果。你维持一个法术。

With a quick burst of laughter, you prolong a magical effect you created. You Sustain a spell.

Occult Focus Spells.name:
神秘专注法术
Occult Focus Spells

Evil Eye.name:
邪眼
Evil Eye
Evil Eye.description:
你守护者的怨恨显化为一道凶恶而嫉妒的凝视。若目标意志豁免失败，它将变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（大失败则为恶心 2）。当法术持续期间且你能看见目标时，此状态数值不能被降低至 1 以下。

Your patron's resentment manifests in a baleful, envious gaze. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} if it fails a Will save (or sickened 2 on a critical failure). This condition value can't be reduced below 1 while the spell is active and you can see the target.

Phase Familiar.name:
相位魔宠
Phase Familiar
Phase Familiar.description:
触发 你的魔宠将要受到伤害。

你的守护灵会短暂地将你的魔宠召回至以太之中，使其从坚实的物理形态转变为自身的幽魂版本。针对该次触发的伤害，你的魔宠获得对所有伤害的抗力 5，并且免疫精准伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.61Hl31nyzt63vvX9]{法术效果：相位魔宠}

升阶 (+1) 将抗力提高 2。

Trigger Your familiar would take damage.

Your patron momentarily recalls your familiar to the ether, shifting it from its solid, physical form into a ghostly version of itself. Against the triggering damage, your familiar gains resistance 5 to all damage and is immune to precision damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.61Hl31nyzt63vvX9]{Spell Effect: Phase Familiar}

Heightened (+1) Increase the resistance by 2.

Occult Prepared Spells.name:
玄秘预备法术
Occult Prepared Spells

Daze.name:
恍惚
Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的心智，并用精神冲击使其恍惚。该冲击造成1d6精神伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标在豁免中大失败，它还会受到 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

强化（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You push into the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals 1d6 mental damage, with a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Detect Magic.name:
侦测魔法
Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，登记魔法的存在。除了魔法的存在或不存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。你只会在该魔法的效果的阶位低于你的侦测魔法法术的阶位时，侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常会被正常侦测到。

强化（3环）你得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的阶位或等级，由GM决定。

强化（4环）同3环，但你也能精确定位最高阶位魔法的来源。与模糊感官相同，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5英尺立方体内（若来源大于此范围，则缩小到最近的等效范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Forbidding Ward.name:
禁制结界
Forbidding Ward
Forbidding Ward.description:
你保护一名盟友，使其免受目标敌人的攻击和敌对法术。目标盟友获得+1状态加值，适用于对抗目标敌人的攻击、法术及其他效果的护甲等级与豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{法术效果：禁制守护}

升阶（6环）该状态加值提升至+2。

You ward an ally against the attacks and hostile spells from the target enemy. The target ally gains a +1 status bonus to Armor Class and saving throws against the target enemy's attacks, spells, and other effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{Spell Effect: Forbidding Ward}

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +2.

Light.name:
光照
Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光之球体，在你选择的颜色中，散发出以20英尺为半径的明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照）。如果你在一个自愿的生物的同一空间内创造该光，你可以将光附着在该生物上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮在其附近。你可以维持该法术以将光移动至多60英尺；你可以将其附着到一个生物上或从一个生物上分离，作为该次移动的一部分。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在已经有四个light法术生效时施放该法术，你必须选择一个现有法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮}

升阶（4环） 该球体以60英尺为半径散发光照（并在接下来的60英尺内提供昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Shield.name:
盾牌
Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一道魔法力场护盾。这视为使用“举起盾牌”动作，使你在下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 环境加值，但无需占用一只手来使用。

在法术效果持续期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡} 反应动作（）。该护盾具有 硬度 5。你可以使用此法术的反应动作（）来减少任何法术或魔法效果造成的伤害，即使其不造成物理伤害亦可。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内不能再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾免疫}

升阶 (+2) 护盾的 硬度 增加 5。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Telekinetic Projectile.name:
念动力投射物
Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你投掷一个在射程内、无人持用且负载为1或更少的松散物体，对该目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若命中，你造成2d6钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——以你投掷的物体所适用的伤害类型为准。被投掷物品的任何特定特质或魔法属性都不会影响该攻击或该伤害。

大成功或大失败 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal 2d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage--as appropriate for the object you hurled. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Prestidigitation.name:
戏法
Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的差遣。只要你维持该法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持该法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹调 冷却、加热或调味1磅非生物材料。
  • 提起 缓慢地 将一件无人看管且负载为轻或更低的物体从地面提起1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一件临时物体，其负载可忽略，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体看起来粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——它不能被用作工具、武器或法器，也不能作为法术的耗材或代价。
  • 整理 给一件负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以以10轮专注影响一件负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则每点负载需要1分钟。

魔法伎俩 无法造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（超出上述所述者）仅在你维持该法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the spell. Each time you Sustain the spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or locus or cost for a spell.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the spell.

Read Aura.name:
读取灵光
Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在目标物体上，敞开心扉以感知魔法灵光。施法完成后，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法。你或任何你就灵光给予建议的人，都会在该物品上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{鉴定魔法}时获得+2环境加值。若该物体是幻象，只有当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光法术的环级时，你才能侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环） 你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Sigil.name:
魔符
Sigil
Sigil.description:
你无害地将自己独特的魔法印记（体型约为1平方英寸）置于作为目标的生物或物体上。该印记可以是可见或不可见的，你可以通过使用一个交互动作来接触目标，将其从一种状态切换为另一种状态。该印记可以通过5分钟的擦洗或刮除工作被去除。如果它在生物身上，它会在一周的过程中自然褪去。印记褪去前的时间会随着你升阶的等级而增加。

升阶（3环） 该印记改为在1个月后褪去。

升阶（5环） 该印记改为在1年后褪去。

升阶（7环） 该印记永不褪去。

You harmlessly place your unique magical sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on the targeted creature or object. The mark can be visible or invisible, and you can change it from one state to another by using an Interact action to touch the target. The mark can be scrubbed or scraped off with 5 minutes of work. If it's on a creature, it fades naturally over the course of a week. The time before the mark fades increases depending on your heightened level.

Heightened (3rd) The sigil instead fades after 1 month.

Heightened (5th) The sigil instead fades after 1 year.

Heightened (7th) The sigil never fades.

Charm.name:
魅惑
Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻的薄雾之中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解除该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的行动与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能可以通过世俗手段说服目标继续与你为友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知晓你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害之物而非魅惑，除非它识别出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly}。若它原本为Friendly，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为Helpful，并且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备，且你可以以至多10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Ill Omen.name:
恶兆
Ill Omen
Ill Omen.description:
目标被不幸击中，使其失去平衡。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 在持续时间内目标首次尝试进行一次攻击掷骰或技能检定时，它必须掷骰两次并使用较差的结果。

大成功或大失败 失败 在持续时间内每次目标尝试进行一次攻击掷骰或技能检定时，它必须掷骰两次并使用较差的结果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.AmsVO5Q6078mEvNt]{法术效果：恶兆}

The target is struck with misfortune, which throws it off balance. The target must attempt a Will save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The first time during the duration that the target attempts an attack roll or skill check, it must roll twice and use the worse result.

Critical Failure Every time during the duration that the target attempts an attack roll or skill check, it must roll twice and use the worse result.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.AmsVO5Q6078mEvNt]{Spell Effect: Ill Omen}

Phantom Pain.name:
魅影痛苦
Phantom Pain
Phantom Pain.description:
幻痛折磨着目标，造成2d4精神伤害以及[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]]伤害。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受全部初始伤害但不承受持续伤害，且该法术立即结束。

失败 目标承受全部初始伤害与持续伤害，且目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心1}。若目标从恶心中恢复，则持续伤害结束且该法术结束。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心2}。

高度强化（+1） 伤害增加2d4，持续伤害增加1d4。

Illusory pain wracks the target, dealing 2d4 mental damage and [[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]] damage. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes full initial damage but no persistent damage, and the spell ends immediately.

Failure The target takes full initial and persistent damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. If the target recovers from being Sickened, the persistent damage ends and the spell ends.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d4 and the persistent damage by 1d4.

Enfeeble.name:
虚弱
Enfeeble
Enfeeble.description:
你削弱目标的力量，效果取决于其强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} 直到你下一回合开始。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} 持续 1 分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} 持续 1 分钟。

You sap the target's strength, depending on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} for 1 minute.

Pet Cache.name:
宠物收容术
Pet Cache
Pet Cache.description:
你打开斗篷或用双手制造一道缝隙，将目标拉入一个口袋维度，该维度刚好足以满足其基本舒适。没有其他生物可以进入这个异次元空间，且目标只能携带那些为其种类的生物设计为可穿戴的物品。该空间拥有足够的空气、食物和水，以在持续时间内维持目标。

你可以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AjLSHZSWQ90exdLo]{Dismiss} 该法术。若你死亡或进入一个异次元空间，该法术也会结束。当法术结束时，目标会在最近的未占据空间中重新出现（在你可能进入的任何异次元空间之外）。

You open your cloak or create a gap with your hands, drawing the target into a pocket dimension just large enough for its basic comfort. No other creature can enter this extradimensional space, and the target can bring along objects only if they were designed to be worn by a creature of its kind. The space has enough air, food, and water to sustain the target for the duration.

You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AjLSHZSWQ90exdLo]{Dismiss} the spell. The spell also ends if you die or enter an extradimensional space. When the spell ends, the target reappears in the nearest unoccupied space (outside of any extradimensional space you may have entered).

Soothe.name:
安抚
Soothe
Soothe.description:
你抚慰目标的心灵，强化其精神防御并治疗其伤势。当你施放法术时，目标恢复 1d10+4 生命值，并在持续时间内对抗精神效果的豁免获得+2状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{法术效果：抚慰}

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加 1d10+4。

You grace the target's mind, boosting its mental defenses and healing its wounds. The target regains 1d10+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell and gains a +2 status bonus to saves against mental effects for the duration.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{Spell Effect: Soothe}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d10+4.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳该背包，而不是把它背在背上，那么它的负载为轻型而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水袋大约能装下供一名小型或中型生物饮用1天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石与打火钢在你有足够时代去捕捉火花时可用于生火，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗费时代而不太实用。即使在理想条件下，用燧石与打火钢点燃火焰也至少需要使用 3 个动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一根火把在20尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为一把临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Crossbow.name:
弩
Crossbow
Crossbow.description:
这种远程武器在称为弩柄的握柄框架上安装了类似弓的组件。弩柄有一种将弓弦锁定到位的机构，并连接到触发机构，该机构释放张力并发射一支弩矢。

This ranged weapon has a bow-like assembly mounted on a handled frame called a tiller. The tiller has a mechanism to lock the bowstring in place, attached to a trigger mechanism that releases the tension and launches a bolt.

Dagger.name:
匕首
Dagger
Dagger.description:
这种小型刃器武器单手持握，用于在近身战斗中刺击生物。它也可以投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Staff.name:
长杖
Staff
Staff.description:
这根长木棍可以辅助行走，并能给予强力一击。

This long piece of wood can aid in walking and deliver a mighty blow.

Healer's Toolkit.name:
治疗者工具包
Healer's Toolkit
Healer's Toolkit.description:
这套由绷带、药草和缝合工具组成的工具包，是进行医学检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{施行急救}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}所必需。如果你穿戴着你的医疗工具包，你可以将其作为使用它的动作的一部分抽出并收回。

This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. If you wear your healer's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Bolts.name:
弩矢
Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但结构相似，是弩使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Versatile Human.name:
多才人类
Versatile Human
Versatile Human.description:
人类的多才多艺与雄心壮志推动了其崛起，使其成为世界上大多数国家中最常见的族裔。在你满足先决条件的前提下，选择一个你自选的通用专长（如同你的族裔专长一样，你可以在创建角色期间的任意时点选择这个通用专长）。

Humanity's versatility and ambition have fueled its ascendance to be the most common ancestry in most nations throughout the world. Select a general feat of your choice for which you meet the prerequisites (as with your ancestry feat, you can select this general feat at any point during character creation).

Oddity Identification.name:
奇物鉴定
Oddity Identification
Oddity Identification.description:
当你意识到一个魔法效果或看见一个法术正在施放时，你可以立即判断它是否扭曲心智（具有心灵（特征））、对抗命运（具有幸运或厄运特征）、或揭示秘密（具有侦测、预言、启示或探知特征）。由GM酌情决定，类似效果也可以归入这些类别。当你用辨识魔法或回忆知识来进一步了解这些效果时，你总是可以无减值地使用秘学，并获得+2环境加值。

When you become aware of a magical effect or see a spell being cast, you can immediately determine if it twists minds (with the mental trait), fights against fortune (with the fortune or misfortune trait), or reveals secrets (with the detection, prediction, revelation, or scrying traits). At the GM's discretion, similar effects can also fall into these categories. When you Identify Magic or Recall Knowledge to learn more about these effects, you can always use Occultism without penalty and gain a +2 circumstance bonus.

Pathfinder Hopeful.name:
《开拓者希望者》
Pathfinder Hopeful
Pathfinder Hopeful.description:
前提条件 地区 - 艾巴萨罗姆与星石岛

你一直渴望加入充满冒险精神的开拓者协会。你投身于危险的冒险者生活，希望能在开拓者之中赢得一席之地。

选择两个能力提升。一个必须提升至体质或智力，另一个为自由能力提升。

你在社群（技能）与开拓者协会学识（技能）上受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 技能专长。

Prerequisite Region - Absalom and Starstone Isle

You've long wanted to join the adventurous Pathfinder Society. You have taken up the dangerous life of an adventurer in hopes of earning a spot among the Pathfinders.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Constitution or Intelligence, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Society skill and the Pathfinder Society Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat.

Additional Lore.name:
额外传闻
Additional Lore
Additional Lore.description:
你的知识已经扩展，涵盖了一个新的领域。选择一个额外的学识（技能）子类。你在其上成为受训。在3级、7级和15级时，你获得一次额外的技能提升，但只能应用于所选的学识（技能）子类。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你都必须选择一个新的学识（技能）子类，并在所列等级获得对该子类的额外技能提升。

Your knowledge has expanded to encompass a new field. Choose an additional Lore skill subcategory. You become trained in it. At 3rd, 7th, and 15th levels, you gain an additional skill increase you can apply only to the chosen Lore subcategory.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you must select a new subcategory of Lore and you gain the additional skill increases to that subcategory for the listed levels.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可装下 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是提着或收纳背包而不是把它背在背上，它的负载为轻载而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
当它装满时，一个水袋大约装有足够一名小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火镰在你有时代去捕捉火花时对生火很有用，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗费时代而不够实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火镰点燃火焰也需要至少使用 3 动作，而且通常会显著更久。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Formula Book (Blank).name:
配方簿（空白）
Formula Book (Blank)
Formula Book (Blank).description:
一本配方簿装有制作本章常见装备之外物品所需的配方；炼金术士（职业）的角色通常会免费获得一本。每本配方簿最多可容纳多达100种不同物品的配方。配方也可以出现在羊皮纸页、石板以及几乎任何其他媒介上；只要你能随身保留以供查阅，就没有必要将它们誊写进某一本特定的书中。

A formula book holds the formulas necessary to make items other than the common equipment from this chapter; characters of the alchemist class typically get one for free. Each formula book can hold the formulas for up to 100 different items. Formulas can also appear on parchment sheets, tablets, and almost any other medium; there's no need for you to copy them into a specific book as long as you can keep them on hand to reference them.

Lantern (Hooded).name:
提灯（带罩）
Lantern (Hooded)
Lantern (Hooded).description:
一盏提灯会提供明亮光照，并且需要 1 品脱的油才能运作 6 小时。一盏风灯在 30 英尺半径内提供光照（并在接下来的 30 英尺提供昏暗光照），并配有遮光板，你可以将其关闭来阻挡光线。关闭或打开遮光板需要一个交互动作。

A lantern sheds bright light and requires 1 pint of oil to function for 6 hours. A hooded lantern sheds light in a 30-foot radius (and dim light in the next 30 feet) and is equipped with shutters, which you can close to block the light. Closing or opening the shutters takes an Interact action.

Oil (1 pint).name:
油（1品脱）
Oil (1 pint)
Oil (1 pint).description:
你可以用油为提灯提供燃料，但你也可以点燃一品脱油并将其投掷出去。你必须先花费一个交互动作来准备油，然后再用另一个动作以远程攻击将其投掷。如果你命中，它会溅在该生物身上，或溅在你所选为目标的一个5尺方格内。你必须成功通过一次@Check[type:flat|dc:10]，以使油在命中时成功点燃。如果油被点燃，目标受到@Damage[1d6[fire]]伤害。

You can use oil to fuel lanterns, but you can also set a pint of oil aflame and throw it. You must first spend an Interact action preparing the oil, then throw it with another action as a ranged attack. If you hit, it splatters on the creature or in a single 5-foot square you target. You must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:10] for the oil to ignite successfully when it hits. If the oil ignites, the target takes @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage.

Repair Toolkit.name:
修理工具包
Repair Toolkit
Repair Toolkit.description:
修理工具包让你在旅行时进行简单的修理。它包含一块便携铁砧、一把钳子、木工工具、一块磨刀石，以及用于保养皮革和木材的油。你可以使用修理工具包用手艺（技能）对物品进行修理。你可以在使用它的动作中抽出并收回已穿戴的修理工具包。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Leather Armor.name:
皮甲
Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与成型的煮皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时保持最大灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Dogslicer.name:
狗切刀
Dogslicer
Dogslicer.description:
这种短小、弯曲且粗糙的临时刀刃通常会在上面钻孔以减轻重量。它是地精偏爱的武器。

This short, curved, and crude makeshift blade often has holes drilled into it to reduce its weight. It's a favored weapon of goblins.

Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser).name:
猎豹药剂（低阶）
Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser)
Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

这瓶药剂中的酶化合物会强化并刺激你腿部的肌肉。你获得+5尺的速度状态加值，持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lNWACCNe9RYgaFxb]{效果：猎豹药剂（次等）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Enzymatic compounds in this elixir strengthen and excite the muscles in your legs. You gain a +5 foot status bonus to your Speed for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lNWACCNe9RYgaFxb]{Effect: Cheetah's Elixir (Lesser)}

Pathfinder Society Lore.name:
开拓者协会传说
Pathfinder Society Lore

Goblin Weapon Familiarity.name:
地精武器熟悉
Goblin Weapon Familiarity
Goblin Weapon Familiarity.description:
他人或许会以轻蔑的目光看待它们，但你知道你族人的武器既锋利又同样有效。你接受过@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.olwngGXM3hpgoLEP]{Dogslicer}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.YnwEttFE1bJacLDh]{Horsechopper}的训练。

此外，你获得所有非普通地精武器的许可。为了决定你的熟练度，军用地精武器视为简易武器，而高级地精武器视为军用武器。

Others might look upon them with disdain, but you know that the weapons of your people are as effective as they are sharp. You are trained with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.olwngGXM3hpgoLEP]{Dogslicer} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.YnwEttFE1bJacLDh]{Horsechopper}.

In addition, you gain access to all uncommon goblin weapons. For the purpose of determining your proficiency, martial goblin weapons are simple weapons and advanced goblin weapons are martial weapons.

Quick Bomber.name:
快速投弹手
Quick Bomber
Quick Bomber.description:
你将炸弹放在易于触及的袋子里，让你无需思考就能抽出。你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{交互} 来抽出一枚炸弹，然后用它进行打击。

You keep your bombs in easy-to-reach pouches from which you draw without thinking. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} to draw a bomb, then Strike with it.

Acid Flask (Lesser).name:
酸液瓶（次级）
Acid Flask (Lesser)
Acid Flask (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

这只装满腐蚀性强酸的烧瓶造成1点酸蚀伤害、1d6点持续酸蚀伤害，以及1点酸蚀溅射伤害。

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 1d6 persistent acid damage, and 1 acid splash damage.

Alchemist's Fire (Lesser).name:
炼金术火焰（次等）
Alchemist's Fire (Lesser)
Alchemist's Fire (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

炼金师之火是由多种易挥发液体混合而成的物质，在暴露于空气中时会点燃。炼金师之火造成1d8火焰伤害，1持续火焰伤害，以及1火焰飞溅伤害。

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 1d8 fire damage, 1 persistent fire damage, and 1 fire splash damage.

Elixir of Life (Minor).name:
生命灵药（次级）
Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
激活 A（操作）

生命药剂加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用该药剂后，你恢复[[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points}，并在10分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命药剂（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Minor)}

Charhide Goblin.name:
炭皮地精
Charhide Goblin
Charhide Goblin.description:
你的祖先一直与火焰有着联系，并拥有更厚的皮肤，使你能够抵抗灼烧。你获得等同于你等级一半的火焰抗力（最低为1）。你也能更容易从着火状态中恢复。你用于移除持续火焰伤害的纯骰检定DC为10而非DC 15；如果另一名生物使用特别恰当的动作来帮助，则该DC降低为@Check[type:flat|dc:5]。

Your ancestors have always had a connection to fire and a thicker skin, which allows you to resist burning. You gain fire resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1). You can also recover from being on fire more easily. Your flat check to remove persistent fire damage is DC 10 instead of DC 15, which is reduced to @Check[type:flat|dc:5] if another creature uses a particularly appropriate action to help.

Alchemist's Toolkit.name:
炼金术工具包
Alchemist's Toolkit
Alchemist's Toolkit.description:
这套便携式的小瓶与化学品集合可用于简单的炼金任务。如果你穿戴你的炼金术士工具包，你可以在使用它的动作中将其抽出并收回。

This mobile collection of vials and chemicals can be used for simple alchemical tasks. If you wear your alchemist's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Thieves' Toolkit.name:
盗贼工具包
Thieves' Toolkit
Thieves' Toolkit.description:
你需要一套盗贼工具包才能使用贼活（技能）来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

如果你的盗贼工具包损坏，你可以通过用适用于你工具包的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{替换撬锁器}更换撬锁器来修理它；这不需要使用修理动作。如果你佩戴着你的盗贼工具包，你可以将其取出并放回，作为使用它的动作的一部分。

You need a thieves' toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

If your thieves' toolkit is broken, you can repair it by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your toolkit; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Alchemist.name:
炼金术士
Alchemist
Alchemist.description:
对你而言，没有什么景象比烧杯里冒泡的奇异调制更美丽，而你会肆意吞服自己巧思迸发的灵药。你痴迷于揭开科学与自然世界的秘密，并不断在实验室里或旅途中进行试验，为各种突发状况调配出别出心裁的混合剂。面对风险你无所畏惧，将爆炸性或剧毒的造物投向敌人。你通往伟大的独特道路上，遍布着将你的身心推向极限的炼金调制。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.Om4e4tsgNWrComie]{炼金术士}

There's no sight more beautiful to you than a strange brew bubbling in a beaker, and you consume your ingenious elixirs with abandon. You're fascinated by uncovering the secrets of science and the natural world, and you're constantly experimenting in your lab or on the go with inventive concoctions for every eventuality. You are fearless in the face of risk, hurling explosive or toxic creations at your foes. Your unique path toward greatness is lined with alchemical brews that push your mind and body to their limits.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.Om4e4tsgNWrComie]{Alchemist}

Research Field.name:
研究领域
Research Field
Research Field.description:
你对宇宙炼金本质的探究使你将注意力集中在某一特定的研究领域。你可能毕业于科学研究院，与同领域的其他研究者通信，或作为天才独行者工作。选择一个研究领域。

你的研究领域会为你的配方簿增加若干配方；这些就是你的标志性物品。使用一批注入试剂并通过进阶炼金来制造你的标志性物品时，你制造出三件物品而非两件。每当你获得一个等级时，你可以用配方簿中的另一项配方替换你的一件标志性物品。这个新的标志性物品必须在你的研究领域所列的可选标志性物品清单上。

Your inquiries into the alchemical nature of the universe have led you to focus on a particular field of research. You might have a degree from a scientific institute, correspond with other researchers in your field, or work as a genius loner. Choose a field of research.

Your research field adds a number of formulas to your formula book; these are your signature items. When using a batch of infused reagents to create your signature items using advanced alchemy, you create three items instead of two. Each time you gain a level, you can swap one of your signature items with another formula in your formula book. This new signature item must be on your research field's list of possible signature items.

Alchemy.name:
炼金术
Alchemy
Alchemy.description:
你理解自然与非自然物质之间复杂的相互作用，并且能够调制炼金物品以满足你的需求。你可以使用普通试剂并通过制作行动来完成此事，或者你可以使用特殊的灌注试剂，让你能够快速且不花费任何成本地制作临时物品。随着时代推移，你可以免费创造越来越多的炼金物品，并且由于它们每一件都变得越来越强大，你的力量会戏剧性地提升，把那些不理解你奇异科学的人远远甩在身后。

你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.is3Oz9wt11lNq62K]{炼金制作}专长，即使你不满足该专长的先决条件，并且你获得该专长授予的四个常见1级炼金配方。只要你的配方簿中有这些物品的配方，你就可以使用该专长来创造炼金物品。

You understand the complex interactions of natural and unnatural substances and can concoct alchemical items to meet your needs. You can do this using normal reagents and the Craft activity, or you can use special infused reagents that allow you to craft temporary items quickly and at no cost. Over time, you can create more and more alchemical items for free, and since each of them becomes more and more powerful, you advance in power dramatically, leaving behind those who don't understand your strange science.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.is3Oz9wt11lNq62K]{Alchemical Crafting} feat, even if you don't meet that feat's prerequisites, and you gain the four common 1st-level alchemical formulas granted by that feat. You can use this feat to create alchemical items as long as you have the items' formulas in your formula book.

Formula Book.name:
配方簿
Formula Book
Formula Book.description:
炼金术师会为他们能制造的每件物品保存一丝不苟的配方。你起始时免费获得一本价值10 sp或更低的标准 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.qCEOZ6109Yo34tRx]{Formula Book (Blank)}。该配方簿除包含你从 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.is3Oz9wt11lNq62K]{Alchemical Crafting} 与你的研究领域中获得的配方之外，还包含你自选的两种常见1级炼金物品的配方。

每当你获得一个等级时，你可以将两种常见炼金物品的配方加入你的配方簿。这些新配方可以是你能够制造的任何等级的物品。你会自动学会这些配方，但你也可以在聚居地中或从其他炼金术师处找到或购买额外的配方，或通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.XR95taODq1sq82Du]{Inventor} 专长来发明它们。

An alchemist keeps meticulous formulas for every item they can create. You start with a standard @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.qCEOZ6109Yo34tRx]{Formula Book (Blank)} worth 10 sp or less for free. The formula book contains the formulas for two common 1st-level alchemical items of your choice, in addition to those you gained from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.is3Oz9wt11lNq62K]{Alchemical Crafting} and your research field.

Each time you gain a level, you can add the formulas for two common alchemical items to your formula book. These new formulas can be for any level of item you can create. You learn these formulas automatically, but it's also possible to find or buy additional formulas in settlements or from other alchemists, or to invent them with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.XR95taODq1sq82Du]{Inventor} feat.

Bomber.name:
投弹手
Bomber
Bomber.description:
你专精于爆炸以及其他猛烈的炼金反应。除了你的其他配方外，你起始还拥有两种常见的1级炼金炸弹的配方。

你的研究领域会将若干配方加入你的配方簿；这些是你的标志性物品。使用一份 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.wySB9VHOW1v3TX1L]{灌注试剂}通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.Pe0zmIqyTBc2Td0I]{进阶炼金术}制作你的标志性物品时，你会制造三件物品而非两件。每当你获得一个等级时，你可以将你的一件标志性物品与配方簿中的另一个配方互换。这个新的标志性物品必须在你的研究领域的可选标志性物品列表中。

投掷带有溅射（特征）的炼金炸弹时，你可以选择仅对你的主要目标造成溅射伤害，而非通常的溅射区域。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.8QAFgy9U8PxEa7Dw]{领域发现}等级 5

在每日准备期间使用进阶炼金术制作炸弹时，你可以使用一份试剂批次来制造任意三枚炸弹，而非仅制造两枚相同的炸弹。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.DFQDtT1Van4fFEHi]{永续灌注}等级 7

你已学会制造永续的炼金灌注，使你几乎能够无限供应某些简单物品。你获得一种能力：使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.sPtl05wwTpqFI0lL]{快速炼金术}制造两件1级炼金物品，而无需花费一份灌注试剂的批次。你可选择的物品取决于你的研究领域，并且必须在你的配方簿中。

每当你获得一个等级时，你可以将任意数量的永续灌注与其他符合条件的灌注互换。

选择两种1级炸弹。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.8rEVg03QJ71ic3PP]{永续效能}等级 11

你的永续灌注得到提升，使你能够使用快速炼金术无成本地制造更强力的物品。你可选择的物品取决于你的研究领域，并且必须在你的配方簿中。

你为永续灌注所选择的炸弹的中等版本。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RGs4uR3CAvgbtBAA]{高等领域发现}等级 13

你可以提高你炸弹的溅射，使其能对10尺内的生物造成伤害；若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gyVcJfZTmBytLsXq]{扩展溅射}，则为15尺。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.xO90iBD8XNGyaCkz]{永续完美}等级 17

你已将永续灌注臻于完善，使你能够使用快速炼金术无成本地制造更强力的物品。你可选择的物品取决于你的研究领域，并且必须在你的配方簿中。

你为永续灌注所选择的炸弹的高等版本。

You specialize in explosions and other violent alchemical reactions. You start with the formulas for two common 1st-level alchemical bombs, in addition to your other formulas.

Your research field adds a number of formulas to your formula book; these are your signature items. When using a batch of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.wySB9VHOW1v3TX1L]{Infused Reagents} to create your signature items using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.Pe0zmIqyTBc2Td0I]{Advanced Alchemy}, you create three items instead of two. Each time you gain a level, you can swap one of your signature items with another formula in your formula book. This new signature item must be on your research field's list of possible signature items.

When throwing an alchemical bomb with the splash trait, you can deal splash damage to only your primary target instead of the usual splash area.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.8QAFgy9U8PxEa7Dw]{Field Discovery}Level 5

When using Advanced Alchemy to make bombs during your daily preparations, you can use a batch of reagents to create any three bombs instead of just two of the same bomb.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.DFQDtT1Van4fFEHi]{Perpetual Infusions}Level 7

You have learned how to create perpetual alchemical infusions that can provide a near-infinite supply of certain simple items. You gain the ability to create two 1st-level alchemical items using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.sPtl05wwTpqFI0lL]{Quick Alchemy} without spending a batch of infused reagents. The items you can select depend on your research field and must be in your formula book.

Each time you gain a level, you can swap any number of your perpetual infusions with other eligible infusions.

Choose two 1st-level bombs.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.8rEVg03QJ71ic3PP]{Perpetual Potency}Level 11

Your perpetual infusions improve, allowing you to use Quick Alchemy to create more powerful items with no cost. The items you can select depend on your research field and must be in your formula book.

The moderate versions of the bombs you chose for perpetual infusions.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RGs4uR3CAvgbtBAA]{Greater Field Discovery}Level 13

You can increase the splash on your bombs to damage creatures within 10 feet, or 15 feet if you have @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gyVcJfZTmBytLsXq]{Expanded Splash}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.xO90iBD8XNGyaCkz]{Perpetual Perfection}Level 17

You have perfected your perpetual infusions, allowing you to use Quick Alchemy to create even more powerful items at no cost. The items you can select depend on your research field and must be in your formula book.

The greater versions of the bombs you chose for perpetual infusions.

Alchemical Crafting.name:
炼金制造
Alchemical Crafting
Alchemical Crafting.description:
你可以使用制造行动来制作炼金物品。当你选择此专长时，你立即将四种常见的1级炼金物品的配方加入你的配方簿。

You can use the Craft activity to create alchemical items. When you select this feat, you immediately add the formulas for four common 1st-level alchemical items to your formula book.

Infused Reagents.name:
灌注试剂
Infused Reagents
Infused Reagents.description:
你将试剂灌注入你自身的炼金精华，使你能够免费制造炼金物品。每天在你的每日准备期间，你获得数量等同于你的等级 + 你的智力调整值的灌注试剂批次。你可以将这些试剂用于高级炼金或快速炼金，如下所述。这些灌注试剂合计具有轻负载。

当你进行下一次每日准备时，你在前一天准备中获得的灌注试剂会立刻被摧毁，而你前一天灌注物品的非永久性效果也会立即结束。尽管灌注试剂是实体物品，但它们无法被复制、保存，或以任何非每日准备的方式制造。任何此类人造试剂都缺乏灌注，且对高级炼金或快速炼金毫无用处。

You infuse reagents with your own alchemical essence, allowing you to create alchemical items at no cost. Each day during your daily preparations, you gain a number of batches of infused reagents equal to your level + your Intelligence modifier. You can use these reagents for either advanced alchemy or Quick Alchemy, described below. Together, these infused reagents have light Bulk.

As soon as you make your next daily preparations, your infused reagents from the previous day's preparations are instantly destroyed, and nonpermanent effects of your previous day's infused items immediately end. While infused reagents are physical objects, they can't be duplicated, preserved, or created in any way other than your daily preparations. Any such artificial reagents lack the infusion and are useless for advanced alchemy or Quick Alchemy.

Advanced Alchemy.name:
进阶炼金术
Advanced Alchemy
Advanced Alchemy.description:
在你的每日准备期间，在制作新的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.wySB9VHOW1v3TX1L]{Infused Reagents} 之后，你可以花费这些灌注试剂的批次数来制造灌注炼金物品。

你不需要尝试进行制作检定来这么做，并且你忽略通常制作这些物品所需的天数以及任何炼金试剂需求。

你的进阶炼金等级等于你的等级。你每花费一批灌注试剂，就从你的配方簿中选择一个进阶炼金等级或更低等级的炼金物品，并制作该物品两份为一批。

这些物品具有灌注（特征），并保持效力 24 小时，或直到你的下一次每日准备，以先到者为准。

During your daily preparations, after producing new @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.wySB9VHOW1v3TX1L]{Infused Reagents}, you can spend batches of those infused reagents to create infused alchemical items.

You don't need to attempt a Crafting check to do this, and you ignore both the number of days typically required to create the items and any alchemical reagent requirements.

Your advanced alchemy level is equal to your level. For each batch of infused reagents you spend, choose an alchemical item of your advanced alchemy level or lower that's in your formula book, and make a batch of two of that item.

These items have the infused trait and remain potent for 24 hours or until your next daily preparations, whichever comes first.

Quick Alchemy.name:
快速炼金
Quick Alchemy
Quick Alchemy.description:
如果你需要临时制作某个特定的炼金物品，你可以使用你的灌注试剂，通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.yzNJgwzV9XqEhKc6]{快速炼金术} 动作迅速将其制造出来。

If you need a specific alchemical item on the fly, you can use your infused reagents to quickly create it with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.yzNJgwzV9XqEhKc6]{Quick Alchemy} action.

Goblin.name:
地精
Goblin
Goblin.description:
其他族裔所执着的那些错综复杂的历史并不能引起地精的兴趣。这些小家伙活在当下，比起如实的记载，他们更喜欢夸张的传奇。几十年前的战争对他们来说也几乎像是远古往事。被其他族裔误解，地精仍乐于做自己。地精的美德在于活在当下、富有创意与诚实。他们努力过上充实的生活，而不是担忧旅途将如何结束。讲故事，而不是吹毛求疵地抠细节。身材虽小，梦想却大。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.Gn0XGCWDb0N4zLE0]{地精}

The convoluted histories other people cling to don't interest goblins. These small folk live in the moment, and they prefer tall tales over factual records. The wars of a few decades ago might as well be from the ancient past. Misunderstood by other people, goblins are happy how they are. Goblin virtues are about being present, creative, and honest. They strive to lead fulfilled lives, rather than worrying about how their journeys will end. To tell stories, not nitpick the facts. To be small, but dream big.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.Gn0XGCWDb0N4zLE0]{Goblin}

Dwarf.name:
矮人
Dwarf
Dwarf.description:
矮人作为一个坚忍而严肃的民族享有来之不易的声誉，他们安居于由整块岩石开凿而成的城堡与城市之中。尽管有些人认为他们是阴郁且缺乏幽默感的石与金属工匠，但矮人以及那些曾在他们之中度过时代的人都明白，他们对工作的热忱毫无保留，比起数量更在乎品质。对陌生人而言，他们可能显得多疑而排外，但对朋友与家人，他们温暖而体贴，他们的大厅里回荡着笑声与铁锤敲击铁砧的声响。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.XzRv30zY3UXRbBho]{矮人}

Dwarves have a well-earned reputation as a stoic and stern people, ensconced within citadels and cities carved from solid rock. While some see them as dour and humorless crafters of stone and metal, dwarves and those who have spent time among them understand their unbridled zeal for their work, caring far more about quality than quantity. To a stranger, they can seem untrusting and clannish, but to their friends and family, they are warm and caring, their halls filled with the sounds of laughter and hammers hitting anvils.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.XzRv30zY3UXRbBho]{Dwarf}

Clan Dagger.name:
氏族匕首
Clan Dagger
Clan Dagger.description:
这把宽刃匕首被矮人携带，作为武器、工具，以及氏族身份的象征。对大多数矮人而言，丢失或不得不交出氏族匕首被视为耻辱的标记。

This broad dagger is carried by dwarves as a weapon, tool, and designation of clan. Losing or having to surrender a clan dagger is considered a mark of embarrassment to most dwarves.

Strong-Blooded Dwarf.name:
强血矮人
Strong-Blooded Dwarf
Strong-Blooded Dwarf.description:
你的血液强健有力，你能摆脱毒素。你获得等同于你等级一半的毒素抗力（最低 1），并且你每次对抗毒素苦难的成功豁免都会使其阶段降低 2（若为剧毒毒素则降低 1）。每次对抗持续中的毒素取得大成功都会使其阶段降低 3（若为剧毒毒素则降低 2）。

Your blood runs hearty and strong, and you can shake off toxins. You gain poison resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1), and each of your successful saving throws against a poison affliction reduces its stage by 2, or by 1 for a virulent poison. Each critical success against an ongoing poison reduces its stage by 3, or by 2 for a virulent poison.

Scout.name:
斥候
Scout
Scout.description:
你以荒野为家，寻找踪迹并引导旅人。你对远方的渴望可能将你召唤到冒险生活之中；又或者你曾作为士兵的斥候服役，并发现自己喜欢战斗。

选择两个属性提升。其中一个必须为敏捷或感知，另一个为自由属性提升。

你受训于生存（技能）以及一个与某种你曾侦察过的地形相关的学识（技能）（例如森林学识或洞窟学识）。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.8qebBeOJsyRIchcu]{觅食者} 技能专长。

You called the wilderness home as you found trails and guided travelers. Your wanderlust could have called you to the adventuring life, or perhaps you served as a scout for soldiers and found you liked battle.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Wisdom, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Survival skill and a Lore skill related to one terrain you scouted in (such as Forest Lore or Cavern Lore). You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.8qebBeOJsyRIchcu]{Forager} skill feat.

Forager.name:
觅食者
Forager
Forager.description:
当你使用生存进行维生时，若你掷骰得到的结果比成功更差，你仍获得成功。在成功时，你可以为自己与额外4个生物提供维生所需的生活，而在大成功时，你可以照料两倍数量的额外生物。你可以选择以舒适的生活支援其中一半数量的生物。

若你在生存上为专家，则在成功时你能供养的额外生物数量增加至8个；若为大师则为16个；若为传奇则为32个。

While using Survival to Subsist, if you roll any result worse than a success, you get a success. On a success, you can provide subsistence living for yourself and four additional creatures, and on a critical success, you can take care of twice as many additional creatures. You can choose to support half the number of creatures with a comfortable living.

Increase the number of additional creatures you feed on a success to eight if you're an expert in Survival, 16 if you're a master, and 32 if you're legendary.

Ranger.name:
游侠
Ranger
Ranger.description:
有些游侠相信文明会磨损灵魂，但仍需要保护其免受野生生物侵害。另一些则认为自然需要被保护，免遭贪婪之人破坏——那些想要驯服其美丽并掠夺其珍宝的人。你可以为其中一个目标而战，或两者兼顾。你可能是一名斥候、追踪者，或追猎逃犯与野兽的猎人，徘徊在文明边缘，或探索荒野。你知道如何靠大地为生，擅长发现并击倒既可乘之机的猎物，也能消灭令人憎恨的敌人。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.gdEmPPRYhRai7I1N]{游侠}

Some rangers believe civilization wears down the soul, but still needs to be protected from wild creatures. Others say nature needs to be protected from the greedy, who wish to tame its beauty and plunder its treasures. You could champion either goal, or both. You might be a scout, tracker, or hunter of fugitives or beasts, haunting the edge of civilization or exploring the wilds. You know how to live off the land and are skilled at spotting and taking down both opportune prey and hated enemies.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.gdEmPPRYhRai7I1N]{Ranger}

Hunter's Edge.name:
猎人锋刃
Hunter's Edge
Hunter's Edge.description:
你已接受训练，成为一名熟练的猎人和追踪者，并在你进行猎物追猎时根据你的训练侧重点获得额外收益。选择一个猎手锋芒。

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.6v4Rj7wWfOH1882r]{乱舞}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.NBHyoTrI8q62uDsU]{智胜}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.u6cBjqz2fiRBadBt]{精准}

You have trained to become a skilled hunter and tracker, gaining an extra benefit when you Hunt Prey depending on the focus of your training. Choose a hunter's edge.

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.6v4Rj7wWfOH1882r]{Flurry}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.NBHyoTrI8q62uDsU]{Outwit}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.u6cBjqz2fiRBadBt]{Precision}

Hunt Prey.name:
狩猎猎物
Hunt Prey
Hunt Prey.description:
你将单一生物指定为你的猎物，并将你的攻击专注于该生物。你必须能够看到或听到猎物，或者你必须在探索期间正在追踪猎物。

当你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}你的猎物时，你在察觉检定上获得+2环境加值；当你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}你的猎物时，你在生存检定上获得+2环境加值。你也会忽略对你正在狩猎的猎物在你的第二射程增量内进行远程攻击的减值。

你同一时代只能将一个生物指定为你的猎物。若你在已经指定一个生物的情况下对另一个生物使用狩猎猎物，则先前的生物失去该指定，而新的猎物获得该指定。你的指定持续至你的下一次每日准备。

You designate a single creature as your prey and focus your attacks against that creature. You must be able to see or hear the prey, or you must be tracking the prey during exploration.

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks when you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} your prey and a +2 circumstance bonus to Survival checks when you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} your prey. You also ignore the penalty for making ranged attacks within your second range increment against the prey you're hunting.

You can have only one creature designated as your prey at a time. If you use Hunt Prey against a creature when you already have a creature designated, the prior creature loses the designation and the new prey gains the designation. Your designation lasts until your next daily preparations.

Flurry.name:
连击
Flurry
Flurry.description:
你已经受过训练，能够对你的猎物倾泻毁灭性的连击。你对被你狩猎的猎物进行攻击时的多重攻击减值为：在该回合的第二次攻击时为–3（使用灵巧武器时为–2），而非–5；在该回合的第三次或后续攻击时为–6（使用灵巧武器时为–4），而非–10。

You have trained to unleash a devastating flurry of attacks upon your prey. Your multiple attack penalty for attacks against your hunted prey is –3 (–2 with an agile weapon) on your second attack of the turn instead of –5, and –6 (–4 with an agile weapon) on your third or subsequent attack of the turn, instead of –10.

Dwarven Weapon Familiarity.name:
矮人武器熟稔
Dwarven Weapon Familiarity
Dwarven Weapon Familiarity.description:
你的族人让你对重击型武器情有独钟，你更偏爱这些武器而非更优雅的兵器。你获得所有带有矮人（特征）的非普通武器的许可。你熟悉带有矮人（特征）的武器，以及战斧、镐与战锤——就熟练度而言，你将其中任何属于军用武器的视为简易武器，将其中任何属于进阶武器的视为军用武器。

在第5等级时，每当你使用这些武器之一造成大成功或大失败命中时，你获得其大成功或大失败专精效果。

Your kin have instilled in you an affinity for hard-hitting weapons, and you prefer these to more elegant arms. You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the dwarf trait. You have familiarity with weapons with the dwarf trait plus the battle axe, pick, and warhammer—for the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you get its critical specialization effect.

Monster Hunter.name:
怪物猎人
Monster Hunter
Monster Hunter.description:
你迅速评估你的猎物并运用你所知。作为用于狩猎你的猎物动作的一部分，你可以尝试一次检定来对你的猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}。当你以重度成功用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}识别你正在狩猎的猎物时，除了任何其他收益外，你还会注意到该生物防御中的一个弱点。你以及你告知的盟友在下一次对该猎物的攻击掷骰中获得+1环境加值。你每天只能对特定生物从怪物猎手获得加值一次。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.W2tWq0gdAcnoz2MO]{效果：怪物猎手}

You quickly assess your prey and apply what you know. As part of the action used to Hunt your Prey, you can attempt a check to Recall Knowledge about your prey. When you critically succeed at identifying your hunted prey with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}, you note a weakness in the creature's defenses in addition to any other benefits. You and allies you tell gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your next attack roll against that prey. You can give bonuses from Monster Hunter only once per day against a particular creature.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.W2tWq0gdAcnoz2MO]{Effect: Monster Hunter}

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳该背包而不是把它背在背上，那么它的负载为轻负载而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
当它装满时，一个水袋大约包含足够一只小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火镰
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有时代捕捉火花时有助于生火，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常过于耗费时代而不实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也需要至少使用3个动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为一把临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Grappling Hook.name:
抓钩
Grappling Hook
Grappling Hook.description:
你可以投掷一把系着绳索的抓钩来让攀爬更容易。要固定抓钩，使用你的简易武器熟练度进行一次远程攻击掷骰，对抗一个取决于目标的DC，通常至少为DC 20。此次攻击具有秘密（特征）。成功时，你的抓钩会牢牢钩住；但在大成功或大失败中的大失败时，抓钩看起来似乎能固定住，但实际上会在你爬到一半时脱落

You can throw a grappling hook with a rope tied to it to make a climb easier. To anchor a grappling hook, make a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your hook has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the hook seems like it will hold but actually falls when you're partway up

Repair Toolkit.name:
修理工具包
Repair Toolkit
Repair Toolkit.description:
修理包允许你在旅行时进行简单修理。它包含一把便携式铁砧、钳子、木工工具、磨刀石，以及用于保养皮革和木材的油。你可以使用修理包用手艺（技能）进行修理物品。你可以作为使用它的动作的一部分取出并放回一套磨损的修理工具包。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Studded Leather Armor.name:
镶钉皮甲
Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这种皮制护甲用金属铆钉加固，有时还会加装小块金属板，既保留了皮制护甲的大部分灵活性，又提供了更为坚固的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Dwarven War Axe.name:
矮人战斧
Dwarven War Axe
Dwarven War Axe.description:
这把矮人偏爱的武器有一个巨大的华丽斧头，安装在粗厚的柄上。这把强力的斧可以单手或双手挥舞。

This favored weapon of the dwarves has a large, ornate head mounted on a thick handle. This powerful axe can be wielded with one hand or two.

Hatchet.name:
手斧
Hatchet
Hatchet.description:
这把小斧可以用于近战或投掷。

This small axe can be used in close combat or thrown.

Heavy Crossbow.name:
重弩
Heavy Crossbow
Heavy Crossbow.description:
这种大型十字弓比普通十字弓更难装填，也更为坚固，但它的威力更大。

This large crossbow is harder to load and more substantial than a regular crossbow, but it packs a greater punch.

Bolts.name:
弩矢
Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但结构相似，是弩使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Half-Elf.name:
半精灵
Half-Elf
Half-Elf.description:
你的父母之一是精灵，或其中一方或双方都是半精灵。你拥有尖耳朵以及其他表明精灵传承的明显特征。你获得精灵（特征）、半精灵特征与昏暗视觉。此外，每当你获得一个族裔专长时，你都可以选择精灵、半精灵与人类专长。

Either one of your parents was an elf, or one or both were half-elves. You have pointed ears and other telltale signs of elf heritage. You gain the elf trait, the half-elf trait, and low-light vision. In addition, you can select elf, half-elf, and human feats whenever you gain an ancestry feat.

Sailor.name:
水手
Sailor
Sailor.description:
你从小就听到了大海的召唤。也许你签约登上了一艘商船，加入了海军，甚至混入了一群海盗与无赖的船员之中。

选择两个属性提升。其中一个必须分配给力量或敏捷，另一个为自由属性提升。

你受训于运动（技能）与航海学识（技能）。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.iOY6YfGBaOvMNAor]{水下掠袭者} 技能专长。

You heard the call of the sea from a young age. Perhaps you signed onto a merchant's vessel, joined the navy, or even fell in with a crew of pirates and scalawags.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Strength or Dexterity, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Athletics skill and the Sailing Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.iOY6YfGBaOvMNAor]{Underwater Marauder} skill feat.

Underwater Marauder.name:
水下掠袭者
Underwater Marauder
Underwater Marauder.description:
你已经学会了在水下战斗。在水中时你不会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态，并且你在水中使用钝击或挥砍近战武器时不会承受通常的惩罚。

You've learned to fight underwater. You are not @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} while in water, and you don't take the usual penalties for using a bludgeoning or slashing melee weapon in water.

Nimble Elf.name:
灵巧精灵
Nimble Elf
Nimble Elf.description:
你的肌肉经过精心锻炼。你的速度增加5尺。

Your muscles are tightly honed. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

Goading Feint.name:
挑衅佯攻
Goading Feint
Goading Feint.description:
当你欺骗一名敌人时，你可以激将他们在下一次攻击中过度延伸。

在一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻}时，你可以使用下述的成功与大成功效果来替代你在佯攻时本应获得的任何其他效果；如果你这么做，其他调整你佯攻常规效果的能力将不再适用。每次你对某个敌人进行佯攻时，你都可以选择使用激将佯攻的增益或正常增益。

大成功 在其下个回合结束前，该目标对你进行的所有攻击掷骰获得-2环境减值。

成功 在其下个回合结束前，该目标对你进行的下一次攻击掷骰获得-2环境减值。

When you trick a foe, you can goad them into overextending their next attack.

On a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint}, you can use the following success and critical success effects instead of any other effects you would gain when you Feint; if you do, other abilities that adjust the normal effects of your Feint no longer apply. You can choose whether to use the Goading Feint benefits or the normal benefits each time you Feint a given foe.

Critical Success The target takes a -2 circumstance penalty to all attack rolls against you before the end of its next turn.

Success The target takes a -2 circumstance penalty to its next attack roll against you before the end of its next turn.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳背包而不是将其背在背上，它的负载为轻而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
当它装满时，一个水袋大约包含足够供一名小型或中型生物使用 1 天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有足够时代来捕捉火花时很有用，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常过于耗费时代而不切实际。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也至少需要使用 3 动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Buckler.name:
圆盾
Buckler
Buckler.description:
这种非常小的盾牌是决斗者以及敏捷、轻甲战士的最爱。它通常由钢制成，并绑在你的前臂上。只要你那只手空着，或那只手正握着一件非武器的轻型物体，你就可以用你的圆盾 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{举起盾牌}。

硬度 HP BT
3 6 3

This very small shield is a favorite of duelists and quick, lightly armored warriors. It's typically made of steel and strapped to your forearm. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{Raise a Shield} with your buckler as long as you have that hand free or are holding a light object that's not a weapon in that hand.

Hardness HP BT
3 6 3

Dagger.name:
匕首
Dagger
Dagger.description:
这把小型刃器武器可单手持握，用于在近战中刺击生物。它也可以被投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Dueling Cape.name:
决斗披风
Dueling Cape
Dueling Cape.description:
你可以用一个交互动作将你穿戴的决斗披风从肩上扯下并缠绕在手臂上。以这种方式挥舞决斗披风时，该披风占用那只手臂和手，你无法用那只手拿着任何其他东西。

当你这么做时，你可以花费一个动作将其保持在防护姿势，使你在AC以及用于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻}的欺瞒检定上获得+1环境加值，持续到你下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7dLsA9PAb5ij7Bc6]{效果：决斗披风}
