You can pull a dueling cape you're wearing from your shoulder and wrap it around your arm with an Interact action. While wielding the dueling cape this way, the cape uses that arm and hand, and you can't hold anything else in that hand.

While you do so, you can spend an action to hold it in a protective position, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and to Deception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7dLsA9PAb5ij7Bc6]{Effect: Dueling Cape}

Clothing (Fine).name:
衣物（精致）
Clothing (Fine)
Clothing (Fine).description:
适合贵族或王室的精致服装由昂贵的织物、贵金属和复杂的图案制成。

Fine clothing, suitable for a noble or royal, is made with expensive fabrics, precious metals, and intricate patterns.

Healing Potion (Minor).name:
治疗药水（次级）
Healing Potion (Minor)
Healing Potion (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般的红色液体，饮用者的伤口迅速愈合时会感到一阵刺痛。当你喝下治疗药水时，你恢复[[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8生命值}。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain [[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 Hit Points}.

Leather Armor.name:
皮甲
Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
由柔韧与定型的煮制皮革混合制成，这种护甲在提供一定保护的同时具备最大灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Main-Gauche.name:
主手匕首
Main-Gauche
Main-Gauche.description:
这把格挡匕首配有坚固的护手，以保护持用者的手。

This parrying dagger features a robust guard to protect the wielder's hand.

Rapier.name:
细剑
Rapier
Rapier.description:
细剑是一种细长的穿刺刃，带有篮式护手。它被许多人视为决斗武器而备受珍视。

The rapier is a long and thin piercing blade with a basket hilt. It is prized among many as a dueling weapon.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为一把临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Thieves' Toolkit.name:
盗贼工具包
Thieves' Toolkit
Thieves' Toolkit.description:
你需要盗贼工具包才能使用贼活（技能）进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

如果你的盗贼工具包损坏，你可以通过用适用于你工具包的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{替换撬锁工具}更换开锁工具来修理它；这不需要使用“修理”动作。如果你穿戴着你的盗贼工具包，你可以作为使用它的动作的一部分将其取出并替换。

You need a thieves' toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

If your thieves' toolkit is broken, you can repair it by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your toolkit; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Swashbuckler.name:
游荡剑客
Swashbuckler
Swashbuckler.description:
许多战士依靠蛮力、沉重的护甲或笨重的武器。对你而言，战斗是一支舞，你以风度与优雅穿梭于敌群之间。你以潇洒的姿态在战斗者间疾掠，用腕间一抖与刃光一闪落下强力的终结一击，同时以优雅的还击反制攻击，让敌人失去平衡。不断骚扰并挫败你的对手，让你能够迷惑命运、欺骗死亡，一次又一次地从容脱身且风采十足。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.rsDTKu4HUuKft7fk]{游荡剑客}

Many warriors rely on brute force, weighty armor, or cumbersome weapons. For you, battle is a dance where you move among foes with style and grace. You dart among combatants with flair and land powerful finishing moves with a flick of the wrist and a flash of the blade, all while countering attacks with elegant ripostes that keep enemies off balance. Harassing and thwarting your foes lets you charm fate and cheat death time and again with aplomb and plenty of flair.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.rsDTKu4HUuKft7fk]{Swashbuckler}

Human.name:
人类
Human
Human.description:
如同格拉利昂的任何族群一样难以预测且多姿多彩，人类拥有非凡的驱动力，以及忍耐与拓展的能力。尽管在人类崛起并占据显赫地位之前，许多文明已曾繁荣兴盛，但在人类历史长河中，他们建立过一些最伟大、也最可怕的社会，而在今日，他们是内海周边诸国度中人口最多的族群。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{人类}

As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand. Though many civilizations thrived before humanity rose to prominence, humans have built some of the greatest and the most terrible societies throughout the course of history, and today they are the most populous people in the realms around the Inner Sea.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{Human}

Panache.name:
潇洒值
Panache
Panache.description:
你对完成某事的方式与是否真的完成它同样在意。当你以特定的英勇气概执行一个动作时，你可以利用这股活力的瞬间来施展壮观而致命的机动。这种华丽的状态称为游刃有余（panache），而你要么处于游刃有余状态，要么不处于。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.uBJsxCzNhje8m8jj]{Effect: Panache}

你通过成功进行与具有些许华丽感的特定动作相关联的技能检定来获得游刃有余，包括 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through} 以及由你的游荡剑客风格决定的其他动作（见下文）。在GM的裁量下，在你成功进行一次检定以执行特别大胆的动作之后，例如在吊灯上荡过去或沿着帷幔滑下，如果你的结果足够高，你也会获得游刃有余（通常为你等级的极难DC，但GM可以选择不同的门槛）。

当你拥有游刃有余时，你的速度获得+5英尺状态加值，并且你在进行用于 Tumble Through 的检定，或进行任何因你的风格而给予你游刃有余的动作之检定时，获得+1环境加值。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RQH6vigvhmiYKKjg]{Precise Strike} 职业特性也会使你在拥有游刃有余时造成额外精准伤害。强力的终结技动作，包括 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.K878asDgf1EF0B9S]{Confident Finisher}，只能在你拥有游刃有余时使用，并会使你失去游刃有余。

通常，你只会在战斗遭遇中获得并使用游刃有余；当一次遭遇结束时，你会失去游刃有余

You care as much about the way you accomplish something as whether you actually accomplish it in the first place. When you perform an action with particular bravado, you can leverage this moment of verve to perform spectacular, deadly maneuvers. This state of flair is called panache, and you are either in a state of panache or you are not.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.uBJsxCzNhje8m8jj]{Effect: Panache}

You gain panache by successfully performing the skill check associated with specific actions that have a bit of flair, including @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through} and additional actions determined by your swashbuckler's style (see below). At the GM's discretion, after succeeding at a check to perform a particularly daring action, such as swinging on a chandelier or sliding down a drapery, you also gain panache if your result is high enough (typically the very hard DC for your level, but the GM can choose a different threshold).

While you have panache, you gain a +5-foot status bonus to your Speeds and gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to Tumble Through or to take any actions that give you panache due to your style. The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RQH6vigvhmiYKKjg]{Precise Strike} class feature also causes you to deal extra precision damage while you have panache. Powerful finisher actions, including @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.K878asDgf1EF0B9S]{Confident Finisher}, can be used only while you have panache and cause you to lose your panache.

Normally, you gain and use panache only in combat encounters; when an encounter ends, you lose panache

Precise Strike.name:
精准打击
Precise Strike
Precise Strike.description:
你潇洒地打出一记攻击。当你拥有潇洒值，并且你使用灵巧或灵敏的近战武器进行打击，或使用灵巧或灵敏的徒手攻击进行打击时，你造成额外2点精准伤害。若该打击是终结技的一部分，则改为造成额外2d6点精准伤害。

随着你的侠客等级提升，你的精准打击所带来的额外伤害也会提高。在第5、第9、第13和第17等级时，你在一次打击上的额外伤害数值与在终结技上的额外骰子数量各增加1。

You Strike with flair. When you have panache and you Strike with an agile or finesse melee weapon or agile or finesse unarmed attack, you deal 2 additional precision damage. If the strike is part of a finisher, the additional damage is 2d6 precision damage instead.

As your swashbuckler level increases, so does your additional damage for precise strike. Increase the amount of additional damage on a Strike and the number of additional dice on a finisher by one at 5th, 9th, 13th, and 17th levels.

Confident Finisher.name:
自信终结技
Confident Finisher
Confident Finisher.description:
你做出一次极其优雅的攻击，刺穿敌人的防御。使用一把武器或徒手攻击进行一次打击，该打击会适用你的精准打击伤害，并具有以下失败效果。

失败 你对目标造成一半的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RQH6vigvhmiYKKjg]{精准打击} 伤害。该伤害类型与您用于此次打击的武器或徒手攻击相同。

You make an incredibly graceful attack, piercing your foe's defenses. Make a Strike with a weapon or unarmed attack that would apply your precise strike damage, with the following failure effect.

Failure You deal half your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RQH6vigvhmiYKKjg]{Precise Strike} damage to the target. This damage type is that of the weapon or unarmed attack you used for the Strike.

Swashbuckler's Style.name:
豪侠风格
Swashbuckler's Style
Swashbuckler's Style.description:
作为一名游荡剑客，你拥有自己独特的风格，使你能够优雅地应对日常事件与生死攸关的局面。选择一种游荡剑客的风格。该风格决定你用于获得华丽的额外动作，并使你在与该动作相关的技能上成为受训。

As a swashbuckler, you have your own distinctive style that enables you to gracefully handle everyday events and life-or-death situations alike. Choose a swashbuckler's style. This style determines the additional actions you use to gain panache and makes you trained in the skill related to that action.

Fencer.name:
击剑手
Fencer
Fencer.description:
你小心翼翼地移动，虚晃并制造虚假的破绽，引诱敌人在不合时宜的时机发动攻击。

你在欺瞒上受训。在遭遇中，每当你成功对一名敌人进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{虚晃} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造分心} 时，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.uBJsxCzNhje8m8jj]{豪胆}。

You move carefully, feinting and creating false openings to lead your foes into inopportune attacks.

You are trained in Deception. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.uBJsxCzNhje8m8jj]{Panache} during an encounter whenever you successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} against a foe.

Skyborn Tengu.name:
天裔天狗
Skyborn Tengu
Skyborn Tengu.description:
你的骨骼可能格外轻盈，你可能是拥有翅膀的稀有天狗，或者你与风与天空之灵的联系比大多数人更强，从而减缓你在空中下坠的速度。无论你坠落的距离多远，你都不会受到坠落造成的伤害。

Your bones may be especially light, you may be a rare tengu with wings, or your connection to the spirits of wind and sky might be stronger than most, slowing your descent through the air. You take no damage from falling, regardless of the distance you fall.

Cook.name:
烹饪
Cook
Cook.description:
你在酒馆或其他餐饮场所的厨房里长大，并在那里表现出色，成为一名杰出的厨师。烘焙、烹饪，顺带还会酿点酒——你花了大量时间在不为人知的地方。现在是时候走出家门，去亲眼看看这个世界了。

选择两项能力提升。一项必须提升体质或智力，另一项为自由能力提升。

你受训于生存（技能）和烹饪学识（技能）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1Eceqc6zbMj2x0q9]{老练}技能专长。

You grew up in the kitchens of a tavern or other dining establishment and excelled there, becoming an exceptional cook. Baking, cooking, a little brewing on the side-you've spent lots of time out of sight. It's about time you went out into the world to catch some sights for yourself.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Constitution or Intelligence, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Survival skill and the Cooking Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1Eceqc6zbMj2x0q9]{Seasoned} skill feat.

Seasoned.name:
老练
Seasoned
Seasoned.description:
你已精通许多类型的食物与饮品的制作准备。你在制作食物与饮品（包括药水）的工艺检定上获得+1环境加值。若你在任一项先决技能中为大师，则该加值提高至+2。

You've mastered the preparation of many types of food and drink. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to Craft food and drink, including potions. If you are a master in one of the prerequisite skills, this bonus increases to +2.

Tengu Weapon Familiarity.name:
天狗武器熟稔
Tengu Weapon Familiarity
Tengu Weapon Familiarity.description:
自从你破壳而出起，你就一直接受刀刃与其他天狗武器的训练。你获得对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.KgKSX95uVSg8iBBA]{Khakkharas} 的许可。

此外，从剑组中选择两把武器。你可以从所有常见军用剑中选择，再加上 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Y1dkRsRd1Z7Jf2y6]{Katana}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.NIsxR5zXtVa3PuyU]{Temple Sword} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.YOpopjoWgU7bkmwh]{Wakizashi}。为了确定你的熟练度，该武器被视为简易武器，且若该武器并非常见，你获得对其的许可。若你在所有军用武器上受训，你将常见高级剑加入你可选择的剑中。

你也获得对所有非常见天狗武器的许可。为了确定你的熟练度，军用天狗武器是简易武器，高级天狗武器是军用武器。

You've trained with a blade and other tengu weapons ever since you hatched. You gain access to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.KgKSX95uVSg8iBBA]{Khakkharas}.

Additionally, choose two weapons from the sword group. You can choose from among all common martial swords, plus the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Y1dkRsRd1Z7Jf2y6]{Katana}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.NIsxR5zXtVa3PuyU]{Temple Sword}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.YOpopjoWgU7bkmwh]{Wakizashi}. For the purpose of determining your proficiency, that weapon is a simple weapon, and if the weapon isn't common, you gain access to it. If you are trained in all martial weapons, you add common advanced swords to the swords you can choose from.

You also gain access to all uncommon tengu weapons. For the purpose of determining your proficiency, martial tengu weapons are simple weapons, and advanced tengu weapons are martial weapons.

Divine Spontaneous Spells.name:
神圣自发法术
Divine Spontaneous Spells

Detect Magic.name:
侦测魔法
Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，用以识别魔法的存在。你除魔法是否存在之外不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。你只能在该魔法的效果的阶位低于你的侦测魔法法术的阶位时，侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的阶位或等级，由GM判定。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你还会锁定最高阶位魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体范围内（若目标大于此范围，则为最接近的区域）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Vitality Lash.name:
活力鞭笞
Vitality Lash
Vitality Lash.description:
你用来自造物熔炉的能量摧毁目标被腐化的精髓。你造成 @Damage[2d6[vitality]] 伤害，目标进行一次基本强韧豁免。若该生物在豁免中大失败，则其还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}，直到你下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d6。

You demolish the target's corrupted essence with energy from Creation's Forge. You deal @Damage[2d6[vitality]] damage with a basic Fortitude save. If the creature critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Guidance.name:
指引
Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然实体的指引，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免掷骰或技能检定获得+1状态加值。目标必须在掷骰前选择将该加值用于哪一次掷骰。如果目标使用了该加值，则该法术结束。无论如何，随后目标在1小时内暂时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：指引}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：指引免疫}

You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Light.name:
光
Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光球，以你选择的颜色在20尺半径内发出明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内为昏暗光照）。如果你在与一个自愿生物相同的空间内创造光，你可以将光附着在该生物上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮在其附近。你可以维持该法术以将光移动至多60尺；你可以将其附着在某个生物上或从某个生物上解除附着，作为此次移动的一部分。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在已经有四个光法术处于激活状态时施放该法术，你必须选择一个现有法术使其结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光}

升阶（4环） 光球在60尺半径内发出光（并在接下来的60尺内为昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Fear.name:
恐惧
Fear
Fear.description:
你在目标心中种下恐惧；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} 且在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}。

增幅（3环） 你最多可以以五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Divine Focus Spells.name:
神圣专注法术
Divine Focus Spells

Electric Arc.name:
电弧
Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跃向另一个目标。每个目标承受2d4电击伤害，并进行基础反射豁免。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. Each target takes 2d4 electricity damage with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Pushing Gust.name:
推进阵风
Pushing Gust
Pushing Gust.description:
你推动空气，用强力的阵风冲击目标；它必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被推离你5尺。

失败 目标被推离你10尺。

大失败 目标被推离你10尺并被击倒 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Giving the air a push, you buffet the target with a powerful gust of wind; it must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is pushed 5 feet away from you.

Failure The target is pushed 10 feet away from you.

Critical Failure The target is pushed 10 feet away from you and knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳背包而不是将其背在背上，则其负载为轻型而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Rope.name:
绳索
Rope
Rope.description:
50英尺长的绳子。

50 feet of rope.

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
当它装满时，一个水袋大约包含一名小型或中型生物一天所需的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与钢片
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有时代去捕捉火花时有助于生火，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常过于耗费时代而不实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也至少需要使用3 动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Chain Shirt.name:
锁子衫
Chain Shirt
Chain Shirt.description:
有时也被称为锁子甲衫，这是一件用与链甲相同的金属环制成的长衫。然而，它比链甲轻得多，只保护穿戴者的躯干、上臂和大腿。

Sometimes called a hauberk, this is a long shirt constructed of the same metal rings as chainmail. However, it is much lighter than chainmail and protects only the torso, upper arms, and upper legs of its wearer.

Khakkhara.name:
锡杖
Khakkhara
Khakkhara.description:
这根法杖的顶部是一个尖头的金属圆环，其上悬挂着数个更小的圆环；当法杖移动时，它们会叮当作响、咣啷喧闹，让你在行走时宣告自己的存在并吓退野生动物。

This staff is topped by a pointed metal circle from which hang several smaller rings that jingle and clang noisily as the staff is moved, allowing you to announce your presence and scare off wild animals as you walk.

Sling.name:
投石索
Sling
Sling.description:
投石索只不过是一个连接在一对带子上的皮革杯，可以用来将光滑的石头或投石弹投掷到射程内。

Little more than a leather cup attached to a pair of straps, a sling can be used to fling smooth stones or sling bullets at a range.

Sling Bullets.name:
投石索弹丸
Sling Bullets
Sling Bullets.description:
这些是小型金属球，通常由铁或铅制成，用作投石索的弹药。

These are small metal balls, typically either iron or lead, designed to be used as ammunition in slings.

Elixir of Life (Minor).name:
生命药剂（次级）
Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A (操作)

生命药剂会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用此药剂后，你恢复 [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 生命值}，并在10分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定获得+1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命药剂（次等）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Minor)}

Tempest Touch.name:
风暴接触
Tempest Touch
Tempest Touch.description:
你的接触唤起一团翻涌的冰水，紧紧附着在你的目标上，造成1d4钝击伤害与1d4寒冷伤害。目标必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

Critical Success 目标不受影响。

Success 目标承受一半伤害，并在你下个回合结束前，其速度获得-5英尺的环境减值。

Failure 目标承受全部伤害，并在你下个回合结束前，其速度获得-10英尺的环境减值。

Critical Failure 如同失败，但目标承受双倍伤害。

Heightened (+1) 钝击与寒冷伤害各增加1d4。

Your touch calls forth a churning mass of icy water that clings to your target, dealing 1d4 bludgeoning damage and 1d4 cold damage. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and a -5-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until the end of your next turn.

Failure The target takes full damage and a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target takes double damage.

Heightened (+1) The bludgeoning and cold damage each increase by 1d4.

Heal.name:
治疗
Heal
Heal.description:
你引导生命能量来治疗生者或伤害不死生物。若目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复1d8生命值。若目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的生命力伤害，并且它进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (concentrate) 该法术的射程为30尺。若你正在治疗一个活体生物，生命值恢复量增加8点。

3 (concentrate) 你在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]中散布生命能量。这会以爆发中的所有活体与不死生物为目标。

升阶 (+1) 治疗或伤害的数值增加1d8，而2动作版本的额外治疗增加8点。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Shield.name:
盾牌
Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一道魔法力场护盾。这算作使用“举盾”动作，使你在直到你下个回合开始前获得+1 AC环境加值，但不需要一只手来使用。

在该法术效果持续期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡}反应动作（）。该护盾具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作（）来减少来自任何法术或魔法效果的伤害，即使它不造成物理伤害也可以。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，且你在10分钟内不能再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾免疫}

升阶（+2） 护盾的硬度增加5。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Scroll of Runic Weapon (Rank 1).name:
符文武器卷轴（1阶）
Scroll of Runic Weapon (Rank 1)
Scroll of Runic Weapon (Rank 1).description:
从卷轴施放法术需要用一只手持握卷轴，并使用该法术正常所需动作数量的施法（行动）来启动它。

该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为是你在施法，使用你的法术攻击调整和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你的根源相应的特征（奥术、神圣、异能或自然）。

任何物质成本都会在卷轴制作时提供，因此你从卷轴施放时不需要提供它们。如果该法术需要法器，你必须拥有该法器才能从卷轴施法。

注：要创建某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入PC、NPC或战利品角色的物品栏中。

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when casting from a scroll. If the spell requires a locus, you must have that locus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Oracle.name:
神谕者
Oracle
Oracle.description:
你通向神圣力量的渠道摒弃了祈祷与侍奉这些传统途径——你转而领悟超越任何单一神祇的神圣真理。你理解宇宙的伟大奥秘；这些奥秘体现于超越善与恶或混沌与秩序的宏大概念之中——无论是因为你洞见多位神祇之间的共同基础，还是因为你完全规避了祂们的力量。

你探索这些奥秘之一，并汲取其力量来施放奇迹般的法术，但这股力量伴随着可怕的价格：一种诅咒，你越是汲取力量，它就越发强大。你的能力是一把双刃剑——你可能将其奉为神圣的工具，或视其为来自神祇的诅咒。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.bqaqOx3naiwTozBX]{预言者}

Your conduit to divine power eschews the traditional channels of prayer and servitude-you instead glean divine truths that extend beyond any single deity. You understand the great mysteries of the universe embodied in overarching concepts that transcend good and evil or chaos and law, whether because you perceive the common ground across multiple deities or circumvent their power entirely.

You explore one of these mysteries and draw upon its power to cast miraculous spells, but that power comes with a terrible price: a curse that grows stronger the more you draw upon it. Your abilities are a double-edged sword, which you might uphold as an instrument of the divine or view as a curse from the gods.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.bqaqOx3naiwTozBX]{Oracle}

Mystery.name:
奥秘
Mystery
Mystery.description:
选择为你的秘奥力量提供动力的神圣奥秘。

你的奥秘可能代表对所有掌管该奥秘主题的神祇的泛神式虔敬、对某个特定理念的崇敬，或作为原初神圣能量的导管。无论其起源与本质为何，你的奥秘决定你能施放的启示法术，以及当你这样做时侵袭你身体的预言诅咒。你会学习与该奥秘相关的技能，获得一个戏法的许可，并获得一项特殊增益，该增益源自你的奥秘所汇聚的神圣知识与经验。

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.qvRlih3u7vK3FYUR]{祖先}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.gjOGOR30Czpnx3tM]{战斗}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.IaxmCkdsPlA52spu]{骸骨}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RI2EMRBBPNSoTJXu]{宇宙}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.GTSvbFb36InvuH0w]{烈焰}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.o1gGG36wpn9mxeop]{生命}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.tZBb3Kh4nJcNoUFI]{学识}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.W9cF7wZztLDb1WGY]{风暴}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.EslxR2sbDK9XJaAl]{时代}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.tzDW9l4lBwXCVYtz]{灰烬}

阅读奥秘条目

奥秘条目包含以下信息，并附有该奥秘诅咒的描述。

奥秘增益 奥秘增益是你从奥秘中获得的一项特殊能力（或多项能力）。

受训技能 你在所列技能上成为受训。少数奥秘会使你在不止一个技能上成为受训。

授予戏法 除了你通过神圣施法获得的戏法之外，你会自动将该戏法加入你的法术储备。

启示法术 你在1级时自动获得你奥秘的初始启示法术，并且可以通过选择 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.FPVe3o7YctBicSQa]{进阶启示}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HSW3N9pfHhM7upRB]{更高启示} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.2HeRmbcHcsRMccir]{多样奥秘} 先知专长来获得更多。

相关领域 这些是与你奥秘相关联的牧师领域。你在1级时从这些领域之一中选择一个初始领域法术，你可以将其作为带有咒缚（特征）的启示法术来施放。

Choose the divine mystery that fuels your mystical power.

Your mystery might represent a pantheistic devotion to all the deities with power over the subject of your mystery, veneration of a particular ideal, or a conduit to raw divine energy. Whatever its origin and nature, your mystery determines the revelation spells you can cast and the oracular curse that overtakes your body when you do. You learn skills related to that mystery, gain access to a cantrip, and gain a special benefit drawn from the combined divine knowledge and experience of your mystery.

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.qvRlih3u7vK3FYUR]{Ancestors}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.gjOGOR30Czpnx3tM]{Battle}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.IaxmCkdsPlA52spu]{Bones}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RI2EMRBBPNSoTJXu]{Cosmos}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.GTSvbFb36InvuH0w]{Flames}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.o1gGG36wpn9mxeop]{Life}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.tZBb3Kh4nJcNoUFI]{Lore}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.W9cF7wZztLDb1WGY]{Tempest}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.EslxR2sbDK9XJaAl]{Time}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.tzDW9l4lBwXCVYtz]{Ash}

Reading a Mystery Entry

A mystery entry contains the following information, followed by a description of that mystery's curse.

Mystery Benefit The mystery benefit is a special ability (or abilities) you gain from your mystery.

Trained Skill You become trained in the listed skill. A few mysteries make you trained in more than one skill.

Granted Cantrip You automatically add this cantrip to your spell repertoire, in addition to those you gain through divine spellcasting.

Revelation Spells You automatically gain your mystery's initial revelation spell at 1st level and can gain more by selecting the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.FPVe3o7YctBicSQa]{Advanced Revelation}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HSW3N9pfHhM7upRB]{Greater Revelation}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.2HeRmbcHcsRMccir]{Diverse Mystery} oracle feats.

Related Domains These are the cleric domains associated with your mystery. You select one initial domain spell from one of these domains at 1st level, which you can cast as a revelation spell with the cursebound trait.

Divine Spellcasting (Oracle).name:
神圣法术施放（神谕者）
Divine Spellcasting (Oracle)
Divine Spellcasting (Oracle).description:
你的奥秘为你提供神圣魔法力量。你可以使用施法（行动）来施放法术，并且你在施放法术时可以提供材料、姿势与言语成分。你以非传统方式获得这股神圣力量，这意味着你通常可以用姿势成分替代材料成分，因此你在施放法术时不需要使用材料成分袋。

在1级时，你每天最多可以施放两个1环法术。你必须已知法术才能施放它们，并且你通过法术表职业特性来学习它们。你每天可以施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。随着你作为神谕者的等级提升，你每天可施放的法术数量会增加，你能施放的最高法术环阶也会提高。

你的某些法术需要你尝试进行一次法术攻击掷骰，以查看它们的效果如何，或者让你的敌人对你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键能力是魅力，你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC使用你的魅力调整值。

Your mystery provides you with divine magical power. You can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity, and you can supply material, somatic, and verbal components when casting spells. your unconventional access to this divine power means you can usually replace material components with somatic components, so you don't need to use a material component pouch when casting spells.

At 1st level, you can cast up to two 1st-rank spells per day. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots. As you increase in level as an oracle, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spell you can cast.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack roll to see how effective they are, or your enemies to roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key ability is Charisma, your spell attack rolls and spell DCs use your Charisma modifier.

Oracular Curse.name:
神谕诅咒
Oracular Curse
Oracular Curse.description:
汲取多种彼此迥异的力量来源不可避免地会给你的身体带来难以置信的压力，并以一种超自然的诅咒形式显现。你施放的启示法术越多，诅咒的效果就越严重，但这些愈发相互冲突的能量也能为你提供神圣的裨益。

你诅咒的具体效果与你的秘示相关，但所有诅咒都遵循同样的进程。诅咒会持续给予你一种轻微但恒定的提醒，让你意识到自己携带着异界的力量。当你施放启示法术时，你的诅咒会加剧，先提升到轻度效果，然后提升到中度效果。

在你完成每日准备后，你第一次施放完一个启示法术时，你的诅咒会进展到其轻度阶段。一旦你的轻度诅咒显现，它将保持生效，直到你休息8小时并再次进行每日准备。若你在轻度诅咒生效期间施放启示法术，你会在你完成施放该法术后立刻进展到中度诅咒效果。轻度效果仍会影响你，尽管某些中度诅咒效果可能会改变你轻度诅咒的具体内容。在更高等级时，你可以施放更多启示法术，使你的诅咒进展到其重度阶段，然后到达极限阶段；这些更强的诅咒会与较低阶段的效果累积，并可能改变它们。当你在中度或更强诅咒的效果下进行再聚能时，除了恢复一个聚能点外，你还会将你诅咒的严重程度降低到轻度。

在你的诅咒处于最糟状态时汲取你的秘示之力，会在你与力量来源之间造成无法调和的冲突。当你在诅咒的中度效果下施放完一个启示法术后，你会立刻陷入崩溃。处于崩溃时，你无法施放或维持任何启示法术——你等同于失去对这些法术的许可。你仍可以再聚能来降低你诅咒的效果并恢复一个聚能点，但这样做并不会让你能够施放更多启示法术。这些效果持续到你休息8小时并进行每日准备为止；届时你的诅咒会回到其基础状态。在更高等级时，你可以逐渐学会承受你诅咒的重度，甚至极限效果，使你能够在不陷入崩溃的情况下施放更多启示法术。

你的诅咒具有诅咒、神圣与死灵术特征。除再聚能与休息8小时以外，你无法通过任何方式缓和、降低或移除你神谕者诅咒的效果。例如，如果你的诅咒使生物对你处于隐蔽（状态），你无法通过魔法物品或法术（例如 true strike）来无效该隐蔽（状态）（不过你仍会受益于该物品或法术的其他效果）。同样地，remove curse 以及类似法术完全不会影响你的诅咒。

Drawing on multiple disparate sources of power inevitably places an incredible stress on your body, manifesting as a supernatural curse. The more revelation spells you cast, the worse the effects of your curse, but these increasingly conflicting energies can also provide you with divine benefits.

The specific effects of your curse are tied to your mystery, but all curses follow the same progression. A curse continually gives you a mild but constant reminder that you carry otherworldly power. As you cast revelation spells, your curse intensifies, first to a minor effect and then to a moderate effect.

Your curse progresses to its minor stage the first time you finish casting a revelation spell after your daily preparations. Once your minor curse has manifested, it remains in effect until you rest for 8 hours and again make your daily preparations. If you cast a revelation spell while your minor curse is in effect, you progress to the moderate curse effect immediately after you finish Casting the Spell. The minor effect continues to affect you, though some moderate curse effects might alter the specifics of your minor curse. At higher levels, you can cast more revelation spells, progressing your curse to its major stage and then an extreme stage; these stronger curses are cumulative with the effects of the lower stages and can alter them. When you Refocus while under the effects of your moderate or stronger curse, you reduce your curse's severity to minor in addition to regaining a Focus Point.

Drawing upon your mystery's power while your curse is at its worst causes an irreconcilable conflict between you and the sources of your power. Immediately after casting a revelation spell while under the moderate effect of your curse, you are overwhelmed. While overwhelmed, you can't Cast or Sustain any revelation spells-you effectively lose access to those spells. You can still Refocus to reduce the effects of your curse and regain a Focus Point, but doing so doesn't allow you to cast further revelation spells. These effects last until you rest for 8 hours and make your daily preparations, at which point your curse returns to its basic state. At higher levels, you can grow to withstand your curse's major and even extreme effects, enabling you to cast more revelation spells without becoming overwhelmed.

Your curse has the curse, divine, and necromancy traits. You can't mitigate, reduce, or remove the effects of your oracular curse by any means other than Refocusing and resting for 8 hours. For example, if your curse makes creatures concealed from you, you can't negate that concealed condition through a magic item or spell, such as true strike (though you would still benefit from the other effects of that item or spell). Likewise, remove curse and similar spells don't affect your curse at all.

Revelation Spells.name:
启示法术
Revelation Spells
Revelation Spells.description:
你的秘示之力会以启示法术的形式显现，这是一种聚能法术。施放启示法术消耗1聚能点，并会增强你的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.ibX2EhKkyUtbOHLj]{神谕诅咒}的效果。你起始拥有2点聚能点的聚能池。你在每日准备期间补满你的聚能池，并且你可以花费10分钟使用再聚能（行动），以调和你神圣秘示相互冲突或非传统的本质，从而恢复1点聚能点。

聚能法术会自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。聚能法术不需要法术位，而且你不能使用法术位施放它们（见@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.7AVspOB6ITNzGFZi]{神圣施法（神谕者）}）。选择专长可以让你获得更多聚能法术并增加你的聚能池的体型，不过你的聚能池最多永远不能容纳超过3点聚能点。

启示法术具有咒缚（特征），不同于其他聚能法术。该特征意味着它们在施放时会提高你的神谕诅咒的严重程度（见下文）。如果你没有神谕诅咒，你就不能施放咒缚法术。你在1级时学会两个启示法术。第一个是由你的秘示决定的初始启示法术。第二个是你从与你的秘示相关联的某个领域中选择的初始领域法术，你将其作为启示法术施放，使其获得咒缚（特征）。

The powers of your mystery manifest in the form of revelation spells, which are a type of focus spell. Casting a revelation spell costs 1 Focus Point and increases the effects of your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.ibX2EhKkyUtbOHLj]{Oracular Curse}. You start with a focus pool of 2 Focus Points. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to reconcile the conflicting or unconventional nature of your divine mystery.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots (see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.7AVspOB6ITNzGFZi]{Divine Spellcasting (Oracle)}). Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Revelation spells have the cursebound trait, unlike other focus spells. This trait means they increase the severity of your oracular curse (see below) when cast. You can't cast a cursebound spell if you don't have an oracular curse.You learn two revelation spells at 1st level. The first is an initial revelation spell determined by your mystery. The second is an initial domain spell you select from one of the domains associated with your mystery, which you cast as a revelation spell, causing it to gain the cursebound trait.

Spell Repertoire (Oracle).name:
法术储备（神谕者）
Spell Repertoire (Oracle)
Spell Repertoire (Oracle).description:
你能施放的法术合集称为你的法术储备。1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和五个自选的戏法。你从神圣法术列表中的常见法术中选择这些法术，或从你拥有许可的其他神圣法术中选择。你可以使用适当法术环位的法术位来施放你法术储备中的任何法术。

随着你等级提升，你会将更多法术加入该法术储备。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个同环位的法术加入你的法术储备。2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；3级时，你选择两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你可以选择你已拥有法术的更高环位版本，以便施放该法术的升阶版本。

尽管你以相同速率获得它们，你的法术位与法术储备中的法术是分开的。如果某个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术储备，它不会额外给予你另一个法术位，反之亦然。

交换你法术储备中的法术

当你在法术储备中获得新法术时，你可能想替换一些你先前学会的法术。每当你获得一个等级并学习新法术时，你可以将一个旧法术换成一个同环位的不同法术。该法术可以是戏法。你也可以在休整模式期间通过重训来交换法术。

The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and five cantrips of your choice. You choose these from the common spells from the divine spell list, or from other divine spells to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you select two 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might choose a higher-rank version of a spell you already have so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Tempest.name:
暴风雨
Tempest
Tempest.description:
神谕者挥使神圣力量，但并非来自单一的神圣存在。这股力量可能源自某个强大的概念或理想、来自多个其关注领域都与该主题有所“接触”的神圣实体的注视，或是通向原始神圣力量的直接而危险的导管。这就是神谕者的奥秘——一种不受任何神祇约束的神圣魔法来源。

你的奥秘可能代表对所有在你奥秘主题上拥有权能的神祇的泛神信奉、对某个特定理想的崇敬，或通向原始神圣能量的导管。无论其起源与本质为何，你的奥秘决定你能施放的启示法术，以及你这样做时侵袭你身体的神谕诅咒。你会学习与该奥秘相关的技能，获得一个戏法的许可，并获得一项特殊增益，源自你奥秘所汇聚的神圣知识与经验。

风与浪的狂怒在你心中轰鸣——无论你的力量源自自然风暴、通向气与水元素位面的导管，还是通过对诸如戈兹雷、天狗风暴之神黑风、恶魔领主达贡，或气与水的元素领主等神祇的敬奉。

奥秘增益

你能完美看穿风与水，并能将电荷送入空气与水中。你永远不会因风、雨、雾或其他降水而在察觉上承受减值，也不会因透过水面观察或身处水下而承受减值；这些状况也不会使任何事物对你处于隐蔽状态。

当你用一个非戏法的气或水法术造成物理伤害时，你每法术环阶额外造成1点电击伤害。

受训技能 自然

授予戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kBhaPuzLUSwS6vVf]{Electric Arc}

启示法术

  • 初阶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EzB9i7R6aBRAtJCh]{Tempest Touch};
  • 进阶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LFSwMtQVP05EzlZe]{Thunderburst};
  • 高阶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zhqnMOVPzVvWSUbC]{Tempest Form}

相关领域 气，水

永续风暴诅咒

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.I0g5oaSwaqZ8fFAV]{Effect: Curse of the Perpetual Storm}

你是自己微小暴风的中心，始终被风雨环绕；你越是汲取元素之力，这风雨就越发强烈。即便你平静且在休息时，你的头发与衣物也会被轻风吹动，你会微微潮湿，而你的接触常常伴随着静电电击。

轻度诅咒

一道旋转风暴的灵光在你周围5尺的放射范围内及你的空间内卷起。灵光会在小型非魔法火焰被点燃或被带入你的灵光后1轮将其扑灭。

电能在你的风暴中积聚，使你成为避雷针；你获得对电击的弱点2，并且那些对穿戴或持握金属的生物具有额外效果的电击法术或效果，会将你视为仿佛正穿戴金属。

中度诅咒

你的轻度诅咒灵光扩展为10尺放射范围，并随风夹带雨水。旋风会使以物理弹药进行的远程攻击检定在以你为目标或由你发起时承受-2环境减值。

你对电击的弱点提高至5或你等级的一半（取较高者），但倾盆大雨会赋予你等量的火焰抗力。

重度诅咒（11级）

你的轻度诅咒灵光扩展为15尺放射范围，并变得更强。灵光中向外吹拂的强风会阻碍生物前进。对位于地面上的大型及更小生物而言，该灵光为困难地形；对超大型及更小的飞行生物亦然。你不受该困难地形影响。

穿过你身体的电弧变得危险。任何生物只要接触你，或以徒手近战攻击或非触及近战武器对你造成伤害，就会受到@Damage[1d6[electricity]]伤害。如常规所述，这不会影响你所接触的生物。

An oracle wields divine power, but not from a single divine being. This power could come from a potent concept or ideal, the attention of multiple divine entities whose areas of concern all touch on that subject, or a direct and dangerous conduit to raw divine power. This is the oracle's mystery, a source of divine magic not beholden to any deity.

Your mystery might represent a pantheistic devotion to all the deities with power over the subject of your mystery, veneration of a particular ideal, or a conduit to raw divine energy. Whatever its origin and nature, your mystery determines the revelation spells you can cast and the oracular curse that overtakes your body when you do. You learn skills related to that mystery, gain access to a cantrip, and gain a special benefit drawn from the combined divine knowledge and experience of your mystery.

The fury of the wind and waves pounds in your heart, whether your power flows from natural storms, a conduit to the elemental Planes of Air and Water, or through reverence of deities such as Gozreh, the tengu god of storms Hei Feng, the demon lord Dagon, or the elemental lords of air and water.

Mystery Benefit

You can see perfectly through wind and water, and you send electric charges through both air and water. You never take penalties to Perception from wind, rain, fog, or other precipitation, or from looking through water or being underwater, and such conditions don't cause anything to be concealed from you.

When you deal physical damage with a non-cantrip air or water spell, you deal an additional 1 electricity damage per spell rank.

Trained Skill Nature

Granted Cantrip @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kBhaPuzLUSwS6vVf]{Electric Arc}

Revelation Spells

  • Initial @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EzB9i7R6aBRAtJCh]{Tempest Touch};
  • Advanced @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LFSwMtQVP05EzlZe]{Thunderburst};
  • Greater @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zhqnMOVPzVvWSUbC]{Tempest Form}

Related Domains Air, Water

Curse of the Perpetual Storm

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.I0g5oaSwaqZ8fFAV]{Effect: Curse of the Perpetual Storm}

You are the center of your own tiny tempest, ever surrounded by wind and rain that worsens the more you tap into your elemental powers. Even when you are calm and at rest, your hair and clothing are blown about by gentle winds, you are slightly damp, and your touch often comes with a static shock.

Minor Curse

An aura of a whirling storm whips up in a 5-foot emanation around you and in your space. The aura puts out small non-magical fires 1 round after they're lit or brought into your aura.

Electrical energy builds up within your storm, turning you into a lightning rod; you gain weakness 2 to electricity, and electricity spells or effects that have additional effects for a creature wearing or holding metal treat you as though you were wearing metal.

Moderate Curse

Your minor curse's aura expands to a 10-foot emanation and carries rain on the winds. The whirling winds impose a -2 circumstance penalty on ranged attack rolls using physical ammunition that target you or originate from you.

Your weakness to electricity increases to 5 or half your level, whichever is greater, but torrential rain grants you an equal amount of fire resistance.

Major Curse (11th)

Your minor curse's aura expands to a 15-foot emanation and grows stronger. High winds blowing outward in the aura impede creatures' progress. The aura is difficult terrain for Large and smaller creatures on the ground, and for Huge or smaller flying creatures. You aren't affected by this difficult terrain.

The electricity arcing through you becomes dangerous. Any creature that touches you or damages you with an unarmed melee attack or non-reach melee weapon takes @Damage[1d6[electricity]] damage. As normal, this doesn't affect creatures you touch.

Cast a Spell.name:
施放法术
Cast a Spell
Cast a Spell.description:
你施放一个你已准备或在你的法术列表中的法术。施法（行动）是一种特殊行动，其所需动作数量会随法术而变化，如各法术的数据表中所列。一旦施法动作完成，法术效果便会发生。

有些法术以反应动作（）或自由动作（）来施放。在这些情况下，你以反应动作（）或自由动作（）来施放该法术（视情况而定），而非作为行动。此类情况会在法术的数据表中注明——例如，“[reaction] 语言”。

长时间施法 时代 有些法术需要数分钟或数小时来施放。这些法术的施法（行动）包含所列法术成分的混合，但无需细分你在某一时刻具体提供哪一种成分。在施放此类法术时，你不能使用其他动作或反应动作（），不过在GM裁量下，你可能可以说几句话。与其他耗时较长的行动一样，这些法术具有探索（特征），且你不能在遭遇中施放它们。若你施放期间爆发战斗，你的法术会被打断。

法术成分 每个法术在动作图标或文字之后列出施放所需的法术成分，例如“[three-actions] 材料、姿势、语言”。如下详述的法术成分，会为施法（行动）添加特征与需求。若你无法提供这些成分，你施放该法术失败。

  • 材料（操作）
  • 姿势（操作）
  • 语言（专注）
  • 焦点（操作）

被打断与失去的法术 有些能力与法术可以打断一个法术，使其没有效果并被失去。当你失去一个法术时，你已消耗该法术位，支付了法术的代价并花费了动作，且已使用施法（行动）。如果一个法术在一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{维持法术} 动作中被打断，该法术立即结束。

You cast a spell you have prepared or in your repertoire. Casting a Spell is a special activity that takes a variable number of actions depending on the spell, as listed in each spell's stat block. As soon as the spellcasting actions are complete, the spell effect occurs.

Some spells are cast as a reaction or free action. In those cases, you Cast the Spell as a reaction or free action (as appropriate) instead of as an activity. Such cases will be noted in the spell's stat block-for example, "[reaction] verbal."

Long Casting Times Some spells take minutes or hours to cast. The Cast a Spell activity for these spells includes a mix of the listed spell components, but it's not necessary to break down which one you're providing at a given time. You can't use other actions or reactions while casting such a spell, though at the GM's discretion, you might be able to speak a few sentences. As with other activities that take a long time, these spells have the exploration trait, and you can't cast them in an encounter. If combat breaks out while you're casting one, your spell is disrupted.

Spell Components Each spell lists the spell components required to cast it after the action icons or text, such as "[three-actions] material, somatic, verbal." The spell components, described in detail below, add traits and requirements to the Cast a Spell activity. If you can't provide the components, you fail to Cast the Spell.

  • Material (manipulate)
  • Somatic (manipulate)
  • Verbal (concentrate)
  • Focus (manipulate)

Disrupted and Lost Spells Some abilities and spells can disrupt a spell, causing it to have no effect and be lost. When you lose a spell, you've already expended the spell slot, spent the spell's costs and actions, and used the Cast a Spell activity. If a spell is disrupted during a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{Sustain a Spell} action, the spell immediately ends.

Tengu.name:
天狗
Tengu
Tengu.description:
天狗是一支合群且足智多谋的族群，他们从自己位于天夏的祖先故乡向四面八方扩散，收集并融合他们所遇见的各种创新与传统，与自身悠久历史中的传承相结合。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.YGIwmuVOJI7uNhGM]{天狗}

Tengus are a gregarious and resourceful people that have spread far and wide from their ancestral home in Tian Xia, collecting and combining whatever innovations and traditions they happen across with those from their own long history.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.YGIwmuVOJI7uNhGM]{Tengu}

Sharp Beak.name:
锐利喙
Sharp Beak
Sharp Beak.description:
凭借你锋利的喙，你永远不会缺少一把武器。你拥有一个喙的徒手攻击，造成 @Damage[1d6[piercing]] 伤害。你的喙属于搏斗武器组，并具有灵巧与徒手特性。

With your Sharp Beak, you are never without a weapon. You have a beak unarmed attack that deals @Damage[1d6[piercing]] damage. Your beak is in the brawling weapon group and has the finesse and unarmed traits.

Salt and Pepper.name:
盐和胡椒
Salt and Pepper

Human.name:
人类
Human
Human.description:
如同格拉利昂的任何族群一般难以捉摸且多姿多彩，人类拥有非凡的驱动力，以及忍耐与扩张的能力。尽管在人类崛起并成为主导之前，许多文明已然繁荣昌盛，但在人类历史长河中，他们既建立过一些最伟大的社会，也缔造过一些最可怖的社会；而在今日，他们是内海周边诸国度中人口最多的族群。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{人类}

As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand. Though many civilizations thrived before humanity rose to prominence, humans have built some of the greatest and the most terrible societies throughout the course of history, and today they are the most populous people in the realms around the Inner Sea.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{Human}

Acolyte.name:
侍祭
Acolyte
Acolyte.description:
你在一座宗教修道院或隐修院中度过了你的早年时光。你可能走出修道院踏入世界去传播你宗教的教义，或是因为你摒弃了你信仰的教导而离开，但在内心深处，你将永远铭记你所学到的那些训诫。

选择两个属性提升。其中一个必须加在智力或感知上，另一个为自由属性提升。

你受训于宗教（技能）和抄写学识（技能）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.x7EMZNMavris2aHY]{教典学生}技能专长。

You spent your early days in a religious monastery or cloister. You may have traveled out into the world to spread the message of your religion or because you cast away the teachings of your faith, but deep down, you'll always carry within you the lessons you learned.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Intelligence or Wisdom, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Religion skill and the Scribing Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.x7EMZNMavris2aHY]{Student of the Canon} skill feat.

Student of the Canon.name:
教典的学生
Student of the Canon
Student of the Canon.description:
你对许多信仰进行了足够的研究，能够识别出关于它们的一些不太可能为真的观点。如果你在进行带有宗教性质的破译文字的宗教检定，或在回忆知识以了解各信仰教义时掷骰出大失败，你改为获得失败。尝试回忆知识以了解你自身信仰的教义时，若你掷骰出失败，你改为获得成功；若你掷骰出成功，你改为获得大成功。

You've researched many faiths enough to recognize notions about them that are unlikely to be true. If you roll a critical failure at a Religion check to Decipher Writing of a religious nature or to Recall Knowledge about the tenets of faiths, you get a failure instead. When attempting to Recall Knowledge about the tenets of your own faith, if you roll a failure, you get a success instead, and if you roll a success, you get a critical success instead.

Cleric.name:
牧师
Cleric
Cleric.description:
神祇以无穷无尽的方式将其意志施加于世界，而你作为他们最坚定不移的凡人仆从之一侍奉其左右。受神圣魔法祝福，你践行信仰的理想，以教会的象征装点自身，并勤勉训练以挥舞你所信奉神祇偏好的武器。你的法术或许会保护并治疗你的盟友，或许会惩戒与你信仰为敌的对手与仇敌，悉听神祇的意志。你的一生奉献于虔诚，通过言语与行动传播你信仰的教义。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.N4ABcd6CcCbqmw3x]{牧师}

Deities work their will upon the world in infinite ways, and you serve as one of their most stalwart mortal servants. Blessed with divine magic, you live the ideals of your faith, adorn yourself with the symbols of your church, and train diligently to wield your deity's favored weapon. Your spells might protect and heal your allies, or they might punish foes and enemies of your faith, as your deity wills. Yours is a life of devotion, spreading the teachings of your faith through both word and deed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.N4ABcd6CcCbqmw3x]{Cleric}

Deity (Sarenrae).name:
神祇（莎莲瑞）
Deity (Sarenrae)
Deity (Sarenrae).description:
作为一名牧师，你是你最为崇敬的某位神祇的凡人侍从。你的神祇使你在一项技能与该神祇的偏好武器上获得受训（熟练度）的熟练度等级。若该偏好武器为罕见，你也获得该武器的许可。

你的神祇也会将法术加入你的法术列表。一旦你作为牧师能够准备其环阶的法术，你就可以像准备神圣法术列表上的任何法术一样准备这些法术。若其中某些法术通常不在神圣列表上，只要你以这种方式准备，它们仍然是神圣法术。

圣化

根据你的神祇，其圣化能使你成为神圣或邪秽。这使你获得神圣或邪秽（特征），让你在诸位面灵魂之争的一方作出承诺，并可能在其他能力中被引用。若你的神祇说明你“可以”成为神圣或邪秽，则由你作出选择；若说明你“必须”成为神圣或邪秽，则你自动获得该特征。若你以某种方式获得相反的特征，你会失去先前的特征，直到你完成一次赎罪仪式。

禁忌

从根本上反对你神祇理想的行为，是你信仰的禁忌。学习或施放法术、犯下行为、以及使用对你的神祇而言属于禁忌的物品，会使你失去神祇的恩宠。

对不允许邪秽圣化的神祇而言，施放带有邪秽（特征）的法术几乎总是禁忌；同理，对不允许神圣圣化的神祇而言，施放神圣法术也同样是禁忌。类似地，施放对你信仰的信条或目标而言属于禁忌的法术，可能会干扰你与神祇的联系。例如，施放用于创造不死生物的法术会是法拉丝玛——死亡女神——的禁忌。许多属于禁忌的动作并不会出现在任何神祇的正式列表中。对于界限模糊的情况，由你与GM共同决定哪些行为属于禁忌。

若你做出足够多对你的神祇而言属于禁忌的行为，你会失去来自你与神祇联系的魔法能力。你失去哪些职业特性由GM决定，但很可能包括你的神圣泉源以及所有牧师法术施放。只有通过进行一次赎罪仪式以示悔改，才能重新获得这些能力。

As a cleric, you are a mortal servitor of a deity you revere above all others. Your deity grants you the trained proficiency rank in one skill and with the deity's favored weapon. If the favored weapon is uncommon, you also get access to that weapon.

Your deity also adds spells to your spell list. You can prepare these just like you can any spell on the divine spell list once you can prepare spells of their rank as a cleric. Any of these spells that aren't normally on the divine list are still divine spells if you prepare them this way.

Sanctification

Depending on your deity, their sanctification can make you holy or unholy. This gives you the holy or unholy trait, which commits you to one side of a struggle over the souls of the planes and may be referenced in other abilities. If you "can be" holy or unholy according to your deity, you make that choice, and if you "must be" holy or unholy you gain the trait automatically. If you gain the opposing trait in some way, you lose the previous trait until you complete an atone ritual.

Anathema

Acts fundamentally opposed to your deity's ideals are anathema to your faith. Learning or casting spells, committing acts, and using items that are anathema to your deity remove you from your deity's good graces.

Casting spells with the unholy trait is almost always anathema to deities who don't allow unholy sanctification, and casting holy spells is likewise anathema to those who don't allow holy sanctification. Similarly, casting spells that are anathema to the tenets or goals of your faith could interfere with your connection to your deity. For example, casting a spell to create undead would be anathema to Pharasma, the goddess of death. Many actions that are anathema don't appear in any deity's formal list. For borderline cases, you and your GM determine which acts are anathema.

If you perform enough acts that are anathema to your deity, you lose the magical abilities that come from your connection to your deity. The class features that you lose are determined by the GM, but they likely include your divine font and all cleric spellcasting. These abilities can be regained only if you repent by conducting an atone ritual.

Doctrine.name:
信条
Doctrine
Doctrine.description:
即使是同一位神祇的追随者，方式也各不相同。在1级时，你选择隐修牧师或战斗牧师，并获得其第一条教义的益处。在3级以及此后每四级一次，你从你的教义中获得另一项益处。

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.ZZzLMOUAtBVgV1DF]{隐修牧师}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.0Aocw3igLwna9cjp]{战斗牧师}

Even among followers of the same deity, approaches vary. At 1st level, you select cloistered cleric or warpriest and gain the benefits of its first doctrine. At 3rd level and every four levels thereafter, you gain another benefit from your doctrine.

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.ZZzLMOUAtBVgV1DF]{Cloistered Cleric}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.0Aocw3igLwna9cjp]{Warpriest}

Cleric Spellcasting.name:
牧师法术施放
Cleric Spellcasting
Cleric Spellcasting.description:
你的神祇赐予你施放神圣法术的力量。你是一名施法者，并且你可以使用施法（行动）来施放神圣根源的法术。作为牧师，你的吟诵通常会以名字或头衔呼唤你的神祇及其强大的仆从，而你的手势则会伴随着神圣符号或其他你神祇的象征物。

在1级时，你每天早晨可以从神圣法术列表中的通用法术，或从其他你获得许可并通过学习法术学会的神圣法术中，准备两个1环法术和五个戏法。准备好的法术会一直对你可用，直到你施放它们或再次准备法术。你每天能准备的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为牧师的等级提升，你每天能准备的法术数量会增加，你能施放的最高法术环阶也会提高，如上方的《牧师每日法术》表所示。

你的一些法术需要你进行一次法术攻击来判断其效果如何，或者让你的敌人针对你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键属性是感知，你的法术攻击调整与法术DC使用你的感知调整值。

法术升阶

当你获得2环及更高环阶的法术位时，你可以用更强版本的低环法术填入这些法术位。这会提高该法术的环阶，使其升阶以匹配法术位。许多法术在被升阶到特定环阶时会获得明确的增强。

戏法

你的一些法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不会消耗法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天不限次数。戏法总是会自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）——这通常等同于你拥有的最高牧师法术位环阶。例如，作为1级牧师，你的戏法是1环法术；作为5级牧师，你的戏法是3环法术。

Your deity bestows on you the power to cast divine spells. You are a spellcaster, and you can cast spells of the divine tradition using the Cast a Spell activity. As a cleric, your chants generally invoke your deity and their powerful servants by name or title, while your gestures are followed by sacred symbols or other representations of your deity.

At 1st level, you can prepare two 1st-rank spells and five cantrips each morning from the common spells on the divine spell list or from other divine spells to which you gain access and learn via Learn a Spell. Prepared spells remain available to you until you cast them or until you prepare your spells again. The number of spells you can prepare each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a cleric, the number of spells you can prepare each day increases, as does the highest rank of spell you can cast, as shown in Cleric Spells per Day table above.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or for your enemies to roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key attribute is Wisdom, your spell attack modifier and spell DC use your Wisdom modifier.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank, heightening it to match the spell slot. Many spells have specific improvements when they are heightened to certain ranks.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of cleric spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level cleric, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level cleric, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Divine Font (Healing).name:
神圣圣能池（治疗）
Divine Font (Healing)

First Doctrine.name:
第一信条
First Doctrine
First Doctrine.description:
你获得你的教义的第一个益处：

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.aiwxBj5MjnafCMyn]{隐修牧师}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.xxkszluN9icAiTO4]{战斗牧师}

You gain the first benefit of your doctrine:

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.aiwxBj5MjnafCMyn]{Cloistered Cleric}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.xxkszluN9icAiTO4]{Warpriest}

Sarenrae.name:
莎伦莱
Sarenrae
Sarenrae.description:
曾为强大的天使与苍穹领主，莎伦瑞引领冲锋，将罗瓦古格囚禁。黎明之花力求在可能之处救赎邪恶；当无法救赎时，便以太阳之火将其焚尽；并修复那些因邪恶的阴谋诡计而受害之人。

教义 摧毁罗瓦古格之裔，保护盟友，援助病患与伤者，追求并允许救赎

禁忌 创造不死生物，说谎，拒绝让悔改的生物获得救赎的机会，未能击倒邪恶

关注领域 治疗，诚实，救赎，以及太阳

Once a powerful angel and empyreal lord, Sarenrae led the charge to imprison Rovagug. The Dawnflower seeks to redeem evil where possible, burn it away with the fire of the sun when it can't be redeemed, and restore those harmed by evil's machinations.

Edicts destroy the Spawn of Rovagug, protect allies, provide aid to the sick and wounded, seek and allow redemption

Anathema create undead, lie, deny a repentant creature an opportunity for redemption, fail to strike down evil

Areas of Concern healing, honesty, redemption, and the sun

Cloistered Cleric.name:
隐修牧师
Cloistered Cleric
Cloistered Cleric.description:
你是一名正统的牧师，专注于神圣魔法以及你与神祇领域的联系。

第一教义（1级）：你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hT4INKGtly4QY8KN]{领域启蒙}牧师专长。

第二教义（3级）：你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

第三教义（7级）：你的法术攻击调整和法术DC数据的熟练等级提升为专家。

第四教义（11级）：你获得使用你神祇的偏好武器、简易武器以及徒手攻击的专家熟练度。当你使用你神祇的偏好武器进行攻击掷骰获得大成功或大失败时，你施加该武器的重击专精效果；你可以使用你的法术DC来代替你的职业DC。

第五教义（15级）：你的法术攻击调整和法术DC数据的熟练等级提升为大师。

终极教义（19级）：你的法术攻击调整和法术DC数据的熟练等级提升为传奇。

You are a cleric of the cloth, focusing on divine magic and your connection to your deity's domains.

First Doctrine (1st): You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hT4INKGtly4QY8KN]{Domain Initiate} cleric feat.

Second Doctrine (3rd): Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Third Doctrine (7th): Your proficiency ranks for the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics increase to expert.

Fourth Doctrine (11th): You gain expert proficiency with your deity's favored weapon, simple weapons, and unarmed attacks. When you critically succeed at an attack roll using your deity's favored weapon, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect; you can use your spell DC in place of your class DC.

Fifth Doctrine (15th): Your proficiency ranks for the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics increase to master.

Final Doctrine (19th): Your proficiency ranks for the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics increase to legendary.

Domain Initiate (Fire).name:
领域入门（火焰）
Domain Initiate (Fire)
Domain Initiate (Fire).description:
你的神祇赐予你一个与其权能相关的特殊法术。从你的神祇列表中选择一个领域——在你的宗教内你特别感兴趣的主题。你获得该领域的初始领域法术，这是一个该领域独有且其他牧师无法获得的法术。

领域法术是一种聚能法术。施放一个聚能法术需要消耗1聚能点，而你起始拥有一个包含1聚能点的聚能池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的聚能池，并且你可以花费10分钟使用再聚能（行动）来向你的神祇祈祷或为其事业效劳，从而恢复1聚能点。

聚能法术会像戏法一样自动增幅至你等级的一半（向上取整）。聚能法术不需要法术位，也不能使用法术位来施放。你的聚能池可为你拥有的每个聚能法术容纳1聚能点，最多3点。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长，每次选择不同的领域并获得其领域法术。

Your deity bestows a special spell related to their powers. Select one domain—a subject of particular interest to you within your religion—from your deity's list. You gain an initial domain spell for that domain, a spell unique to the domain and not available to other clerics.

Domain spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to pray to your deity or do service toward their causes.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and can't be cast using spell slots. Your focus pool can hold one Focus Point for each focus spell you have, up to 3 points.

Special You can select this feat multiple times, selecting a different domain each time and gaining its domain spell.

First Doctrine (Cloistered Cleric).name:
第一教义（隐修牧师）
First Doctrine (Cloistered Cleric)
First Doctrine (Cloistered Cleric).description:
你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hT4INKGtly4QY8KN]{领域新进者}牧师专长。

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hT4INKGtly4QY8KN]{Domain Initiate} cleric feat.

Divine Focus Spells.name:
神圣专注法术
Divine Focus Spells

Fire Ray.name:
火焰射线
Fire Ray
Fire Ray.description:
一条炽烈的火焰带在空中划出弧线，点燃你的对手以及其脚下的地面。对目标的 AC 进行一次法术攻击掷骰。射线在命中时造成 2d6 火焰伤害（若为大成功或大失败则造成双倍伤害）。除大成功或大失败的失败以外的任何结果，目标所处空间的地面都会着火，对在任一格子中结束其回合的每个生物造成 1d6 火焰伤害。

升阶 (+1) 射线的初始伤害增加 2d6，燃烧空间造成的火焰伤害增加 1d6。

A blazing band of fire arcs through the air, lighting your opponent and the ground they stand upon on fire. Make a spell attack roll against the target's AC. The ray deals 2d6 fire damage on a hit (or double damage on a critical hit). On any result other than a critical failure, the ground in the target's space catches fire, dealing 1d6 fire damage to each creature that ends its turn in one of the squares.

Heightened (+1) The ray's initial damage increases by 2d6, and the fire damage dealt by the burning space increases by 1d6.

Heal.name:
治疗
Heal
Heal.description:
你引导生命能量来治疗活物或伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复1d8点生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的生命力伤害，并且它进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数决定其目标、射程、区域以及其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (concentrate) 该法术的射程为30英尺。如果你在治疗一个活体生物，恢复的生命值增加8点。

3 (concentrate) 你在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]中散布生命能量。这以爆发中的所有活体与不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或伤害量增加1d8，且2动作版本的额外治疗量增加8点。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Divine Prepared Spells.name:
神圣备妥法术
Divine Prepared Spells

Daze.name:
恍惚
Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的心智，用一次精神震荡使其恍惚。该震荡造成1d6精神伤害，且进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标豁免大失败，它还会受到 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

强化（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You push into the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals 1d6 mental damage, with a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Divine Lance.name:
神圣长枪
Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你释放出一道神圣能量光束。对目标的AC进行一次远程法术攻击。命中时，目标受到2d4精神伤害（大成功或大失败时伤害加倍）。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You unleash a beam of divine energy. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 2d4 spirit damage (double damage on a critical hit).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Guidance.name:
指引
Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然实体的指引，使目标在持续时间结束前尝试的一次攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免检定或技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择将该加值用于哪一次掷骰。若目标使用了该加值，则该法术结束。无论是否使用，目标随后获得1小时的临时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：指引}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：指引免疫}

You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Light.name:
光
Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光球，在20英尺半径内发出明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内发出昏暗光照），颜色由你选择。若你在一个自愿生物所在的同一空间内创造光，你可以将该光附着在该生物上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮在其附近。你可以维持法术来将该光移动至多60英尺；你可以将其作为该次移动的一部分附着到一个生物上或从一个生物上解除附着。

你可以解消法术。若你在已经有四个light法术处于生效状态时施放法术，你必须选择一个已存在的法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮}

升阶（4环）该光球在60英尺半径内发光（并在接下来的60英尺内发出昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Stabilize.name:
稳定
Stabilize
Stabilize.description:
生命能量关闭死亡之门。目标失去 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死} 状态，但在 0 生命值时仍保持 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 状态。

Life energy shuts death's door. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition, though it remains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} at 0 Hit Points.

Bless.name:
祝福
Bless
Bless.description:
来自彼方的祝福帮助你的伙伴精准打击。你与盟友在灵光内进行攻击检定时获得+1状态加值。之后的回合中每轮一次，你可以维持该法术以使灵光的半径增加10尺。

祝福可以反制 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{灾祸}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.RfCEHpMoEAZvB9IZ]{灵光：祝福}

Blessings from beyond help your companions strike true. You and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls while within the emanation. Once per round on subsequent turns, you can Sustain the spell to increase the emanation's radius by 10 feet.

Bless can counteract @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{Bane}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.RfCEHpMoEAZvB9IZ]{Aura: Bless}

Sanctuary.name:
庇护所
Sanctuary
Sanctuary.description:
你以防护能量守护一名生物，使其震慑攻击。生物每次尝试攻击目标时都必须进行一次意志豁免。若目标使用敌对动作，则法术结束。

大成功或大失败 圣域结束。

成功 该生物可以尝试进行其攻击，并且在本回合内可以对目标进行任何其他攻击。

失败 该生物无法攻击目标并浪费该动作。它在本回合内无法再尝试对目标进行进一步攻击。

大成功或大失败 该生物浪费该动作，并且在圣域的持续时间剩余期间无法尝试攻击目标。

You ward a creature with protective energy that deters attacks. Creatures attempting to attack the target must attempt a Will save each time. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends.

Critical Success Sanctuary ends.

Success The creature can attempt its attack and any other attacks against the target this turn.

Failure The creature can't attack the target and wastes the action. It can't attempt further attacks against the target this turn.

Critical Failure The creature wastes the action and can't attempt to attack the target for the rest of sanctuary's duration.

Haughty Obstinacy.name:
傲慢固执
Haughty Obstinacy
Haughty Obstinacy.description:
你强大的自我让他人更难对你发号施令。若你在对抗试图直接控制你动作的精神效果的豁免掷骰中掷出成功，则改为大成功或大失败。若某个生物用威吓对你进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce}的检定掷出失败，则改为大成功或大失败（因此它在1周内无法再次尝试对你进行Coerce）。

Your powerful ego makes it harder for others to order you around. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a mental effect that attempts to directly control your actions, you critically succeed instead. If a creature rolls a failure on a check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} you using Intimidation, it gets a critical failure instead (so it can't try to Coerce you again for 1 week).

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳背包而不是把它背在背上，它的负载为轻型而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水囊大约包含足够一名小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有足够时代去捕捉火花时很有用来生火，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗时代而不实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也需要至少使用3动作，而且往往要更久得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为一把临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一个卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Chain Shirt.name:
锁子衫
Chain Shirt
Chain Shirt.description:
这种护甲有时也被称为锁子甲衫，是一件由与锁子甲相同的金属环构成的长衫。然而，它比锁子甲轻得多，并且只保护穿戴者的躯干、上臂和大腿。

Sometimes called a hauberk, this is a long shirt constructed of the same metal rings as chainmail. However, it is much lighter than chainmail and protects only the torso, upper arms, and upper legs of its wearer.

Healer's Toolkit.name:
治疗者工具包
Healer's Toolkit
Healer's Toolkit.description:
这套由绷带、草药和缝合工具组成的工具包，是进行医学检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}所必需。若你佩戴你的治疗者工具包，你可以将其作为使用它的动作的一部分抽出并放回。

This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. If you wear your healer's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Religious Symbol (Wooden).name:
宗教圣徽（木制）
Religious Symbol (Wooden)
Religious Symbol (Wooden).description:
这件木制或银制物品上饰有一幅代表某位神祇的图像。一些神圣施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的宗教圣徽来运用某些能力并施放一些法术。宗教圣徽可以用链子或别针佩戴在身上，也可以手持。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Scimitar.name:
弯刀
Scimitar
Scimitar.description:
这把单手弯刃单侧开刃。

This one-handed curved blade is sharp on one side.

Sling.name:
投石索
Sling
Sling.description:
投石索不过是一个连接在一对带子上的皮革兜，可以用来将光滑的石子或投石弹投掷到射程内。

Little more than a leather cup attached to a pair of straps, a sling can be used to fling smooth stones or sling bullets at a range.

Sling Bullets.name:
投石索弹丸
Sling Bullets
Sling Bullets.description:
这些是小型金属球，通常由铁或铅制成，设计用于作为投石索的弹药。

These are small metal balls, typically either iron or lead, designed to be used as ammunition in slings.

Healing Potion (Minor).name:
治疗药水（次级）
Healing Potion (Minor)
Healing Potion (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般的深红液体，饮用者在伤口迅速愈合时会感到一阵刺痛感。当你饮用一瓶治疗药水时，你恢复[[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 生命值}。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain [[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 Hit Points}.

Versatile Human.name:
多才多艺的人类
Versatile Human
Versatile Human.description:
人类的多才多艺与雄心壮志推动了其崛起，使其成为世界各地大多数国家中最常见的族裔。在你满足先决条件的前提下，选择一个你自选的一般专长（与你的族裔专长一样，你可以在创建角色期间的任意时间选择该一般专长）。

Humanity's versatility and ambition have fueled its ascendance to be the most common ancestry in most nations throughout the world. Select a general feat of your choice for which you meet the prerequisites (as with your ancestry feat, you can select this general feat at any point during character creation).

Armor Proficiency (Light).name:
护甲熟练度（轻型）
Armor Proficiency (Light)
Armor Proficiency (Light).description:
你获得轻型护甲的受训级熟练度。如果你已经拥有轻型护甲的受训级熟练度，你获得中型护甲的受训级熟练度。如果两者你都已受训，你获得重型护甲的受训级熟练度。如果你至少为13级，你在该护甲类型上成为专家级熟练度。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次选择时，你会如上所述在下一种护甲类型上获得受训级熟练度。

You become trained in light armor. If you already were trained in light armor, you gain training in medium armor. If you were trained in both, you become trained in heavy armor. If you are at least 13th level, you become an expert in this armor type.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time, you become trained in the next type of armor, as detailed above.

Halfling.name:
半身人
Halfling
Halfling.description:
由于从不宣称任何地方属于自己，半身人所控制的聚居地很少有大于村庄的。相反，他们经常生活在人类之间、在更大城市的城墙之内，与更高大的族群并肩开辟出小型社区。许多半身人在更大邻居的阴影下过着十分充实的生活，而另一些则更偏好游牧式的生存方式，周游世界，随遇而安地把握机遇与冒险。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.voI7uPS9vsG74JIn]{半身人}

Claiming no place as their own, halflings control few settlements larger than villages. Instead, they frequently live among humans within the walls of larger cities, carving out small communities alongside taller folk. Many halflings lead perfectly fulfilling lives in the shadows of their larger neighbors, while others prefer a nomadic existence, traveling the world and taking advantage of opportunities and adventures as they come.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.voI7uPS9vsG74JIn]{Halfling}

Keen Eyes.name:
锐利之眼
Keen Eyes
Keen Eyes.description:
你的双眼极为敏锐，使你能够辨认出他人可能忽略的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 甚至 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形} 生物的细微细节。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻} 动作来寻找 30 尺内的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未侦测到} 生物时，你获得 +2 环境加值。当你以一个对你而言处于隐蔽或隐藏状态的对手为 目标 时，将纯骰检定的 DC 降低为：隐蔽 目标 为 3，隐藏 目标 为 9。

Your eyes are sharp, allowing you to make out small details about @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or even @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures that others might miss. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus when using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action to find @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creatures within 30 feet of you. When you target an opponent that is concealed from you or hidden from you, reduce the DC of the flat check to 3 for a concealed target or 9 for a hidden one.

Gutsy Halfling.name:
勇敢的半身人
Gutsy Halfling
Gutsy Halfling.description:
你的家族血脉以在危急时刻保持冷静并抵御恐惧而闻名。当你在对抗情绪效果的豁免掷骰中掷出成功时，你改为获得大成功。

Your family line is known for keeping a level head and staving off fear when the chips were down. When you roll a success on a saving throw against an emotion effect, you get a critical success instead.

Entertainer.name:
表演者
Entertainer
Entertainer.description:
通过艺术教育或纯粹顽强的练习，你学会了娱乐观众。你可能曾是演员、舞者、音乐家、街头魔术师，或任何其他类型的表演者。

选择两个属性提升。其中一个必须为敏捷或魅力，另一个为自由属性提升。

你受训于表演技能与剧院学识（技能）。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{Fascinating Performance} 技能专长。

Through an education in the arts or sheer dogged practice, you learned to entertain crowds. You might have been an actor, a dancer, a musician, a street magician, or any other sort of performer.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Performance skill and the Theater Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{Fascinating Performance} skill feat.

Fascinating Performance.name:
引人入胜的表演
Fascinating Performance
Fascinating Performance.description:
当你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{表演} 时，将你的结果与一名观察者的意志DC进行比较。若你成功，则目标因你而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷} 1轮。若该观察者正处于需要立即关注的情境中，例如战斗，则你必须大成功才能使其着迷，且表演动作获得失能（特征）。在你为检定掷骰之前，你必须选择你试图使其着迷的生物，随后该目标会在1小时内暂时免疫。

若你在表演上为专家，你最多能使四名观察者着迷；若你为大师，你最多能使10名观察者着迷；若你为传奇，你可以同时使任意数量的观察者着迷。

When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform}, compare your result to the Will DC of one observer. If you succeed, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by you for 1 round.
