If the observer is in a situation that demands immediate attention, such as combat, you must critically succeed to fascinate it and the Perform action gains the incapacitation trait. You must choose which creature you're trying to fascinate before you roll your check, and the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

If you're an expert in Performance, you can fascinate up to four observers; if you're a master, you can fascinate up to 10 observers; and if you're legendary, you can fascinate any number of observers at the same time.

Bard.name:
吟游诗人
Bard
Bard.description:
你是艺术大师，隐秘奥术的学者，也是魅力十足的说服者。你以强大的表演影响心智，将灵魂提升到全新的英雄境界。你可能运用自己的力量成为一位富有魅力的领袖；或者，你也可能成为顾问、操纵者、学者、恶棍，或技艺超群的演奏家。你的多才多艺使一些人认为你是个迷人的无赖、样样通却样样不精的人，但若把你当作样样不精的人而轻视你，可是很危险的。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.Tz0NWVqhZyt8EyUV]{吟游诗人}

You are a master of artistry, a scholar of hidden secrets, and a captivating persuader. Using powerful performances, you influence minds and elevate souls to new levels of heroics. You might use your powers to become a charismatic leader, or perhaps you might instead be a counselor, manipulator, scholar, scoundrel, or virtuoso. While your versatility leads some to consider you a beguiling ne'er-do-well and a jack-of-all-trades, it's dangerous to dismiss you as a master of none.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.Tz0NWVqhZyt8EyUV]{Bard}

Muses.name:
缪斯
Muses
Muses.description:
作为吟游诗人，你在第1等级时选择一位缪斯。这位缪斯会引领你走向伟大，且可能是你认识的某个人、一个超自然生物、某个地点、神祇、一种哲学，或引人入胜的谜团。根据你获得的灵感类型，你的第1等级缪斯会给予你一个特定的第1等级吟游诗人专长，并将一个法术加入你的曲目。

除此之外，每位缪斯都为你开启了许多后续的吟游诗人专长之门。如果某一种灵感类型不足以体现你的缪斯，考虑选择 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.a898miJnjgD93ZsX]{多才多艺的缪斯} 专长。

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.4ripp6EfdVpS0d60]{谜团}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.YMBsi4bndRAk5CX4]{大师}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.y0jGimYdMGDJWrEq]{博学者}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.N03BtRvjX9TeHRa4]{战士}

As a bard, you select one muse at 1st level. This muse leads you to great things and might be someone you know, a supernatural creature, location, deity, philosophy, or captivating mystery. Depending on the type of inspiration you receive, your 1st-level muse grants you a specific 1st-level bard feat and adds a spell to your repertoire.

In addition to this, each muse opens the door to many later bard feats. If one type of inspiration is not enough to represent your muse, consider the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.a898miJnjgD93ZsX]{Multifarious Muse} feat.

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.4ripp6EfdVpS0d60]{Enigma}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.YMBsi4bndRAk5CX4]{Maestro}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.y0jGimYdMGDJWrEq]{Polymath}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.N03BtRvjX9TeHRa4]{Warrior}

Composition Spells.name:
构奏法术
Composition Spells
Composition Spells.description:
你可以将魔法灌注进你的表演，从而创造出称为“作曲”的独特效果。作曲是一种特殊类型的法术，施放时通常需要你使用表演技能。作曲法术是一种聚能法术。施放一个聚能法术需要花费1聚能点，而你起始拥有一个包含1聚能点的聚能池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的聚能池，并且你可以花费10分钟使用再聚能（行动）来表演、写一段新的作曲，或以其他方式与缪斯互动，从而恢复1聚能点。

聚能法术会自动被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整），很像戏法。聚能法术不需要法术位，你也不能使用法术位来施放它们。选择专长可以让你获得更多聚能法术并增加你的聚能池的体型，不过你的聚能池最多永远不能容纳超过3聚能点。你学会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WILXkjU5Yq3yw10r]{Counter Performance}作曲法术，用以防护音波与视觉效果。

作曲戏法

作曲戏法是特殊的作曲法术，不会消耗聚能点，因此你可以随意使用。作曲戏法是在你以吟游诗人法术施展所选择的戏法之外额外获得的。不同于其他戏法，你不能在之后的等级更换通过吟游诗人专长获得的作曲戏法，除非你通过重训更换对应的特定专长。

你学会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IAjvwqgiDr3qGYxY]{Courageous Anthem}作曲戏法，它能提升你盟友的攻击、伤害，以及对抗恐惧的防御。

You can infuse your performances with magic to create unique effects called compositions. Compositions are a special type of spell that often require you to use the Performance skill when casting them. Composition spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to perform, write a new composition, or otherwise engage your muse.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points. You learn the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WILXkjU5Yq3yw10r]{Counter Performance} composition spell, protecting against auditory and visual effects.

Composition Cantrips

Composition cantrips are special composition spells that don't cost Focus Points, so you can use them as often as you like. Composition cantrips are in addition to the cantrips you choose with bard spellcasting. Unlike other cantrips, you can't swap out composition cantrips gained from bard feats at a later level, unless you swap out the specific feat via retraining.

You learn the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IAjvwqgiDr3qGYxY]{Courageous Anthem} composition cantrip, which boosts your allies' attacks, damage, and defense against fear.

Occult Spellcasting.name:
秘传施法
Occult Spellcasting
Occult Spellcasting.description:
你从秘传知识中汲取魔法。你可以使用施法（行动）来施放秘法法术，并且在施放法术时，你可以提供材料、姿势和言语成分。因为你是吟游诗人，你通常可以用演奏乐器来满足需要姿势或材料成分的法术，只要这样做至少需要占用你的一只手即可。如果你使用乐器，你就不需要材料成分袋或另一只空闲的手。你通常也可以用演奏乐器来满足需要言语成分的法术，而不是说话。

每天，你最多可以施放两个1环法术。你必须已知法术才能施放它们，并且你通过法术剧目职业特性来学习它们。你每天能施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为吟游诗人提升等级，你每日的法术数量会增加，你能施放的法术的最高环阶也会提高。

你的一些法术需要你尝试一次法术攻击掷骰来决定它们有多有效，或让你的敌人对抗你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键能力是魅力，你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC使用你的魅力调整值。

You draw upon magic from esoteric knowledge. You can cast occult spells using the Cast a Spell activity, and you can supply material, somatic, and verbal components when casting spells. Because you're a bard, you can usually play an instrument for spells requiring somatic or material components, as long as it takes at least one of your hands to do so. If you use an instrument, you don't need a material component pouch or another hand free. You can usually also play an instrument for spells requiring verbal components, instead of speaking.

Each day, you can cast up to two 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a bard, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack roll to see how effective they are, or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key ability is Charisma, your spell attack rolls and spell DCs use your Charisma modifier.

Spell Repertoire (Bard).name:
法术储备（吟游诗人）
Spell Repertoire (Bard)
Spell Repertoire (Bard).description:
你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术储备。于1级时，你学习两个由你选择的1环异能法术，以及五个由你选择的异能戏法。你从异能列表中的常见法术中选择这些法术，或从你拥有许可的其他异能法术中选择。你可以使用相应法术环位的法术位，来施放你法术储备中的任意法术。

随着你等级提升，你会把更多法术加入此法术储备。每当你获得一个法术位（见“吟游诗人每日法术”表），你便将一个同环位的法术加入你的法术储备。于2级时，你选择另一个1环法术；于3级时，你选择两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你可能会加入你已拥有的某个法术的更高环位版本，如此你便能施放该法术的升阶版本。

尽管它们获得的速率相同，你的法术位与法术储备中的法术是彼此独立的。若某个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术储备，它不会额外给予你另一个法术位，反之亦然。

替换你储备中的法术

当你在法术储备中获得新的法术时，你可能会想替换掉一些你先前学会的法术。每当你获得一个等级并学习新法术时，你可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个同环位的不同法术。此法术也可以是戏法。你也可以在休整模式期间通过重训来替换法术。

The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank occult spells of your choice and five occult cantrips of your choice. You choose these from the common spells from the occult list or from other occult spells to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot (see the Bard Spells per Day table), you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you select two 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells In Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Lingering Composition.name:
余音作曲
Lingering Composition
Lingering Composition.description:
你为你的乐曲增添一个花饰以延长其益处。若你下一动作是施放一个持续时间为1轮的戏法咏唱法术，尝试一次表演检定。DC通常为标准难度DC，其等级等同于你咏唱法术中等级最高的目标，但GM可以根据情况指定不同的DC。效果取决于你的检定结果。

大成功 该咏唱持续4轮。

成功 该咏唱持续3轮。

失败 该咏唱持续1轮，但你不会为施放此法术花费聚能点。

You add a flourish to your composition to extend its benefits. If your next action is to cast a cantrip composition with a duration of 1 round, attempt a Performance check. The DC is usually a standard-difficulty DC of a level equal to the highest-level target of your composition, but the GM can assign a different DC based on the circumstances. The effect depends on the result of your check.

Critical Success The composition lasts 4 rounds.

Success The composition lasts 3 rounds.

Failure The composition lasts 1 round, but you don't spend the Focus Point for casting this spell.

Maestro.name:
大师
Maestro
Maestro.description:
你的缪斯不断激励你迈向更高的艺术造诣。对许多吟游诗人而言，导师或宿敌会扮演这一角色，尽管有些人把目标定得更高，试图超越过去的伟大作曲家，或彻底开辟一条新的道路。若你的缪斯是一位超自然生物，它可能是热爱演出的那类，例如合唱天使或律拉凯恩阿扎塔；若是神祇，则可能是谢琳。由大师缪斯启发的艺术精准而富于创意，是形式主义的成就。

作为拥有大师缪斯的吟游诗人，你是盟友的灵感源泉，并且对自己的音乐与演说能力充满自信。

缪斯专长 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.sVjATEo8eqkAosNp]{Lingering Composition}

缪斯法术 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.szIyEsvihc5e1w8n]{Soothe}

Your muse constantly inspires you to greater heights of artistic prowess. For many bards, a teacher or rival fills this role, although some set their sights higher and attempt to surpass great composers of the past or blaze a new trail entirely. If your muse is a supernatural creature, it might be one who loves to perform, such as a choral angel or a lyrakien azata; if a deity, it might be Shelyn. Art inspired by a maestro muse is precise and inventive, a formalist achievement.

As a bard with a maestro muse, you are an inspiration to your allies and confident of your musical and oratorical abilities.

Muse Feat @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.sVjATEo8eqkAosNp]{Lingering Composition}

Muse Spell @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.szIyEsvihc5e1w8n]{Soothe}

Halfling Luck.name:
半身人好运
Halfling Luck
Halfling Luck.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你在一次技能检定或豁免掷骰中失败。

你乐天知命的天性让人觉得厄运似乎会避开你，而在某种程度上，这甚至可能是真的。你可以对触发的检定重骰，但你必须使用新的结果，即使它更糟。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail a skill check or saving throw.

Your happy-go-lucky nature makes it seem like misfortune avoids you, and to an extent, that might even be true. You can reroll the triggering check, but you must use the new result, even if it's worse.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的 负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳背包而不是把它背在背上，它的 负载为轻型而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Rope.name:
绳索
Rope
Rope.description:
50英尺长的绳索。

50 feet of rope.

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水袋大约装有足够一名小型或中型生物饮用1天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有足够时代去捕捉火花时对生火很有用，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗费时代而不实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也需要至少使用 3 动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为一件临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Padded Armor.name:
衬垫护甲
Padded Armor
Padded Armor.description:
这件护甲只是由一层厚重的绗缝布料构成，但有时因为非常便宜而被使用。软垫护甲比其他类型的护甲更容易受到损坏并被摧毁。重甲的价格中包含一件软垫护甲内衬，尽管在重甲下穿着时它会失去舒适特征。你可以只穿那件软垫护甲内衬来睡觉、在你的重甲被摧毁时穿着，或在其他未穿着完整重甲的情况下穿着。这使你能够保持魔法护甲已投入，并受益于与之关联的重甲上任何符文的力量，但没有软垫护甲内衬，其他人无法穿着你的重甲。

This armor is simply a layer of heavy, quilted cloth, but it is sometimes used because it's so inexpensive. Padded armor is easier to damage and destroy than other types of armor. Heavy armor comes with a padded armor undercoat included in its Price, though it loses the comfort trait when worn under heavy armor. You can wear just that padded armor undercoat to sleep in, if your heavy armor is destroyed, or when otherwise not wearing the full heavy armor. This allows you to keep magic armor invested and benefit from the power of any runes on the associated heavy armor, but no one else can wear your heavy armor without the padded undercoat.

Musical Instrument (Handheld).name:
乐器（手持）
Musical Instrument (Handheld)
Musical Instrument (Handheld).description:
手持乐器包括风笛、小型编钟、小鼓、小提琴与维奥尔琴、长笛与竖笛、小型竖琴、鲁特琴、小号，以及尺寸相近的乐器。GM 可能会裁定特别大的手持乐器（如大号）具有更高的负载。沉重的乐器，如大型鼓、整套编钟和键盘乐器，便携性较差，通常需要在演奏时保持固定不动。

Handheld instruments include bagpipes, a small set of chimes, small drums, fiddles and viols, flutes and recorders, small harps, lutes, trumpets, and similarly sized instruments. The GM might rule that an especially large handheld instrument (like a tuba) has greater Bulk. Heavy instruments such as large drums, a full set of chimes, and keyboard instruments are less portable and generally need to be stationary while played.

Thieves' Toolkit.name:
盗贼工具包
Thieves' Toolkit
Thieves' Toolkit.description:
你需要一套盗贼工具包才能使用贼活（技能）来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

如果你的盗贼工具包损坏了，你可以通过用适合你工具包的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{替换撬锁器}替换开锁器来修理它；这不需要使用修理动作。如果你佩戴你的盗贼工具包，你可以将其抽出并替换，作为使用它的动作的一部分。

You need a thieves' toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

If your thieves' toolkit is broken, you can repair it by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your toolkit; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Dread Ampoule (Lesser).name:
恐惧安瓿（次级）
Dread Ampoule (Lesser)
Dread Ampoule (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

这只烧瓶中装满了浑浊的紫色气体，会短暂干扰正常的脑部活动。一支恐惧安瓿造成 1d6 精神伤害与 1 点精神飞溅伤害。

命中时，目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}，大成功或大失败命中时则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。许多类型还会给予攻击检定的物品加值。

Activate A Strike

This flask is filled with a murky purple gas that briefly interferes with normal brain activity. A dread ampoule deals 1d6 mental damage and 1 mental splash damage.

On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit. Many types also grant an item bonus to attack rolls.

Arrows.name:
箭矢
Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行中由一端的羽翎稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Shortbow.name:
短弓
Shortbow
Shortbow.description:
这种较小的弓由一整块木头制成，受到散兵和骑兵的青睐。

This smaller bow is made of a single piece of wood and favored by skirmishers and cavalry.

Shortsword.name:
短剑
Shortsword
Shortsword.description:
这些刀刃有多种形状和风格，但它们通常长2英尺。

These blades come in a variety of shapes and styles, but they are typically 2 feet long.

Occult Focus Spells.name:
神秘专注法术
Occult Focus Spells

Counter Performance.name:
反制表演
Counter Performance
Counter Performance.description:
触发 你或60英尺内的一名盟友对一个听觉或视觉效果进行豁免掷骰。

你的表演保护你和你的盟友。为你所知的一种类型进行一次表演检定——若触发为听觉，则必须为听觉表演；若触发为视觉，则必须为视觉表演，并且该动作获得该表演类型的特征。你和区域内的盟友可以在你的表演检定结果与该豁免掷骰结果之间取较好者使用。

Trigger You or an ally within 60 feet rolls a saving throw against an auditory or visual effect.

Your performance protects you and your allies. Roll a Performance check for a type you know—it must be an auditory performance if the trigger was auditory or a visual one for a visual trigger, and this action gains the traits for the type of performance. You and allies in the area can use the better result between your Performance check and the saving throw.

Courageous Anthem.name:
勇气颂歌
Courageous Anthem
Courageous Anthem.description:
你用鼓舞的话语或曲调激励自己和盟友。你和区域内所有盟友在攻击检定、伤害检定，以及对抗恐惧效果的豁免检定上获得+1状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.beReeFroAx24hj83]{法术效果：英勇赞歌}

You inspire yourself and your allies with words or tunes of encouragement. You and all allies in the area gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, and saves against fear effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.beReeFroAx24hj83]{Spell Effect: Courageous Anthem}

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name:
神秘自发法术
Occult Spontaneous Spells

Daze.name:
木然
Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的心智，用精神冲击使其恍惚。该冲击造成1d6精神伤害，目标进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标在豁免中大失败，它还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You push into the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals 1d6 mental damage, with a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Figment.name:
虚象
Figment
Figment.description:
你创造一个简单的幻觉声响或影像。声响使该法术获得听觉（特征），且声响不能包含可理解的词语或复杂的音乐。影像使该法术获得视觉（特征），其尺寸不能大于一个5英尺立方体，并且若在15英尺内观看，会明显显得粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持法术时，你可以用该幻觉尝试进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造佯动}，使你的欺瞒检定获得+2环境加值。若该尝试对某个生物失败，则该生物不再相信该幻象。

You create a simple illusory sound or vision. A sound adds the auditory trait to the spell and the sound can't include intelligible words or elaborate music. A vision adds the visual trait, can be no larger than a 5-foot cube, and is clearly crude and undetailed if viewed from within 15 feet. When you Cast or Sustain the Spell, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} with the illusion, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to your Deception check. If the attempt fails against a creature, that creature disbelieves the figment.

Light.name:
光
Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光球，它以你选择的颜色在20尺半径内散发明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照）。如果你在同一空间内为一个自愿生物创造光照，你可以将光照附着在该生物上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮在其附近。你可以维持该法术以将光照移动至多60尺；你可以将其附着到一个生物上或从其上分离，作为此次移动的一部分。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在已经有四个光亮法术处于生效状态时施放该法术，你必须选择一个现有法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮}

升阶（4环） 光球在60尺半径内散发光照（并在接下来的60尺内提供昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Prestidigitation.name:
戏法
Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的命令。只要你维持该法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持该法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 冷却、加热或调味1磅的非生物材料。
  • 缓慢举起 将一件无人看管且负载为轻或更低的物体缓慢抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质构成。该物体外观粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——它不能用作工具、武器或法器，也不能作为法术的代价。
  • 整理 为一件负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以通过10轮专注影响一件负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则每点负载需要1分钟。

戏法小魔术 不能造成伤害或施加不利状况。对物体的任何实际改变（超出上述所注明的部分）只会在你维持该法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the spell. Each time you Sustain the spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or locus or cost for a spell.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the spell.

Telekinetic Projectile.name:
念动力投射物
Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你将一个在射程内的松散、无人持用的物体投掷向目标，该物体的负载为1或更低。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若你命中，你造成2d6钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——取决于你投掷的物体。被投掷的物品的任何特定特征或魔法属性都不会影响该攻击或伤害。

大成功或大失败 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成全额伤害。

升阶 (+1) 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal 2d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage--as appropriate for the object you hurled. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Charm.name:
魅惑
Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甘甜，你的面容仿佛笼罩在梦幻般的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友近期威胁过它，或对它使用过敌对动作，则此次豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。当该法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己被魅惑，除非它与您的友谊或你说服它采取的行为与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能可以通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它鉴别出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本为友善，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大成功或大失败：失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Fear.name:
恐惧
Fear
Fear.description:
你在目标心中种下恐惧；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Soothe.name:
安抚
Soothe
Soothe.description:
你抚慰目标的心灵，增强其心智防御并治疗其伤势。当你施放法术时，目标恢复1d10+4点生命值，并在持续时间内对抗心智效果的豁免获得+2状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{法术效果：安抚}

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加1d10+4。

You grace the target's mind, boosting its mental defenses and healing its wounds. The target regains 1d10+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell and gains a +2 status bonus to saves against mental effects for the duration.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{Spell Effect: Soothe}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d10+4.

Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).name:
盗贼工具包（替换撬锁钩）
Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks)
Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).description:
这些是用于替换 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{盗贼工具包} 的撬锁器。

These are replacement picks for a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{Thieves' Toolkit}.

Gnome.name:
侏儒
Gnome
Gnome.description:
很久以前，早期的侏儒祖先从第一世界——妖精的领域——迁徙而来。尽管最初的侏儒为何游荡到格拉利昂仍不清楚，但这一血脉在现代侏儒身上表现为古怪的推理方式、特立独行、强迫倾向，以及在一些人看来是天真。这些特质也进一步反映在他们的身体特征上，比如纤细的四肢、色彩鲜艳的头发，以及孩童般且极为富有表现力的面部特征，更加体现了他们超凡脱俗的起源。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.qIu10HByKeRaPPvD]{侏儒}

Long ago, early gnome ancestors emigrated from the First World, realm of the fey. While it's unclear why the first gnomes wandered to Golarion, this lineage manifests in modern gnomes as bizarre reasoning, eccentricity, obsessive tendencies, and what some see as naivete. These qualities are further reflected in their physical characteristics, such as spindly limbs, brightly colored hair, and childlike and extremely expressive facial features that further reflect their otherworldly origins.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.qIu10HByKeRaPPvD]{Gnome}

Sensate Gnome.name:
感知侏儒
Sensate Gnome
Sensate Gnome.description:
你看到的所有颜色都更明亮，听到的所有声音都更丰富，尤其能以难以置信的细节嗅到所有气味。你获得一种特殊感官：不精确嗅觉，射程为30英尺。这意味着你可以使用嗅觉来确定生物的确切位置。如果你位于生物的下风处，GM通常会将射程加倍；如果你位于上风处，则通常将射程减半。

此外，每当你试图定位位于你嗅觉射程内的未侦测生物时，你在察觉检定上获得+2环境加值。

You see all colors as brighter, hear all sounds as richer, and especially smell all scents with incredible detail. You gain a special sense: imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet. This means you can use your sense of smell to determine the exact location of a creature. The GM will usually double the range if you're downwind from the creature or halve the range if you're upwind.

In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks whenever you're trying to locate an undetected creature that is within the range of your scent.

Herbalist.name:
草药师
Herbalist
Herbalist.description:
作为一名受过正规训练的药剂师或乡村的民间医者，你学习了各种草药的治疗特性。你擅长在各类环境中采集正确的天然疗法并将其妥善制备。

选择两个属性提升。一个必须为体质或感知，另一个为自由属性提升。

你受训于自然（技能）和草药学识（技能）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WC4xLBGmBsdOdHWu]{Natural Medicine}技能专长。

As a formally trained apothecary or a rural practitioner of folk medicine, you learned the healing properties of various herbs. You're adept at collecting the right natural cures in all sorts of environments and preparing them properly.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Constitution or Wisdom, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Nature skill and the Herbalism Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.WC4xLBGmBsdOdHWu]{Natural Medicine} skill feat.

Natural Medicine.name:
自然医学
Natural Medicine
Natural Medicine.description:
你可以运用自然疗法来治疗你的盟友。你可以用自然取代医疗来进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}，包括更高的自然熟练度允许你尝试更困难的检定。它不会取代医疗在除治疗伤口以外的其他技能用途，或用于专长先决条件。

如果你身处荒野，你可能更容易取得新鲜材料，使你在使用自然进行治疗伤口的检定上获得+2环境加值，具体取决于GM的裁定。

You can apply natural cures to heal your allies. You can use Nature instead of Medicine to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}, including higher Nature proficiency letting you attempt more difficult checks. It doesn't replace Medicine for uses of the skill other than Treat Wounds or for feat prerequisites.

If you're in the wilderness, you might have easier access to fresh ingredients, allowing you to gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your check to Treat Wounds using Nature, subject to the GM's determination.

Druid.name:
德鲁伊
Druid
Druid.description:
大自然的力量无法抗拒。它能在数分钟内摧毁最坚固的堡垒，将哪怕最宏伟的造物化为瓦砾，将其焚为灰烬，把它们埋在雪崩之下，或将其淹没于浪涛之中。它能为尊重它的人带来无尽的馈赠与令人屏息的壮丽——而为轻视它的人带来痛苦的死亡。你是那些听见自然召唤的人之一。你敬畏其力量的威严，并将自己奉献于它的使命。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.8ElntNAGahQka70r]{德鲁伊}

The power of nature is impossible to resist. It can bring ruin to the stoutest fortress in minutes, reducing even the mightiest works to rubble, burning them to ash, burying them beneath an avalanche of snow, or drowning them beneath the waves. It can provide endless bounty and breathtaking splendor to those who respect it—and an agonizing death to those who take it too lightly. You are one of those who hear nature's call. You stand in awe of the majesty of its power and give yourself over to its service.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.8ElntNAGahQka70r]{Druid}

Druidic Order.name:
德鲁伊教团
Druidic Order
Druidic Order.description:
当你成为一名德鲁伊时，你会与一个德鲁伊教团结盟，该教团会给予你一个职业专长、一个教团法术（见下文），以及一个与教团相关的额外受训技能。虽然你永远都会是你最初教团的成员，但德鲁伊为了更深入理解自然世界而请求跟随其他教团学习也并不少见，而玩家角色德鲁伊更是最有可能融合不同教团的力量。

教团法术是一种聚能法术。施放一个聚能法术需要花费1点聚能点，而你起始拥有一个包含1点聚能点的聚能池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的聚能池；此外，你可以花费10分钟使用再聚能（行动），与当地自然灵交流，或以符合你教团的方式照料荒野，从而恢复1点聚能点。

聚能法术会自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整），类似戏法。聚能法术不需要法术位，而且你也不能使用法术位来施放它们。某些专长会给予你更多聚能法术。你的聚能池所能容纳的最大聚能点数等于你拥有的聚能法术数量，但永远不能超过3点。

教团技能 你在列出的技能上成为受训。如果你已经在该技能上受训，你会在你选择的另一项技能上成为受训。

德鲁伊专长 你获得该1级德鲁伊专长作为加值专长。

教团法术 你在1级时自动获得列出的教团法术。

禁忌 将此禁忌加入所有德鲁伊的禁忌之中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.POBvoXifa9HaejAg]{动物教团}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.NdeFvIXdHwKYLiUj]{烈焰教团}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.u4nlOzPj2WHkIj9l]{绿叶教团}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.fKTewWlYgFuhl4KA]{磐石教团}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.acqqlYmti8D9QJi0]{风暴教团}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.v0EjtiwdeMj8ykI0]{野性教团}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.FuUXyv2yBs7zRgqT]{波涛教团}

Upon becoming a druid, you align yourself with a druidic order, which grants you a class feat, an order spell (see below), and an additional trained skill tied to your order While you'll always be a member of your initial order, it's not unheard of for a druid to request to study with other orders in search of greater understanding of the natural world, and PC druids are among the most likely to blend the powers of different orders.

Order spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to commune with local nature spirits or otherwise tend to the wilderness in a way befitting your order.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Certain feats give you more focus spells. The maximum Focus Points your focus pool can hold is equal to the number of focus spells you have, but can never be more than 3 points.

Order Skill You become trained in the listed skill. If you're already trained in that skill, you become trained in a different skill of your choice.

Druid Feat You gain this 1st-level druid feat as a bonus feat.

Order Spell You automatically gain the listed order spell at 1st level.

Anathema Add this anathema to those for all druids.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.POBvoXifa9HaejAg]{Animal Order}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.NdeFvIXdHwKYLiUj]{Flame Order}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.u4nlOzPj2WHkIj9l]{Leaf Order}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.fKTewWlYgFuhl4KA]{Stone Order}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.acqqlYmti8D9QJi0]{Storm Order}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.v0EjtiwdeMj8ykI0]{Untamed Order}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.FuUXyv2yBs7zRgqT]{Wave Order}

Voice of Nature.name:
自然之声
Voice of Nature
Voice of Nature.description:
你获得以下之一由你选择的德鲁伊专长：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.cg816q76S5otM7yD]{Animal Empathy} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ahyQpMVDIqhvXkQ4]{Plant Empathy}。

You gain your choice of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.cg816q76S5otM7yD]{Animal Empathy} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ahyQpMVDIqhvXkQ4]{Plant Empathy} druid feat.

Anathema (Druid).name:
禁忌（德鲁伊）
Anathema (Druid)
Anathema (Druid).description:
作为自然秩序的守护者，德鲁伊（职业）认为对自然的冒犯是禁忌。若你反复执行这些行为，你将失去来自德鲁伊（职业）职业的魔法能力，包括你的德鲁伊法术施放以及你所属教团的益处。只有当你通过一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone}仪式来展现你的悔过时，才能重新获得这些能力。以下行为对所有德鲁伊（职业）都是禁忌。

禁忌 亵渎自然场所，消耗超过你舒适生活所需的自然资源，将荒野之歌教授给非德鲁伊（职业）。

你所选择的德鲁伊教团会增加更多禁忌，如该教团条目中所详述。

As stewards of the natural order, druids find affronts to nature anathema. If you repeatedly perform these acts, you lose your magical abilities from the druid class, including your druid spellcasting and the benefits of your order. These abilities can be regained only if you demonstrate your repentance with an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual. The following acts are anathema to all druids.

Anathema despoil natural places, consume more natural resources than you require to live comfortably, teach the Wildsong to non-druids.

Your choice of druidic order adds further anathema, as detailed in the order's entry.

Druid Spellcasting.name:
德鲁伊法术施放
Druid Spellcasting
Druid Spellcasting.description:
荒野世界的力量流经你体内。你是一名施法者，并且可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放法术} 行动来施放原初根源的法术。作为德鲁伊，你的施法咒文可能是对周遭环境的祈求，或是对古老誓言的祷唤；你的双手可能如柳枝般摇摆，或蜷成爪状，因为你的手势引导着你的魔法。在1级时，你每天清晨可以从原初法术列表中的通用法术里准备两个1环法术与五个戏法，或从你获得许可并通过“学习法术”学会的其他原初法术中进行选择。已准备的法术会一直可供你使用，直到你施放它们，或直到你再次准备法术为止。你每天可准备的法术数量被称为你的法术位。

当你作为德鲁伊提升等级时，你每天可准备的法术数量会增加，你能施放的最高法术环阶也会提高，如“德鲁伊每日法术”表所示。

你的一些法术需要你尝试一次法术攻击来判断其效果如何，或让你的敌人对抗你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键属性是感知，你的法术攻击调整和法术DC使用你的感知调整值。

升阶法术

当你获得2环及更高环阶的法术位时，你可以用更强版本的低环阶法术来填充这些法术位。这会提高该法术的环阶，使其升阶以匹配法术位。许多法术在被升阶到特定环阶时会获得明确的增强效果。

戏法

你的一些法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不会消耗法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天不限次数。戏法总是自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）——这通常等同于你所拥有的最高德鲁伊法术位的环阶。例如，作为1级德鲁伊，你的戏法是1环法术；而5级德鲁伊的戏法则为3环。

The power of the wild world flows through you. You are a spellcaster and can cast spells of the primal tradition using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast a Spell} activity. As a druid, your spellcasting incantations might be pleas to the environment around you or the invocation of ancient vows; your hands might sway like willows or curl into clawlike shapes as your gestures direct your magic. At 1st level, you can prepare two 1st-rank spells and five cantrips each morning from the common spells on the primal spell list, or from other primal spells to which you gain access and learn via Learn a Spell. Prepared spells remain available to you until you cast them or until you prepare your spells again. The number of spells you can prepare each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a druid, the number of spells you can prepare each day increases, as does the highest rank of spell you can cast, as shown in the Druid Spells per Day table.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are, or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key attribute is Wisdom, your spell attack modifier and spell DC use your Wisdom modifier.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank, heightening it to match the spell slot. Many spells have specific improvements when they are heightened to certain ranks.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of druid spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level druid, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and a 5th-level druid's are 3rd rank.

Shield Block.name:
盾牌格挡
Shield Block
Shield Block.description:
触发 当你举起盾牌时，你将因一次攻击而受到物理伤害（钝击、穿刺或挥砍）。

你迅速将盾牌就位以抵御一击。你的盾牌使你免于承受至多等同于盾牌硬度的伤害。你和盾牌各自承受任何剩余伤害，可能会使盾牌破损或被摧毁。

Trigger While you have your shield raised, you would take physical damage (bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing) from an attack.

You snap your shield in place to ward off a blow. Your shield prevents you from taking an amount of damage up to the shield's Hardness. You and the shield each take any remaining damage, possibly breaking or destroying the shield.

Wildsong.name:
狂野之歌
Wildsong
Wildsong.description:
除了你通过你的族裔所知的任何语言之外，你还知晓荒野之歌，这是一种仅在德鲁伊教团内部知晓的秘密语言。荒野之歌是一种旋律性与音调性的语言，听起来更像动物的鸣叫而非口语，而其字母表涉及分形与螺旋，如同海贝腔室的排列、雪花的晶体，或蕨类的叶状体。将荒野之歌传授给非德鲁伊者是禁忌。

You know the Wildsong, a secret language known only within druid orders, in addition to any languages you know through your ancestry. The Wildsong is a melodic and tonal language sounding more like animal calls than a spoken tongue, and its alphabet involves fractals and spirals, like the arrangement of a seashell's chambers, a snowflake's crystals, or a fern's fronds. Teaching the Wildsong to non-druids is anathema.

Animal Companion.name:
动物伙伴
Animal Companion
Animal Companion.description:
你获得一名年轻的动物伙伴为你效劳，它在你的冒险中与你同行，并在其能力范围内尽可能服从你给予它的任何简单命令。

You gain the service of a young animal companion that travels with you on your adventures and obeys any simple commands you give it to the best of its abilities.

Animal Order.name:
动物结社
Animal Order
Animal Order.description:
你与野兽有着深厚的联结，总觉得自己比同族更能理解它们（它们也更能理解你）。你为自然界的动物挺身而出，一位强大的动物伙伴伴你左右。

结社技能 Athletics

德鲁伊专长 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.f2Pl5dWEL9ZvEyI1]{Animal Companion}

结社法术 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Zmh4ynfnCtwKeAYl]{Heal Animal}

禁忌 对动物施以肆意残忍，或无必要地杀害动物。（这并不妨碍你对动物进行自卫，或为了食物而干净利落地猎杀它们。）

You have a strong connection to beasts, always feeling like you understood them (and they you) better than your own people. You stand for the animals of nature, a powerful animal companion at your side.

Order Skill Athletics

Druid Feat @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.f2Pl5dWEL9ZvEyI1]{Animal Companion}

Order Spell @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Zmh4ynfnCtwKeAYl]{Heal Animal}

Anathema Commit wanton cruelty to animals or kill animals unnecessarily. (This doesn't prevent you from defending yourself against animals or killing them cleanly for food).

Animal Empathy.name:
动物共情
Animal Empathy
Animal Empathy.description:
你与自然世界的生物有着联系，使你能够以基础的方式与它们交流。你可以向动物提问、从它们那里获得回答，并对动物使用交涉（技能）。在大多数情况下，野生动物会给你时代来陈述你的理由。

You have a connection to the creatures of the natural world that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals. In most cases, wild animals will give you time to make your case.

Gnome Obsession.name:
侏儒执念
Gnome Obsession
Gnome Obsession.description:
你也许天性浮躁，但当某个话题吸引了你的注意力，你会一头扎进去。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 专长，以及为所选的学识获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{把握十足} 专长。由于侏儒的痴迷可能来得快去得也快，你可以在 1 天的休整模式中将侏儒痴迷重训为不同的学识子类别。

You might have a flighty nature, but when a topic captures your attention, you dive into it headfirst. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance} feat for the chosen Lore. As gnome obsessions can come and go quickly, you can retrain Gnome Obsession to a different Lore subcategory in 1 day of downtime.

Additional Lore.name:
额外学识
Additional Lore
Additional Lore.description:
你的知识已经扩展到涵盖一个新领域。选择一个学识（技能）子类别。你在该子类别中变为受训。在第3、第7和第15级时，你获得一次额外的技能提升，但只能应用于所选的学识（技能）子类别。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你都必须选择一个新的学识（技能）子类别，并且在所列等级时，你获得针对该子类别的额外技能提升。

Your knowledge has expanded to encompass a new field. Choose a Lore skill subcategory. You become trained in it. At 3rd, 7th, and 15th levels, you gain an additional skill increase you can apply only to the chosen Lore subcategory.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you must select a new subcategory of Lore and you gain the additional skill increases to that subcategory for the listed levels.

Assurance (Forest Lore).name:
把握（森林学识）
Assurance (Forest Lore)
Assurance (Forest Lore).description:
即使在最恶劣的情况下，你也能执行基本任务。选择一个你已受训的技能。你可以放弃为该技能进行技能检定的掷骰，改为获得一个结果：10 + 你的熟练度加值（不适用任何其他加值、减值或调整值）。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次选择时，选择一个不同的技能，并获得该技能的益处。

Even in the worst circumstances, you can perform basic tasks. Choose a skill you're trained in. You can forgo rolling a skill check for that skill to instead receive a result of 10 + your proficiency bonus (do not apply any other bonuses, penalties, or modifiers).

Special You can select this feat multiple times. Each time, choose a different skill and gain the benefits for that skill.

Primal Focus Spells.name:
原初专注法术
Primal Focus Spells

Heal Animal.name:
治疗动物
Heal Animal
Heal Animal.description:
你治疗一只动物的伤口，使目标恢复 1d8 生命值。施放此法术所花费的动作数决定其效果。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (concentrate) 该法术的射程为30英尺，并使目标额外恢复 8 生命值。

升阶 (+1) 治疗量增加 1d8，而2动作版本的额外治疗增加 8。

You heal an animal's wounds, restoring 1d8 Hit Points to the target. The number of actions spent Casting this Spell determines its effect.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet and restores an additional 8 Hit Points to the target.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d8, and the additional healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Primal Prepared Spells.name:
原初预备法术
Primal Prepared Spells

Detect Magic.name:
侦测魔法
Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以登记魔法的存在。除了魔法存在与否之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。你只能在该魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术位阶时，才会侦测到幻术系魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强大魔法效果的位阶或等级，由GM裁定。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你也能锁定最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但能将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体范围内（若来源大于该范围，则缩小到最近的一个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Electric Arc.name:
电弧
Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跃向另一个。每个目标受到2d4电击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. Each target takes 2d4 electricity damage with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Ignition.name:
点燃
Ignition
Ignition.description:
你打个响指并指向一个目标，目标开始阴燃。对目标的AC进行一次法术攻击掷骰，命中则造成2d4火焰伤害。如果目标在你的近战触及内，你可以选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击而非远程法术攻击，这会将该法术所有的伤害骰提升为d6。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标受到双倍伤害并受到1d4持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标受到全部伤害。

升阶（+1） 初始伤害增加1d4，且大成功或大失败命中时的持续火焰伤害增加1d4。

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,fire]]]{分级持续火焰伤害}

[[/r (@item.level)d6[persistent,fire]]]{分级持续火焰伤害（近战）}

You snap your fingers and point at a target, which begins to smolder. Make a spell attack roll against the target's AC, dealing 2d4 fire damage on a hit. If the target is within your melee reach, you can choose to make a melee spell attack with the flame instead of a ranged spell attack, which increases all the spell's damage dice to d6s.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and 1d4 persistent fire damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

Heightened (+1) The initial damage increases by 1d4 and the persistent fire damage on a critical hit increases by 1d4.

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,fire]]]{Leveled Persistent Fire Damage}

[[/r (@item.level)d6[persistent,fire]]]{Leveled Persistent Fire Damage (Melee)}

Stabilize.name:
稳定
Stabilize
Stabilize.description:
生命能量关上死亡之门。目标失去 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} 状态，不过其在 0 生命值时仍保持 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 状态。

Life energy shuts death's door. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition, though it remains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} at 0 Hit Points.

Tangle Vine.name:
纠缠藤蔓
Tangle Vine
Tangle Vine.description:
一条藤蔓凭空出现，从你手中甩出并抽打着缠绕住目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠绕藤蔓}

大成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）} 状态，并在 1 轮内其速度受到 –10 尺环境减值。它可以尝试对抗你的法术DC进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 以移除该减值与禁足（状态）。

成功 目标在 1 轮内其速度受到 –10 尺环境减值。它可以尝试对抗你的法术DC进行逃脱以移除该减值。

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 效果持续 2 轮。

升阶（4环） 效果持续 1 分钟。

A vine appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack roll against the target.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tangle Vine}

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the immobilized condition.

Success The target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Heal.name:
治疗
Heal
Heal.description:
你引导生命能量来治疗活物或伤害不死生物。若目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复1d8点生命值。若目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的生命力伤害，并且它进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域及其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (concentrate) 该法术的射程为30尺。若你在治疗一个活体生物，生命值恢复量增加8点。

3 (concentrate) 你在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内散布生命能量。这以爆发内所有活体与不死生物为目标。

升阶 (+1) 治疗或伤害的数值增加1d8，并且2动作版本的额外治疗增加8点。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Runic Body.name:
符文之躯
Runic Body
Runic Body.description:
发光的符文出现在目标的身体上。其所有徒手攻击都变为+1 striking徒手攻击，获得对攻击检定的+1物品加值，并将伤害骰数量增加至两个。

升阶（6环） 徒手攻击为+2 greater striking。

升阶（9环） 徒手攻击为+3 major striking。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MqZ6FScbfGtXB8tt]{法术效果：符文之躯}

Glowing runes appear on the target's body. All its unarmed attacks become +1 striking unarmed attacks, gaining a +1 item bonus to attack rolls and increasing the number of damage dice to two.

Heightened (6th) The unarmed attacks are +2 greater striking.

Heightened (9th) The unarmed attacks are +3 major striking.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MqZ6FScbfGtXB8tt]{Spell Effect: Runic Body}

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载 的物品，其中前 2 负载 的这些物品不计入你的 负载 限制。如果你是提着或收纳该背包，而不是把它背在背上，它的 负载 为轻型而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水囊大约包含足够供一名小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有足够的时代去捕捉火花时很有用来生火，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗费时代而不切实际。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也至少需要使用3 动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Buckler.name:
圆盾
Buckler
Buckler.description:
这面非常小的盾牌是决斗者以及敏捷、轻甲战士的最爱。它通常由钢制成，并绑在你的前臂上。只要你那只手空着，或那只手拿着一个不是武器的轻型物体，你就可以用你的圆盾 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{举起盾牌}。

硬度 HP BT
3 6 3

This very small shield is a favorite of duelists and quick, lightly armored warriors. It's typically made of steel and strapped to your forearm. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{Raise a Shield} with your buckler as long as you have that hand free or are holding a light object that's not a weapon in that hand.

Hardness HP BT
3 6 3

Antidote (Lesser).name:
解毒剂（次级）
Antidote (Lesser)
Antidote (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

解毒剂保护你免受毒素侵害。饮用解毒剂后，你在对抗毒药的强韧豁免检定上获得+2物品加值，持续6小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7z1iY4AaNEAIKuAU]{效果：解毒剂（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7z1iY4AaNEAIKuAU]{Effect: Antidote (Lesser)}

Healing Potion (Minor).name:
治疗药水（次级）
Healing Potion (Minor)
Healing Potion (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般的红色液体，饮用者的伤口迅速愈合时会感到一阵刺痛。当你饮用一瓶治疗药水时，你恢复[[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8生命值}。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain [[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 Hit Points}.

Sling Bullets.name:
投石索弹丸
Sling Bullets
Sling Bullets.description:
这些是小型金属球，通常由铁或铅制成，被设计用于作为投石索的弹药。

These are small metal balls, typically either iron or lead, designed to be used as ammunition in slings.

Padded Armor.name:
软垫护甲
Padded Armor
Padded Armor.description:
这种护甲不过是一层厚重的绗缝布料，但有时因为非常便宜而被使用。衬垫护甲比其他类型的护甲更容易受损和被摧毁。重型护甲的价格中包含一件衬垫护甲内衬，不过当它穿在重型护甲下面时，会失去舒适特征。若你的重型护甲被摧毁、或在其他不穿整套重型护甲的时候，你可以只穿这件衬垫护甲内衬来睡觉。这让你可以继续让魔法护甲保持灌注，并从相关重型护甲上的任何符文力量中获益，但没有这件衬垫内衬，其他人无法穿上你的重型护甲。

This armor is simply a layer of heavy, quilted cloth, but it is sometimes used because it's so inexpensive. Padded armor is easier to damage and destroy than other types of armor. Heavy armor comes with a padded armor undercoat included in its Price, though it loses the comfort trait when worn under heavy armor. You can wear just that padded armor undercoat to sleep in, if your heavy armor is destroyed, or when otherwise not wearing the full heavy armor. This allows you to keep magic armor invested and benefit from the power of any runes on the associated heavy armor, but no one else can wear your heavy armor without the padded undercoat.

Sling.name:
投石索
Sling
Sling.description:
投石索不过是一个连接在一对带子上的皮革杯，可以用来将光滑的石子或投石索弹丸投掷到射程内。

Little more than a leather cup attached to a pair of straps, a sling can be used to fling smooth stones or sling bullets at a range.

Sickle.name:
镰刀
Sickle
Sickle.description:
最初是一种用于收割谷物的农具，这种单手武器有一个短木柄，末端是一片弯曲的刀刃，有时两侧都开刃。

Originally a farming tool used for reaping grain, this one-handed weapon has a short wooden handle ending in a curved blade, sometimes sharpened on both sides.

Healer's Toolkit.name:
医者工具包
Healer's Toolkit
Healer's Toolkit.description:
这套由绷带、草药和缝合工具组成的工具包是进行医疗检定所必需的，用于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{施行急救}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}。如果你佩戴你的医者工具包，你可以将其抽出并放回，作为使用它的动作的一部分。

This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. If you wear your healer's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Elf.name:
精灵
Elf
Elf.description:
作为一个古老的族群，精灵见证了巨大的变迁，并拥有唯有观望历史弧线方能获得的视角。在远古时代离开这个世界之后，他们回到了一个已然改变的土地，而他们仍在努力夺回祖先的家园，最显著的是从入侵其部分领土的可怕恶魔手中夺回。对某些人而言，精灵令人敬畏——优雅而美丽，拥有非凡的天赋与知识。然而在精灵内部，相较于符合这些理想，他们更看重个人自由。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.3cfdiId1IoxLsF9V]{精灵}

As an ancient people, elves have seen great change and have the perspective that can come only from watching the arc of history. After leaving the world in ancient times, they returned to a changed land, and they still struggle to reclaim their ancestral homes, most notably from terrible demons that have invaded parts of their lands. To some, the elves are objects of awe—graceful and beautiful, with immense talent and knowledge. Among themselves, however, the elves place far more importance on personal freedom than on living up to these ideals.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.3cfdiId1IoxLsF9V]{Elf}

Whisper Elf.name:
低语精灵
Whisper Elf
Whisper Elf.description:
你的听觉经过精细调校，甚至能捕捉到最轻微的低语声。你在使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} 动作寻找你30尺内的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} 生物时，获得+2环境加值。当你以一个对你而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} 或对你而言处于 hidden 状态的对手为目标时，将纯骰检定的DC降低为：隐蔽目标为3，hidden目标为9。若你无法听见，或该生物无法发出声音（例如其受 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{Silence} 法术影响），则此增益不适用。

Your ears are finely tuned, able to detect even the slightest whispers of sound. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus when using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action to find @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creatures within 30 feet of you. When you target an opponent that is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from you or hidden from you, reduce the DC of the flat check to 3 for a concealed target or 9 for a hidden one. This benefit doesn't apply if you can't hear or if the creature is incapable of making sound (for example, if it's affected by a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{Silence} spell).

Criminal.name:
罪犯
Criminal
Criminal.description:
作为一个无所顾忌的独行者，或作为地下组织的一员，你过着犯罪生活。你可能为了寻求救赎、逃避法律，或只是为了获得更大更好的战利品而成为一名冒险者。

选择两项属性提升。一项必须为敏捷或智力，另一项为自由属性提升。

你受训于隐秘（技能）和黑社会学识（技能）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.t3btih0O5RUwWynt]{老练走私者}技能专长。

As an unscrupulous independent or as a member of an underworld organization, you lived a life of crime. You might have become an adventurer to seek redemption, to escape the law, or simply to get access to bigger and better loot.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Intelligence, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Stealth skill and the Underworld Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.t3btih0O5RUwWynt]{Experienced Smuggler} skill feat.

Experienced Smuggler.name:
经验丰富的走私者
Experienced Smuggler
Experienced Smuggler.description:
你经常将东西走私过当局的检查。当GM掷骰你的隐匿检定以查看被动观察者是否注意到你已@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}的一件小型物品时，GM使用所掷出的点数或10——取较高者——作为你的掷骰结果，并将其加入你的隐匿调整值以决定你的隐匿检定结果。若你在隐匿上为大师，GM改用所掷出的点数或15；若你在隐匿上为传奇，你在对被动观察者隐藏一件小型隐蔽物品时自动成功。此能力在生物主动搜查你以寻找@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}物品并进行一次察觉检定时不提供任何好处。

PFS注记 此专长允许你使用黑道学识以你等级-1（而非通常的等级-2）的任务来赚取收入。

You often smuggle things past the authorities. When the GM rolls your Stealth check to see if a passive observer notices a small item you've @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, the GM uses the number rolled or 10—whichever is higher—as the result of your die roll, adding it to your Stealth modifier to determine your Stealth check result. If you're a master in Stealth, the GM uses the number rolled or 15, and if you're legendary in Stealth, you automatically succeed at hiding a small concealed item from passive observers. This provides no benefits when a creature attempts a Perception check while actively searching you for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} items.

PFS Note This feat allows you to Earn Income with Underworld Lore with tasks of your level -1 (instead of the normal level -2).

Rogue.name:
游荡者
Rogue
Rogue.description:
你技艺娴熟且善于抓住时机。凭借敏锐的机智与迅捷的反应，你会利用对手的失误，在最痛的地方下手。你在玩一场危险的游戏，追求刺激并磨炼自己的技巧，而且很可能不会太在意任何恰好挡你路的法律。尽管每位游荡者的道路都独一无二、遍布险境，但你们共同拥有的一点，是你们技能的广度与深度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.u4qPrDRBagxG9wj8]{游荡者}

You are skilled and opportunistic. Using your sharp wits and quick reactions, you take advantage of your opponents' missteps and strike where it hurts most. You play a dangerous game, seeking thrills and testing your skills, and likely don't care much for any laws that happen to get in your way. While the path of every rogue is unique and riddled with danger, the one thing you all share in common is the breadth and depth of your skills.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.u4qPrDRBagxG9wj8]{Rogue}

Rogue's Racket.name:
盗贼门道
Rogue's Racket
Rogue's Racket.description:
你已开始发展你的技巧与对工作的处理方式，同时在盗贼圈子里建立起你的声誉。从以下列表中选择一个游荡者流派。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.D8qtAo2w4jsqjBrM]{奥术诡术师}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RyOkmu0W9svavuAB]{策士}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.3KPZ7svIO6kmmEKH]{恶棍}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.ZvfxtUMtfIOLYHyg]{无赖}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.wAh2riuFRzz0edPl]{窃贼}

You've begun to develop your techniques and approach to a job, while building your reputation in rogues' circles. Choose a rogue's racket from the list below.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.D8qtAo2w4jsqjBrM]{Eldritch Trickster}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.RyOkmu0W9svavuAB]{Mastermind}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.3KPZ7svIO6kmmEKH]{Ruffian}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.ZvfxtUMtfIOLYHyg]{Scoundrel}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.wAh2riuFRzz0edPl]{Thief}

Sneak Attack.name:
偷袭
Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
当你的敌人无法正确防御自己时，你会趁机造成额外伤害。若你以灵巧或灵敏的近战武器、灵巧或灵敏的徒手攻击、远程武器攻击或远程徒手攻击对具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}状态的生物进行打击，你会额外造成1d6精准伤害。若为使用投掷近战武器的远程攻击，该武器也必须为灵巧或灵敏。

随着你的游荡者等级提升，你的偷袭攻击的伤害骰数量也会增加。在第5、11与17等级时，将伤害骰数量各增加1个。

When your enemy can't properly defend itself, you take advantage to deal extra damage. If you Strike a creature that has the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition with an agile or finesse melee weapon, an agile or finesse unarmed attack, a ranged weapon attack, or a ranged unarmed attack, you deal an extra 1d6 precision damage. For a ranged attack with a thrown melee weapon, that weapon must also be agile or finesse.

As your rogue level increases, so does the number of damage dice for your sneak attack. Increase the number of dice by one at 5th, 11th, and 17th levels.

Surprise Attack.name:
奇袭
Surprise Attack
Surprise Attack.description:
你比敌人反应更快地投入战斗。在战斗的第1轮中，如果你为先攻掷骰时使用欺瞒或隐匿，则尚未行动的生物对你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

You spring into combat faster than foes can react. On the first round of combat, if you roll Deception or Stealth for initiative, creatures that haven't acted are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to you.

Thief.name:
盗贼
Thief
Thief.description:
没有什么比拿走属于别人的东西更令人兴奋。你可能是个在街头讨生活的扒手、穿窗入室的飞贼，甚至是一名顾问，为客户测试他们的金库是否存在破绽。

当战斗爆发时，你偏好迅捷、轻便的武器，并且专挑痛处下手。当你用灵巧近战武器或灵巧近战徒手攻击进行攻击时，你可以在伤害掷骰中用你的敏捷调整值代替你的力量调整值。

你在盗窃方面受训。

Nothing beats the thrill of taking something that belongs to someone else. You might be a pickpocket working the streets, a cat burglar sneaking through windows, or even a consultant, testing your clients' vaults for openings.

When a fight breaks out, you prefer swift, lightweight weapons, and you strike where it hurts. When you attack with a finesse melee weapon or finesse melee unarmed attack, you can add your Dexterity modifier to damage rolls instead of your Strength modifier.

You are trained in Thievery.

Forlorn.name:
孤寂
Forlorn
Forlorn.description:
看着你的朋友们变老并死去让你充满阴郁，这种阴郁保护你免受有害情绪的侵袭。你在对抗情绪效果的豁免掷骰上获得+1环境加值。若你在对抗情绪效果的豁免掷骰中掷出成功，则改为大成功。

Watching your friends age and die fills you with moroseness that protects you against harmful emotions. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion effects. If you roll a success on a saving throw against an emotion effect, you get a critical success instead.

Trap Finder.name:
陷阱发现者
Trap Finder
Trap Finder.description:
你拥有一种直觉，能提醒你陷阱的存在。你获得+1环境加值，用于寻找陷阱的察觉检定、对抗陷阱发动的攻击时的AC，以及对抗陷阱的豁免。即使你没有进行搜索，你也能进行一次检定来发现那些通常要求你进行搜索才能发现的陷阱。你仍然需要满足发现该陷阱的任何其他需求。

你可以解除那些要求你在盗贼技能中拥有大师熟练度等级的陷阱。如果你在盗贼技能中拥有大师熟练度，你改为可以解除那些要求传说熟练度等级的陷阱，并且你对抗陷阱的环境加值提升至+2。

You have an intuitive sense that alerts you to the presence of traps. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find traps, to AC against attacks made by traps, and to saves against traps. Even if you aren't Searching, you get a check to find traps that normally require you to be Searching. You still need to meet any other requirements to find the trap.

You can disable traps that require a proficiency rank of master in Thievery. If you have master proficiency in Thievery, you can disable traps that require a proficiency rank of legendary instead, and your circumstance bonuses against traps increase to +2.

Cat Fall.name:
猫落术
Cat Fall
Cat Fall.description:
你如猫般的空中杂技让你能够缓冲坠落。将坠落距离视为缩短10英尺。如果你是特技动作的专家，将坠落距离视为缩短25英尺；如果你是大师，则缩短50英尺。如果你是特技动作的传奇，你总是双脚着地，并且无论坠落距离多远都不会受到伤害。

Your catlike aerial acrobatics allow you to cushion your falls. Treat falls as 10 feet shorter. If you're an expert in Acrobatics, treat falls as 25 feet shorter and 50 feet if you're a master. If you're legendary in Acrobatics, you always land on your feet and don't take damage, regardless of the distance of the fall.

Leather Armor.name:
皮甲
Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
由柔韧与成型的煮制皮革混合而成，这种护甲在提供一定防护的同时，具备最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，并且其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是在携带或收纳该背包，而不是将其背在背上，那么它的负载为 轻型 而非 可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
当它装满时，一个水袋大约包含够一只小型或中型生物使用1天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有时间捕捉火花时很有用，尽管在遭遇中使用它们通常过于耗时而不实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也需要至少使用3 动作，而且通常要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为一件临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Rapier.name:
细剑
Rapier
Rapier.description:
细剑是一种细长的穿刺刃，带有篮式护手。它在许多人中被视为决斗武器而备受珍视。

The rapier is a long and thin piercing blade with a basket hilt. It is prized among many as a dueling weapon.

Dagger.name:
匕首
Dagger
Dagger.description:
这把小型刃类武器可单手持用，在近战中用来刺击生物。它也可以投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Crowbar.name:
撬棍
Crowbar
Crowbar.description:
当你强行打开一个没有便于抓握的物体时，撬棍使你更容易获得所需的杠杆力。没有撬棍时，撬开某物需要在用于强行打开的运动检定上承受-2物品减值。

When Forcing Open an object that doesn't have an easy grip, a crowbar makes it easier to gain the necessary leverage. Without a crowbar, prying something open takes a -2 item penalty to the Athletics check to Force Open.

Grappling Hook.name:
抓钩
Grappling Hook
Grappling Hook.description:
你可以投掷一把系着绳子的抓钩来让攀爬更容易。要固定抓钩，用你的简易武器熟练度进行一次远程攻击掷骰，对抗一个取决于目标的DC，通常至少DC 20。此攻击具有秘密（特征）。成功时，你的抓钩牢牢钩住；但在大成功或大失败时，抓钩看起来能钩住，实际上会在你爬到一半时脱落

You can throw a grappling hook with a rope tied to it to make a climb easier. To anchor a grappling hook, make a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your hook has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the hook seems like it will hold but actually falls when you're partway up

Piton.name:
岩钉
Piton
Piton.description:
这些小型尖钉可以用作锚点，使攀爬更容易。要固定岩钉，你必须一手拿着它，另一只手用锤子将其敲入。你可以把绳子系在已敲入的岩钉上，这样在攀爬时发生大成功或大失败时，你就不会一路跌落到地面。

These small spikes can be used as anchors to make climbing easier. To affix a piton, you must hold it in one hand and use a hammer to drive it in with your other hand. You can attach a rope to the hammered piton so that you don't fall all the way to the ground on a critical failure while Climbing.

Arrows.name:
箭矢
Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行中由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).name:
盗贼工具包（替换撬锁器）
Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks)
Thieves' Toolkit (Replacement Picks).description:
这些是用于替换 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{盗贼工具包} 的撬锁工具。

These are replacement picks for a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zvLyCVD8g2PdHJAc]{Thieves' Toolkit}.

Thieves' Toolkit.name:
盗贼工具包
Thieves' Toolkit
Thieves' Toolkit.description:
你需要一套盗贼工具包，才能使用贼活（技能）进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{停用装置}（某些类型）。

如果你的盗贼工具包损坏了，你可以通过用适用于你工具包的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{替换撬锁器}更换撬锁器来修理它；这不需要使用“修理”动作。如果你穿戴着你的盗贼工具包，你可以将其抽出并收回，作为使用它的动作的一部分。

You need a thieves' toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

If your thieves' toolkit is broken, you can repair it by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your toolkit; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Caltrops.name:
蒺藜
Caltrops
Caltrops.description:
这些四棱金属尖刺会对生物的脚造成伤害。你可以用一个交互动作将铁蒺藜散布在你相邻的一个空方格中。第一个移动进入该方格的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:14|name:Avoid Caltrops] 检定，否则会受到1d4穿刺伤害与 @Damage[1[bleed]] 伤害。因铁蒺藜而承受持续流血伤害的生物，其速度获得-5尺减值。花费一个交互动作将铁蒺藜拔出会降低止血的DC。一旦有生物因铁蒺藜受到伤害，就会有足够多的铁蒺藜被毁坏，使得其他进入该方格的生物不会受伤。若没有生物因其受伤，已布设的铁蒺藜可以回收并重复使用。否则，会有足够多的铁蒺藜被毁坏，以至于无法回收。

These four-pronged metal spikes can cause damage to a creature's feet. You can scatter caltrops in an empty square adjacent to you with an Interact action. The first creature that moves into that square must succeed at a @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:14|name:Avoid Caltrops] check or take 1d4 piercing damage and @Damage[1[bleed]] damage. A creature taking persistent bleed damage from caltrops takes a -5-foot penalty to its Speed. Spending an Interact action to pluck the caltrops free reduces the DC to stop the bleeding. Once a creature takes damage from caltrops, enough caltrops are ruined that other creatures moving into the square are safe. Deployed caltrops can be salvaged and reused if no creatures took damage from them. Otherwise, enough caltrops are ruined that they can't be salvaged.

Shortbow.name:
短弓
Shortbow
Shortbow.description:
这把较小的弓由一整块木头制成，深受散兵与骑兵的青睐。

This smaller bow is made of a single piece of wood and favored by skirmishers and cavalry.

Skilled Heritage.name:
娴熟传承
Skilled Heritage
Skilled Heritage.description:
你的聪明才智使你能够训练多种多样的技能。你在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。在第5等级时，你在所选择的技能上成为专家。

Your ingenuity allows you to train in a wide variety of skills. You become trained in one skill of your choice. At 5th level, you become an expert in the chosen skill.

Barrister.name:
诉状律师
Barrister
Barrister.description:
成堆的法律手册、严苛的老师以及法庭中的经验教会了你法律事务。你能够在法庭上提出起诉或辩护，而且你往往会紧跟当地法律的最新情况，因为你永远无法预料自己何时会在短时间内需要了解它们。

选择两个能力提升。其中一个必须为智力或魅力，另一个为自由能力提升。

你受训于交涉（技能）与法律学识（技能）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{Group Impression}技能专长。

Piles of legal manuals, stern teachers, and experience in the courtroom have instructed you in legal matters. You're capable of mounting a prosecution or defense in court, and you tend to keep abreast of local laws, as you never can tell when you might need to know them on short notice.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Intelligence or Charisma, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Diplomacy skill and the Legal Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{Group Impression} skill feat.

Group Impression.name:
群体印象
Group Impression
Group Impression.description:
当你进行留下印象时，你可以将你的交涉检定结果与两个目标的意志DC进行比较，而非一个。你可能会对每个目标获得不同的成功程度。如果你是专家，目标数量增加至四个；如果你是大师，则为10个；如果你是传奇，则为25个。

When you Make an Impression, you can compare your Diplomacy check result to the Will DCs of two targets instead of one. It's possible to get a different degree of success for each target. The number of targets increases to four if you're an expert, 10 if you're a master, and 25 if you're legendary.

Cooperative Nature.name:
合作天性
Cooperative Nature
Cooperative Nature.description:
人类短暂的寿命让你更有见地，并教会你从小就搁置分歧，与他人合作以成就伟业。你在援助的检定上获得 +4 环境加值。

The short human life span lends perspective and has taught you from a young age to set aside differences and work with others to achieve greatness. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus on checks to Aid.

Known Weaknesses.name:
已知弱点
Known Weaknesses
Known Weaknesses.description:
每当你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.m0f2B7G9eaaTmhFL]{设计策略}时，你也可以作为该动作的一部分尝试一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}的检定。如果你在回忆知识检定上大成功，你会注意到一个弱点，并从设计策略获得对你的攻击掷骰的+1环境加值。

如果你在检定时立即将该信息传达给你的盟友，则每名盟友对该目标进行的下一次攻击掷骰都获得+1环境加值，前提是他们的攻击在你下一回合开始之前进行。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.DvyyA11a63FBwV7x]{效果：已知弱点}

Whenever you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.m0f2B7G9eaaTmhFL]{Devise a Strategem}, you can also attempt a check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} as part of that action. If you critically succeed at the Recall Knowledge check, you notice a weakness and gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your attack roll from Devise a Stratagem.

If you immediately convey this information to your allies as part of the check, each ally gains a +1 circumstance bonus to their next attack roll against the subject, as long as their attack is made before the beginning of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.DvyyA11a63FBwV7x]{Effect: Known Weakness}

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳该背包而不是将其背在背上，它的负载为轻型而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水袋大致包含足够一名小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有时间捕捉火花时很有用来生火，尽管在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗费时代而不实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也需要至少使用3个动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一个卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Crossbow.name:
弩
Crossbow
Crossbow.description:
这把远程武器在一个带手柄的框架上安装了类似弓的组件，该框架被称为弩臂。弩臂有一个将弓弦锁定在位的机构，并连接到触发机构，释放张力并发射弩矢。

This ranged weapon has a bow-like assembly mounted on a handled frame called a tiller. The tiller has a mechanism to lock the bowstring in place, attached to a trigger mechanism that releases the tension and launches a bolt.

Bolts.name:
弩箭
Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统的箭更短，但结构相似，是弩所使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Studded Leather Armor.name:
钉甲皮甲
Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这种皮甲用金属铆钉加固，有时还会加装小型金属板，在保留皮甲大部分灵活性的同时提供更强的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Sword Cane.name:
剑杖
Sword Cane
Sword Cane.description:
这把纤细、类似细剑的剑隐藏在一根木制或金属手杖之中，手杖同时充当剑鞘，使其成为一件不起眼的武器，容易在检查中蒙混过关或带入上流社会的活动。剑杖在入鞘时通常长4英尺，其剑柄末端通常覆以木制或金属装饰。

This slender, rapier-like sword is concealed within a wooden or metal cane that serves as a sheath, making it an inconspicuous weapon easy to slip past inspections or into high-society events. A sword cane is typically 4 feet long when sheathed, and its hilt is usually capped with a wooden or metal decoration.

Acid Flask (Lesser).name:
酸液瓶（次级）
Acid Flask (Lesser)
Acid Flask (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

这个装满腐蚀性酸液的瓶子造成1点酸性伤害、1d6点持续酸性伤害，以及1点酸性溅射伤害。

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 1d6 persistent acid damage, and 1 acid splash damage.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为一件临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Investigator.name:
调查员
Investigator
Investigator.description:
你寻求揭开真相，坚持不懈地追踪线索，以揭露狡诈恶徒的阴谋、发现远古的秘密，或解开其他谜团。你善于分析的头脑能迅速为复杂问题拟定解决方案，而你经磨练的感官能识别出哪怕最晦涩的线索。你将知识作为武器，研究你在遭遇中碰到的生物与危险，以利用它们的弱点。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.omDi7otL3UWLVgct]{调查员}

You seek to uncover the truth, doggedly pursuing leads to reveal the plots of devious villains, discover ancient secrets, or unravel other mysteries. Your analytical mind quickly formulates solutions to complicated problems and your honed senses identify even the most obscure clues. Wielding knowledge as a weapon, you study the creatures and dangers you encounter to exploit their weaknesses.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.omDi7otL3UWLVgct]{Investigator}

Methodology.name:
方法论
Methodology
Methodology.description:
你的研习使你在许多领域都精明老练，但其中有一个领域尤其引起了你浓厚的兴趣。选择一种方法论。方法论如下：

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.ln2Y1a4SxlU9sizX]{炼金科学方法论}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.g3mNzNphtVxyR9Xr]{实证主义方法论}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.O3IX7rTxXWWvDVM3]{法医医学方法论}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.UIHUNNYZyQ3p4Vmo]{审讯方法论}

Your studies have made you savvy in many areas, but one in particular drew your intense interest. Choose a methodology. The methodologies are as follows:

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.ln2Y1a4SxlU9sizX]{Alchemical Sciences Methodology}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.g3mNzNphtVxyR9Xr]{Empiricism Methodology}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.O3IX7rTxXWWvDVM3]{Forensic Medicine Methodology}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.UIHUNNYZyQ3p4Vmo]{Interrogation Methodology}

Devise a Stratagem.name:
筹划奇谋
Devise a Stratagem
Devise a Stratagem.description:
频率 每轮一次

你在战斗中评估敌人的弱点，并利用这些弱点来制定针对敌人的攻击计划。选择一个你能看见的生物，并掷骰一个d20。如果你在本轮稍后对所选生物进行打击，你必须使用你为“谋定计策”所掷的结果来代替为该次打击的攻击检定掷骰。你只会在本轮对该生物进行的第一次打击时进行这种替换，而不会影响任何后续攻击。

当你进行这种替换时，你还可以将你的智力调整值加入你的攻击检定，以取代你的力量或敏捷调整值，前提是你的打击使用灵巧或娴熟的近战武器、灵巧或娴熟的无武装攻击、远程武器（若其为具有投掷特征的近战武器，则必须为灵巧或娴熟）或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TLQErnOpM9Luy7rL]{Sap}。

如果你知晓你所选择的生物正是你正在追查的线索的目标，你可以以 自由动作（） 使用该能力。

Frequency once per round

You assess a foe's weaknesses in combat and use them to formulate a plan of attack against your enemy. Choose a creature you can see, and roll a d20. If you Strike the chosen creature later this round, you must use the result of the roll you made to Devise a Stratagem for your Strike's attack roll instead of rolling.
