You make this substitution only for the first Strike you make against the creature this round, not any subsequent attacks.

When you make this substitution, you can also add your Intelligence modifier to your attack roll instead of your Strength or Dexterity modifier, provided your Strike uses an agile or finesse melee weapon, an agile or finesse unarmed attack, a ranged weapon (which must be agile or finesse if it's a melee weapon with the thrown trait) or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TLQErnOpM9Luy7rL]{Sap}.

If you're aware that the creature you choose is the subject of a lead you're pursuing, you can use this ability as a free action.

On the Case.name:
调查中
On the Case
On the Case.description:
作为一名调查员，你将你的冒险视为等待解决的案件。你获得一个行动和一个反应动作（），可用于调查案件：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xTK2zsWFyxSJvYbX]{追查线索}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.25WDi1cVUrW92sUj]{提供线索}。

As an investigator, you think of your adventures as cases waiting to be solved. You gain one activity and one reaction you can use to investigate cases: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xTK2zsWFyxSJvYbX]{Pursue a Lead} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.25WDi1cVUrW92sUj]{Clue In}.

Strategic Strike.name:
战略打击
Strategic Strike
Strategic Strike.description:
当你谨慎且深思熟虑地出击时，你能造成沉重一击。当你进行一次因 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.lgo65ldX7WkXC8Ir]{设计谋略}而在你的攻击掷骰上加入你的智力调整值的打击时，你额外造成 1d6 精确伤害。

随着你的调查员等级提高，你的策略打击的致命性也随之增加。在第 5、9、13 和 17 级时，将骰子数量各增加 1。

When you strike carefully and with forethought, you deal a telling blow. When making a Strike that adds your Intelligence modifier on your attack roll due to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.lgo65ldX7WkXC8Ir]{Devising a Stratagem}, you deal an additional 1d6 precision damage.

As your investigator level increases, so too does the deadliness of your strategic strike. Increase the number of dice by one at 5th, 9th, 13th, and 17th levels.

That's Odd.name:
真奇怪
That's Odd
That's Odd.description:
当你进入一个新地点，例如房间或走廊时，你会立刻注意到一件不寻常的事物。GM决定那是什么，或是否没有任何合理可察觉之处；他们会略过那些无需进行检定或不必特意寻找就能轻易注意到的明显线索。你只会得知某个区域或物体很可疑，但不知道它为何可疑。

例如，如果你进入一间书房，地上有一大滩血迹，血迹显然可疑到你本就能注意到，因此GM可能会改为指出书桌抽屉有些可疑。你接着就需要进一步调查抽屉，才能找出具体哪里不寻常。“真奇怪”不会揭示生物是否可疑。

通常当你离开再返回某处时不会获得任何好处，不过如果那里发生了重大变化且时代已经流逝，GM可能会判定你确实能获得好处。

When you enter a new location, such as a room or corridor, you immediately notice one thing out of the ordinary. The GM determines what it is, or whether there's nothing reasonable to pick up, skipping obvious clues that can be easily noticed without a check or specifically looking for them. You learn only that an area or object is suspicious, but not why it's suspicious.

For example, if you entered a study with a large bloodstain on the ground, the bloodstain is so obviously suspicious it's evident to you already, so the GM might note that there's something suspicious about the desk drawer instead. You would then need to investigate the drawer further to find out what specifically is out of the ordinary. That's Odd doesn't reveal whether creatures are suspicious.

You don't typically get any benefit when you leave and come back to a place, though if a major change has happened there and time has passed, the GM might determine that you do.

Expeditious Inspection.name:
迅捷检视
Expeditious Inspection
Expeditious Inspection.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你以极快的速度观察并评估周围环境。你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{洞悉动机}。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You observe and assess your surroundings with great speed. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive}.

Empiricism Methodology.name:
经验主义方法论
Empiricism Methodology
Empiricism Methodology.description:
一切都归结为数据。计算统计、运行数字，并运用归纳推理，使你能够判断任何情境中最可能的结果；而任何不对劲之处都会引起你敏锐的注意。

你在一个由你选择的、以智力为关键属性的技能上受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.pIHjH1x0AVtiX5Tv]{That's Odd} 调查员专长，并且你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.jftNJjBNxp2cleoi]{Expeditious Inspection} 自由动作。

Everything comes down to data. Calculating statistics, running numbers, and using inductive reasoning allows you to determine the most likely outcome of any scenario, and anything out of place draws your keen attention.

You are trained in one Intelligence-based skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.pIHjH1x0AVtiX5Tv]{That's Odd} investigator feat, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.jftNJjBNxp2cleoi]{Expeditious Inspection} free action.

Pursue a Lead.name:
追查线索
Pursue a Lead
Pursue a Lead.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你花费1分钟检查一条潜在线索的细节，将与该线索相关的对象指定为你主动调查的目标。该对象通常是单一生物、物品或小型地点（例如房间或走廊），但GM可能允许你以不同的范围进行调查。你不需要知道该对象的身份、目的或本质，但你确实需要察觉到它的存在。例如，找到一个脚印就足以调查留下它的生物，而看到一件物品或地点的匆忙草图也足以开始你对该对象的调查。

每当你尝试进行察觉或技能检定以调查被指定的对象时，你在该检定上获得+1环境加值。该加值适用于哪些具体检定取决于你用于调查的动作，并由GM决定，但用于调查的检定通常是察觉检定，或使用智力、感知或魅力的技能检定。

你一次可以维持两项主动调查。在那之后如果你再追查另一条线索，该对象必须与你当前的任何调查对象都不同（或者更准确地说，就你所知它们必须不同），并且你放弃你所选择的一项当前对象。一旦你放弃追查某个对象，在你下次进行每日准备之前，你无法再次追查那条线索。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You spend 1 minute examining the details of one potential clue, designating the subject related to that clue as the target of your active investigation. This subject is typically a single creature, item, or small location (such as a room or corridor), but the GM might allow a different scope for your investigation. You don't need to know the identity, purpose, or nature of the subject, but you do need to be aware of its existence. For instance, finding a footprint is enough to investigate the creature that left it, and seeing a hasty sketch of an item or location can be enough to start your investigation of that subject.

Whenever you attempt a Perception or skill check to investigate a designated subject, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the check. The exact checks this applies to depend on the actions you use to investigate and are determined by the GM, but checks to investigate are typically Perception checks or skill checks that use Intelligence, Wisdom or Charisma.

You can maintain two active investigations at a time. If you Pursue another Lead after that, the subject must be different from any of your current investigations (or rather, they must be different as far as you know), and you give up on a current subject of your choice. Once you've given up pursuit of a subject, you can't Pursue that Lead again until after the next time you make your daily preparations.

Clue In.name:
引出线索
Clue In
Clue In.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 另一名生物尝试进行一次检定，以调查你正在追查的线索

你与触发的生物分享信息。

他们的检定获得一个环境加值，数值等于你从 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xTK2zsWFyxSJvYbX]{Pursue a Lead} 获得的、用于调查你的目标之检定的环境加值。GM可以根据情况为该反应动作（）添加任何相关特征，例如若你以口头传达信息，则可能具有听觉与语言特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.vhSYlQiAQMLuXqoc]{效果: Clue In}

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger Another creature attempts a check to investigate a lead you're pursuing

You share information with the triggering creature.

They gain a circumstance bonus to their check equal to your circumstance bonus to checks investigating your subject from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.xTK2zsWFyxSJvYbX]{Pursue a Lead}. The GM can add any relevant traits to this reaction depending on the situation, such as auditory and linguistic if you're conveying information verbally.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.vhSYlQiAQMLuXqoc]{Effect: Clue In}

Human.name:
人类
Human
Human.description:
如同格拉利昂的任何族裔一样难以预测且多姿多彩，人类拥有非凡的进取心，以及忍耐与扩张的能力。尽管在人类崛起并占据显赫地位之前，许多文明已然兴盛，人类在历史长河中却建立了一些最伟大、也最可怖的社会，而如今，他们是内海周边诸国疆域中人口最多的族群。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{人类}

As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand. Though many civilizations thrived before humanity rose to prominence, humans have built some of the greatest and the most terrible societies throughout the course of history, and today they are the most populous people in the realms around the Inner Sea.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{Human}

Versatile Heritage.name:
多才传承
Versatile Heritage
Versatile Heritage.description:
人类的多才多艺与雄心壮志推动了其崛起，使其成为世界各地大多数国家中最常见的族裔。在你满足先决条件的前提下，选择一个你自选的通用专长（与您的族裔专长一样，你可以在创建角色的任意阶段选择此通用专长）。

Humanity's versatility and ambition have fueled its ascendance to be the most common ancestry in most nations throughout the world. Select a general feat of your choice for which you meet the prerequisites (as with your ancestry feat, you can select this general feat at any point during character creation).

Natural Ambition.name:
天生野心
Natural Ambition
Natural Ambition.description:
你从小被培养得志向远大、总是伸手摘星，这让你在所选择的领域中进步神速。你获得一个你职业的1级职业专长。你必须满足先决条件，但你可以在创建角色流程的稍后阶段再选择该专长，以便确定你满足哪些先决条件。

You were raised to be ambitious and always reach for the stars, leading you to progress quickly in your chosen field. You gain a 1st-level class feat for your class. You must meet the prerequisites, but you can select the feat later in the character creation process in order to determine which prerequisites you meet.

Tiger Stance.name:
虎姿态
Tiger Stance
Tiger Stance.description:
需求 你未穿着护甲

你进入猛虎的架势，并可以进行虎爪攻击。这些攻击造成1d8挥砍伤害；属于斗殴组；并具有灵巧、娴熟、非致命和徒手特征。

当你以虎爪获得大成功或大失败时，若你造成伤害，则目标承受 @Damage[1d4[bleed]]。

只要你在虎势中且你的速度至少为20尺，你便可以以10尺进行移步。

Requirements You are unarmored

You enter the stance of a tiger and can make tiger claw attacks. These deal 1d8 slashing damage; are in the brawling group; and have the agile, finesse, nonlethal, and unarmed traits.

On a critical success with your tiger claws, if you deal damage, the target takes @Damage[1d4[bleed]].

As long as your Speed is at least 20 feet while in Tiger Stance, you can Step 10 feet.

Ki Rush.name:
气疾冲
Ki Rush
Ki Rush.description:
在你的气的加速下，你以快到化作残影的速度移动。移动两次：两次疾走、两次碎步，或一次疾走与一次碎步（顺序任意）。

在此次移动期间以及直到你下个回合开始，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

Accelerated by your ki, you move with such speed you become a blur. Move two times: two Strides, two Steps, or one Stride and one Step (in either order).

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition during this movement and until the start of your next turn.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳该背包而不是把它背在背上，它的负载为轻而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水袋大约装有足够一只小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石与打火钢在你有时代去捕捉火花时很适合用来生火，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗时代而不实用。即使在理想条件下，用燧石与打火钢点燃火焰也至少需要使用3个动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床。

A rolled up bed.

Crowbar.name:
撬棍
Crowbar
Crowbar.description:
当强行打开一个不容易抓握的物体时，撬棍会让你更容易获得所需的杠杆力。没有撬棍时，撬开某物会使进行强行打开的运动检定承受-2物品减值。

When Forcing Open an object that doesn't have an easy grip, a crowbar makes it easier to gain the necessary leverage. Without a crowbar, prying something open takes a -2 item penalty to the Athletics check to Force Open.

Explorer's Clothing.name:
探险者服装
Explorer's Clothing
Explorer's Clothing.description:
不穿护甲的冒险者会穿着耐用的衣物旅行。虽然它不是护甲并使用你的无甲防御熟练度，但它仍然有敏捷上限，并且如果刻有强效符文，仍可给予AC物品加值。

Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with potency runes.

Dart.name:
飞镖
Dart
Dart.description:
这种投掷武器比箭更大，但比标枪更短。它通常有一根短木杆，末端是金属尖头，有时会用羽毛或毛皮来稳定。

This thrown weapon is larger than an arrow but shorter than a javelin. It typically has a short shaft of wood ending in a metal tip and is sometimes stabilized by feathers or fur.

Grappling Hook.name:
抓钩
Grappling Hook
Grappling Hook.description:
你可以掷出一枚系着绳索的抓钩来让攀爬更容易。要固定抓钩，使用你的简易武器熟练度进行一次远程攻击掷骰，对抗一个取决于目标的DC，通常至少为DC 20。此次攻击具有秘密（特征）。成功时，你的抓钩牢牢钩住，但大失败时，抓钩看起来似乎能钩住，实际上会在你爬到一半时脱落

You can throw a grappling hook with a rope tied to it to make a climb easier. To anchor a grappling hook, make a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your hook has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the hook seems like it will hold but actually falls when you're partway up

Elixir of Life (Minor).name:
生命灵药（次级）
Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命药剂会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用此药剂后，你恢复[[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6生命值}，并在10分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命药剂（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Minor)}

Temple Sword.name:
神殿剑
Temple Sword
Temple Sword.description:
这种重刃受到宗教场所守护者的青睐。它有一片独特的新月形刃部，看起来像是镰刀与剑的混合体。其刃身或剑首上常会钻孔，以便将铃铛或其他神圣小饰物固定在武器上。

This heavy blade is favored by guardians of religious sites. It has a distinctive, crescent-shaped blade that seems to be a mix of a sickle and sword. It often has holes drilled into the blade or the pommel so that bells or other holy trinkets can be affixed to the weapon.

Divine Focus Spells.name:
神圣专注法术
Divine Focus Spells

Bottled Lightning (Lesser).name:
瓶装闪电（次级）
Bottled Lightning (Lesser)
Bottled Lightning (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

瓶装闪电装满了易挥发的试剂，暴露在空气中时会产生电能爆炸。瓶装闪电造成1d6电击伤害和1点电击溅射伤害。命中时，目标变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到你下个回合开始。

Activate A Strike

Bottled lightning is packed with volatile reagents that create a blast of electricity when they are exposed to air. Bottled lightning deals 1d6 electricity damage and 1 electricity splash damage. On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn.

Weapon Proficiency (Martial).name:
武器熟练度（军用）
Weapon Proficiency (Martial)
Weapon Proficiency (Martial).description:
你在所有简易武器上成为受训。如果你已经在所有简易武器上受训，则你在所有军用武器上成为受训。如果你已经在所有军用武器上受训，则你在你选择的一把高级武器上成为受训。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你这样做时，你会按需在额外的武器上成为受训，遵循上述进阶。

You become trained in all simple weapons. If you were already trained in all simple weapons, you become trained in all martial weapons. If you were already trained in all martial weapons, you become trained in one advanced weapon of your choice.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you do, you become trained in additional weapons as appropriate, following the above progression.

Martial Disciple.name:
武艺弟子
Martial Disciple
Martial Disciple.description:
你全身心投入高强度训练与严苛研习，立志成为一名伟大的战士。你就读的学校可能是一所遵循传统的修道院、一所精英军事学院，或某个享有盛名的佣兵组织的本地分部。

选择两个能力提升。其中一个必须给力量或敏捷，另一个为自由能力提升。

你在特技或运动（技能）中择一受训。若你选择特技，你获得一个技能专长：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall}；若你选择运动（技能），你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ZBhvJ9O8MvBFAlhq]{Quick Jump}。你也在战争学识（技能）中受训。

You dedicated yourself to intense training and rigorous study to become a great warrior. The school you attended might have been a traditionalist monastery, an elite military academy, or the local branch of a prestigious mercenary organization.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Strength or Dexterity, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in your choice of the Acrobatics or Athletics skill. You gain a skill feat: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall} if you chose Acrobatics or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ZBhvJ9O8MvBFAlhq]{Quick Jump} if you chose Athletics. You're also trained in the Warfare Lore skill.

Cat Fall.name:
猫落术
Cat Fall
Cat Fall.description:
你如猫般的空中杂技让你能够缓冲坠落。将坠落视为短了10英尺。若你在特技中为专家，将坠落视为短了25英尺。若你在特技中为大师，将其视为短了50英尺。若你在特技中为传奇，你总是双脚着地，且不受伤害，无论坠落距离多远。

Your catlike aerial acrobatics allow you to cushion your falls. Treat falls as 10 feet shorter. If you're an expert in Acrobatics, treat falls as 25 feet shorter. If you're a master in Acrobatics, treat them as 50 feet shorter. If you're legendary in Acrobatics, you always land on your feet and don't take damage, regardless of the distance of the fall.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
一支火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为一把临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Monk.name:
武僧
Monk
Monk.description:
你的拳力源自你的心智与精神。你追求完美——将身体锤炼成无瑕的利器，将心智塑造成秩序井然的智慧堡垒。你是凶猛的战斗者，以武术技艺与能赋予你独特战斗招式的战斗架势而闻名。尽管精通多种战斗流派的挑战推动你登上更高峰，你也乐于对哲学问题进行冥想，并发现获得安宁与开悟的新途径。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.hGKd722Kn4ZxIOJs]{武僧}

The strength of your fist flows from your mind and spirit. You seek perfection-honing your body into a flawless instrument and your mind into an orderly bastion of wisdom. You're a fierce combatant renowned for martial arts skills and combat stances that grant you unique fighting moves. While the challenge of mastering many fighting styles drives you to great heights, you also enjoy meditating on philosophical questions and discovering new ways to obtain peace and enlightenment.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.hGKd722Kn4ZxIOJs]{Monk}

Flurry of Blows.name:
连击
Flurry of Blows
Flurry of Blows.description:
你可以用拳头、脚、手肘、膝盖以及其他徒手攻击快速出击。你获得“乱打”动作。

进行两次徒手 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]{打击}。如果两次都命中同一个生物，将它们的伤害合并，以用于抗性与弱点。正常对这些打击施加你的多重攻击减值。由于其具有绝技（特征），你每回合只能使用一次乱打。

You can attack rapidly with fists, feet, elbows, knees, and other unarmed attacks. You gain the Flurry of Blows action.

Make two unarmed @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]{Strikes}. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. Apply your multiple attack penalty to the Strikes normally. As it has the flourish trait, you can use Flurry of Blows only once per turn.

Powerful Fist.name:
强力拳
Powerful Fist
Powerful Fist.description:
你知道如何将自己的拳头当作致命武器来挥舞。你的拳头的伤害骰从1d4提高到1d6。大多数人在使用非致命徒手攻击进行致命攻击时会承受-2环境减值，因为他们觉得很难用拳头施加致命力量。你在用拳头或任何其他徒手攻击进行致命攻击时不会承受这个减值。

You know how to wield your fists as deadly weapons. The damage die for your fist increases to 1d6 instead of 1d4. Most people take a -2 circumstance penalty when making a lethal attack with nonlethal unarmed attacks, because they find it hard to use their fists with deadly force. You don't take this penalty when making a lethal attack with your fist or any other unarmed attacks.

Human.name:
人类
Human
Human.description:
人类如同格拉利昂的任何族群一样难以预测且多姿多彩，拥有非凡的进取心以及忍耐与开拓的能力。尽管在人类崛起并占据显赫地位之前，许多文明早已繁荣兴盛，人类仍在历史长河中建立了一些最伟大也最可怖的社会；而在今天，他们是内海周边诸国度中人口最多的族群。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{人类}

As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand. Though many civilizations thrived before humanity rose to prominence, humans have built some of the greatest and the most terrible societies throughout the course of history, and today they are the most populous people in the realms around the Inner Sea.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{Human}

Street Urchin.name:
街头流浪儿
Street Urchin
Street Urchin.description:
你靠在大城市的街头扒窃勉强维生，从不知道下一顿饭在哪里。有人为了荣耀而进行冒险，而你这样做是为了活下去。

选择两项能力提升。其中一项必须为敏捷或体质，另一项为自由能力提升。

你受训于贼活（技能）以及一个你作为街头孤儿所居住城市的学识（技能）（例如艾巴萨罗姆学识或马格尼玛学识）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{扒手}技能专长。

You eked out a living by picking pockets on the streets of a major city, never knowing where you'd find your next meal. While some folk adventure for the glory, you do so to survive.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Constitution, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Thievery skill and a Lore skill for the city you lived in as a street urchin (such as Absalom Lore or Magnimar Lore). You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{Pickpocket} skill feat.

Pickpocket.name:
扒手
Pickpocket
Pickpocket.description:
你可以在不承受-5减值的情况下，偷窃或顺手牵羊一个被严密看守的物体，例如在口袋里。你无法偷窃那些移除时会极其显眼或耗时的物体（比如穿着的鞋子或护甲，或正被积极持用的物体）。如果你在巧手中是大师，你可以尝试在战斗中或以其他方式处于戒备状态的生物身上进行偷窃。进行此举时，偷窃需要2个操作动作而非1个，并且你承受-5减值。

You can Steal or Palm an Object that's closely guarded, such as in a pocket, without taking the -5 penalty. You can't steal objects that would be extremely noticeable or time consuming to remove (like worn shoes or armor or actively wielded objects). If you're a master in Thievery, you can attempt to Steal from a creature in combat or otherwise on guard. When doing so, Stealing requires 2 manipulate actions instead of 1, and you take a -5 penalty.

Absalom Lore.name:
艾巴萨罗姆学识
Absalom Lore

Natural Skill.name:
天生技能
Natural Skill
Natural Skill.description:
你的机智让你能够学习种类繁多的技能。你在你选择的两项技能中获得受训（熟练度）熟练度等级。

Your ingenuity allows you to learn a wide variety of skills. You gain the trained proficiency rank in two skills of your choice.

Ranged Reprisal.name:
远程反击
Ranged Reprisal
Ranged Reprisal.description:
你可以使用远程武器来施展 Retributive Strike。此外，如果触发你反应动作（）的敌人位于你触及的 5 英尺范围内但不在你的触及之内，作为你反应动作（）的一部分，你可以先以 Step 将敌人置于你的触及之内，然后再进行一次近战 Retributive Strike。

You can use Retributive Strike with a ranged weapon. In addition, if the foe that triggered your reaction is within 5 feet of your reach but not in your reach, as part of your reaction you can Step to put the foe in your reach before making a melee Retributive Strike.

Lay on Hands.name:
圣疗
Lay on Hands
Lay on Hands.description:
你的双手被注入生命力能量，可以通过一次接触来治疗一个活体生物，或对一个不死生物造成伤害。

如果你对一个自愿的活体目标使用援手之触，你恢复其6点生命值；如果该目标是你的盟友，他们还会获得+2 AC状态加值，持续1轮。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.lyLMiauxIVUM3oF1]{法术效果：援手之触}

对抗一个不死目标时，你造成1d6伤害，且其必须尝试一次基础强韧豁免；若其失败，它还会承受-2 AC状态减值，持续1轮。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.JhihziXQuoteftdd]{法术效果：援手之触（对抗不死）}

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加6点，且对一个不死目标造成的伤害增加1d6。

Your hands become infused with vitality energy, healing a living creature or damaging an undead creature with a touch.

If you use lay on hands on a willing living target, you restore 6 Hit Points; if the target is one of your allies, they also gain a +2 status bonus to AC for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.lyLMiauxIVUM3oF1]{Spell Effect: Lay on Hands}

Against an undead target, you deal 1d6 damage and it must attempt a basic Fortitude save; if it fails, it also takes a -2 status penalty to AC for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.JhihziXQuoteftdd]{Spell Effect: Lay on Hands (Vs. Undead)}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 6, and the damage to an undead target increases by 1d6.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是提着或收纳背包而不是把它背在背上，它的负载为轻型而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水袋大约装有足够一名小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有时间捕捉火花时很有用来生火，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗费时代而不实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也至少需要使用3个动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Repair Toolkit.name:
维修工具包
Repair Toolkit
Repair Toolkit.description:
一套修理工具包允许你在旅行时进行简单的修理。它包含一块便携式铁砧、钳子、木工工具、磨刀石，以及用于保养皮革和木材的油。你可以使用修理工具包用手艺（技能）来修理物品。你可以将取出和收起一套磨损的修理工具包作为使用它的动作的一部分。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Scale Mail.name:
鳞甲
Scale Mail
Scale Mail.description:
鳞甲由许多金属鳞片缝制在加固的皮革衬底上组成，通常为一件长衫的形式，用以保护躯干、手臂和腿部。

Scale mail consists of many metal scales sewn onto a reinforced leather backing, often in the form of a long shirt that protects the torso, arms, and legs.

Elixir of Life (Minor).name:
生命灵药（次级）
Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命药剂会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用该药剂后，你恢复[[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6生命值}，并在10分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命药剂（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Minor)}

Longsword.name:
长剑
Longsword
Longsword.description:
长剑，也被称为佩剑，可以是单刃或双刃的剑。它们的剑刃很重，长度在3到4英尺之间。

Longswords, also known as arming swords, can be one-edged or two-edged swords. Their blades are heavy and they're between 3 and 4 feet in length.

Steel Shield.name:
钢盾
Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
与木制盾牌一样，钢制盾牌也有多种形状和尺寸。尽管比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们要耐用得多。

硬度 HP BT
5 20 10

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

Hardness HP BT
5 20 10

Shortbow.name:
短弓
Shortbow
Shortbow.description:
这把较小的弓由一整块木头制成，深受散兵与骑兵偏爱。

This smaller bow is made of a single piece of wood and favored by skirmishers and cavalry.

Arrows.name:
箭矢
Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。其一端的羽翎使其在飞行中保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Raise a Shield.name:
举起盾牌
Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持用一面盾牌

你调整盾牌的位置以保护自己。当你已举起盾牌时，你获得其列出的对AC的环境加值。你的盾牌保持举起状态，直到你的下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.2YgXoHvJfrDHucMr]{效果: 举起盾牌}

Requirements You are wielding a shield

You position your shield to protect yourself. When you have Raised a Shield, you gain its listed circumstance bonus to AC. Your shield remains raised until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.2YgXoHvJfrDHucMr]{Effect: Raise a Shield}

Skilled Heritage.name:
娴熟传承
Skilled Heritage
Skilled Heritage.description:
你的巧思让你能够在各种各样的技能中进行训练。你在你选择的一个技能上变为受训。于第5等级时，你在所选技能上变为专家。

Your ingenuity allows you to train in a wide variety of skills. You become trained in one skill of your choice. At 5th level, you become an expert in the chosen skill.

Torch.name:
火把
Torch
Torch.description:
火把在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它也可作为临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Champion.name:
冠军
Champion
Champion.description:
你是神祇的使者，一位肩负沉重使命的虔诚仆从，并且你遵循一套使你与周遭之人有所区隔的准则。尽管每种阵营都有守护者存在，但作为善良的守护者，你为无辜者带来确定与希望。你拥有强大的防御，并愿意慷慨地与盟友及无辜旁观者分享，同时你也运用神圣之力来终结邪恶的威胁。你的虔诚甚至会吸引神圣灵体的注意，它们在你的旅途中协助你。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.rebppVgBVi8J6TT2]{守护者}

You are an emissary of a deity, a devoted servant who has taken up a weighty mantle, and you adhere to a code that holds you apart from those around you. While champions exist for every alignment, as a champion of good, you provide certainty and hope to the innocent. You have powerful defenses that you share freely with your allies and innocent bystanders, as well as holy power you use to end the threat of evil. Your devotion even attracts the attention of holy spirits who aid you on your journey.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.rebppVgBVi8J6TT2]{Champion}

Human.name:
人类
Human
Human.description:
如同格拉利昂的任何族群一样难以预测且千变万化，人类拥有非凡的进取心，以及忍耐与扩张的能力。尽管在人类崛起为显赫力量之前，许多文明已然繁荣昌盛，但在人类历史的进程中，他们既建立过一些最伟大也最可怖的社会；而在今天，他们是内海周边诸国度中人口最多的族群。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{人类}

As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand. Though many civilizations thrived before humanity rose to prominence, humans have built some of the greatest and the most terrible societies throughout the course of history, and today they are the most populous people in the realms around the Inner Sea.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{Human}

Deity and Cause.name:
神祇与道途
Deity and Cause
Deity and Cause.description:
冠军是神祇的神圣仆从。选择一位神祇来信奉；你的阵营必须是该神祇允许其追随者选择的阵营之一。从根本上违背你的神祇的理想或阵营的行为，是你信仰的禁忌。每位神祇的条目中都给出了一些会被视为禁忌的行为例子。你和你的GM共同决定其他行为是否为禁忌。你拥有以下起因之一。你的起因必须与你的阵营完全一致。你的起因决定你的冠军的反应动作（），给予你一个奉献法术，并定义你冠军准则的一部分。

  • LG @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.peEXunfbSD8WcMFk]{圣武士}
  • NG @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.UyuwFp0jQqYL2AdF]{救赎者}
  • CG @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.FCoMFUsth4xB4veC]{解放者}
  • LE @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.HiIvez0TqESbleB5]{暴君}
  • NE @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.8YIA0jh64Ecz0TG6]{亵渎者}
  • CE @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.EQ6DVIQHAUXUhY6Y]{反圣武士}

Champions are divine servants of a deity. Choose a deity to follow; your alignment must be one allowed for followers of your deity. Actions fundamentally opposed to your deity's ideals or alignment are anathema to your faith. A few examples of acts that would be considered anathema appear in each deity's entry. You and your GM determine whether other acts are anathema. You have one of the following causes. Your cause must match your alignment exactly. Your cause determines your champion's reaction, grants you a devotion spell, and defines part of your champion's code.

  • LG @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.peEXunfbSD8WcMFk]{Paladin}
  • NG @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.UyuwFp0jQqYL2AdF]{Redeemer}
  • CG @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.FCoMFUsth4xB4veC]{Liberator}
  • LE @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.HiIvez0TqESbleB5]{Tyrant}
  • NE @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.8YIA0jh64Ecz0TG6]{Desecrator}
  • CE @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.EQ6DVIQHAUXUhY6Y]{Antipaladin}

Champion's Code.name:
冠军信条
Champion's Code
Champion's Code.description:
你遵循一套行为准则，从所有某一阵营（例如善良）的所有武侍所共有的戒律开始，并延续到你誓言的戒律。神祇常常会添加额外的约束（例如，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.sZrdzh0ANQnZGXJb]{托拉格}的武侍不能对其人民的敌人施以怜悯，这使他们几乎不可能遵循救赎者誓言）。本书中只出现善良武侍的规则。戒律按重要性顺序列出，从最重要的开始。如果某种情况让两条戒律发生冲突，你并非陷入无解困境；相反，遵循更重要的戒律。例如，作为圣武士，如果一位邪恶的国王问你是否在藏匿难民以便他处决他们，你可以对他撒谎，因为反对撒谎的戒律比防止无辜者受害的重要性更低。试图通过制造一种迫使较高戒律压倒较低戒律的局面来颠覆你的准则（例如，承诺不尊重权威，然后为了守诺而去不尊重权威）即为违反武侍准则。

如果你偏离你的阵营或违反你的行为准则，你将失去你的专注池与神圣盟友，直到你通过进行一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{赎罪}仪式来表明你的悔改为止，但你仍保留任何不需要这些职业特性之其他武侍能力。如果你的阵营发生变化但仍是你的神祇所允许的阵营之一，你的GM可能会允许你在仍追随同一神祇的情况下重训你的誓言。

You follow a code of conduct, beginning with tenets shared by all champions of an alignment (such as good), and continuing with tenets of your cause. Deities often add additional strictures (for instance, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.sZrdzh0ANQnZGXJb]{Torag} champions can't show mercy to enemies of their people, making it almost impossible for them to follow the redeemer cause). Only rules for good champions appear in this book. Tenets are listed in order of importance, starting with the most important. If a situation places two tenets in conflict, you aren't in a no-win situation; instead, follow the more important tenet. For instance, as a paladin, if an evil king asked you if you're hiding refugees so he could execute them, you could lie to him, since the tenet against lying is less important than preventing harm to innocents. Trying to subvert your code by creating a situation that forces a higher tenet to override a lower tenet (for example, promising not to respect authorities and then, to keep your word, disrespecting authorities) is a violation of the champion code.

If you stray from your alignment or violate your code of conduct, you lose your focus pool and divine ally until you demonstrate your repentance by conducting an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual, but you keep any other champion abilities that don't require those class features. If your alignment shifts but is still one allowed by your deity, your GM might let you retrain your cause while still following the same deity.

Champion's Reaction.name:
冠军的反应动作（）
Champion's Reaction
Champion's Reaction.description:
你的圣武士事业赋予你一个特殊的反应动作（）。参见特定的事业以获取更多信息。

Your cause gives you a special reaction. See specific causes for more information.

Deific Weapon.name:
神祇武器
Deific Weapon
Deific Weapon.description:
你热忱地持用你的神祇偏好的武器。若它为非普通，你获得对其的许可。若它是伤害骰为d4的徒手攻击或简易武器，将该伤害骰提升一级（d4至d6，d6至d8，d8至d10，d10至d12）。

You zealously bear your deity's favored weapon. If it's uncommon, you gain access to it. If it's an unarmed attack with a d4 damage die or a simple weapon, increase the damage die by one step (d4 to d6, d6 to d8, d8 to d10, d10 to d12).

Devotion Spells.name:
奉献法术
Devotion Spells
Devotion Spells.description:
你的神祇的力量赋予你特殊的神圣法术，称为奉献法术，这是一种聚能法术。施放一个聚能法术需要消耗1点聚能点，而你起始拥有一个包含1点聚能点的聚能池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的聚能池，并且你可以花费10分钟使用再聚能（行动）向你的神祇祈祷或为其事业服务，以恢复1点聚能点。

聚能法术会自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。某些专长可以让你获得更多聚能法术并增加你的聚能池的体型，不过你的聚能池最多永远不能容纳超过3点聚能点。你会根据你的事业获得一个奉献法术，并且你受训于神圣法术攻击检定与法术DC。你的施法关键能力是魅力。

Your deity's power grants you special divine spells called devotion spells, which are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to pray to your deity or do service toward their causes.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up. Certain feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points. You gain a devotion spell depending on your cause, and you are trained in divine spell attack rolls and spell DCs. Your spellcasting ability is Charisma.

Shield Block.name:
盾牌格挡
Shield Block
Shield Block.description:
触发 当你举起盾牌时，你将因一次攻击而承受物理伤害（钝击、穿刺或挥砍）。

你迅速将盾牌卡到位以抵挡一击。你的盾牌防止你承受至多等同于盾牌硬度的伤害。你与盾牌各自承受任何剩余的伤害，这可能会使盾牌破损或被摧毁。

Trigger While you have your shield raised, you would take physical damage (bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing) from an attack.

You snap your shield in place to ward off a blow. Your shield prevents you from taking an amount of damage up to the shield's Hardness. You and the shield each take any remaining damage, possibly breaking or destroying the shield.

Iomedae.name:
艾欧梅黛
Iomedae
Iomedae.description:
在她升格并继承了许多人类之神的信徒之前，艾奥梅黛是在对抗亡灵的战争中征战的圣战士。继承者坚守美德的价值观，对抗邪恶与不公。

教诲 节制，捍卫正义与荣誉，将英勇铭记于心

禁忌 抛弃需要帮助的同伴，使自己蒙羞，拒绝来自势均力敌者的挑战

关注领域 荣誉、正义、统治与英勇

Prior to her ascension and inheritance of many of the god of humanity's worshippers, Iomedae was a holy warrior in wars against the undead. The Inheritor upholds the values of virtue, fighting against the wicked and unjust.

Edicts be temperate, fight for justice and honor, hold valor in your heart

Anathema abandon a companion in need, dishonor yourself, refuse a challenge from an equal

Areas of Concern honor, justice, rulership, and valor

Retributive Strike.name:
惩戒反击
Retributive Strike
Retributive Strike.description:
触发 一名敌人对你的盟友造成伤害，且二者均在你15尺内

你保护你的盟友并打击你的敌人。盟友获得对触发伤害的所有伤害的抗力，其数值等于2 + 你的等级。若该敌人位于你的触及范围内，对其进行一次近战打击。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.DawVHfoPKbPJsz4k]{效果：冠军的抗力}

Trigger An enemy damages your ally, and both are within 15 feet of you

You protect your ally and strike your foe. The ally gains resistance to all damage against the triggering damage equal to 2 + your level. If the foe is within reach, make a melee Strike against it.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.DawVHfoPKbPJsz4k]{Effect: Champion's Resistance}

Paladin.name:
圣骑士
Paladin
Paladin.description:
你光明磊落、坦率正直，并致力于击退残酷的势力。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EAP98XaChJEbgKcK]{Retributive Strike} 冠军的反应动作（）以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zNN9212H2FGfM7VS]{Lay on Hands} 奉献法术。你的信条获得以下戒律与禁忌：

戒律 遵守法律，尊重合法的权威或领导

禁忌 占他人便宜，作弊

神圣惩击等级 9

你以惩罚性的光环包围邪恶的目标。若你用你的 Retributive Strike 命中，目标会受到等同于你魅力调整值的持续精神伤害。

崇举等级 11

当你使用 Retributive Strike 时，你周围15英尺内每个其近战触及内包含该目标的盟友，都可以花费一个反应动作（）以-5减值对目标进行打击。

You're honorable, forthright, and committed to pushing back the forces of cruelty. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EAP98XaChJEbgKcK]{Retributive Strike} champion's reaction and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zNN9212H2FGfM7VS]{Lay on Hands} devotion spell. Your code gains the follow edicts and anathema:

Edicts follow the law, respect legitimate authorities or leadership

Anathema take advantage of another, cheat

Divine SmiteLevel 9

You surround evil targets in a punishing halo. If you hit with your Retributive Strike, the target takes persistent spirit damage equal to your Charisma modifier.

ExaltLevel 11

When you use Retributive Strike, each ally within 15 feet of you with the target in their melee reach can spend a reaction to Strike the target with a -5 penalty.

The Tenets of Good.name:
善良信条
The Tenets of Good
The Tenets of Good.description:
你获得圣洁（特征），并将该特征添加到你进行的任何打击上。除了你的其他教义与禁忌外，你获得以下内容：

教义 不要明知故犯地伤害无辜者，若你直接介入可以拯救无辜者，则不得未能阻止对其造成的伤害

禁忌 犯下谋杀，实施酷刑

You gain the holy trait and add that trait to any Strikes you make. In addition to your other edicts and anathema, you gain the following:

Edicts do not knowingly harm innocents or fail to prevent harm to an innocent if your direct intervention could save them

Anathema commit murder, engage in torture

Nomad.name:
游牧者
Nomad
Nomad.description:
你曾四处旅行，掌握了在旅途中与未知土地上生存的基础战术，能够在补给稀少、舒适更少的情况下勉强度日。作为一名冒险者，你仍在旅行，经常前往更加危险的地方。

选择两个能力提升。其中一个必须为体质或感知，另一个为自由能力提升。

你受训于生存（技能）以及与一种你曾旅行过的地形相关的学识（技能）（例如沙漠学识或沼泽学识）。你获得以生存（技能）对应的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{确信}技能专长。

Traveling far and wide, you picked up basic tactics for surviving on the road and in unknown lands, getting by with few supplies and even fewer comforts. As an adventurer, you travel still, often into even more dangerous places.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Constitution or Wisdom, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Survival skill and a Lore skill related to one terrain you traveled in (such as Desert Lore or Swamp Lore). You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance} skill feat with Survival.

Adapted Cantrip.name:
改良戏法
Adapted Cantrip
Adapted Cantrip.description:
通过对多种魔法根源的研究，你已调整一个法术以适应你的施法风格。从一个不同于你自身的魔法根源中选择一个戏法。若你拥有法术表或法术书，则将你已知的一个戏法或你法术书中的一个戏法替换为所选法术。若你不使用法术书来准备法术（例如你是牧师或德鲁伊），则你的一个戏法必须始终为所选法术，而其余照常准备。你可以将该戏法作为你职业根源的法术来施放。若你之后交换或重训该戏法，你可以从同一替代根源或不同的替代根源中选择其替换项

Through study of multiple magical traditions, you've altered a spell to suit your spellcasting style. Choose one cantrip from a magical tradition other than your own. If you have a spell repertoire or a spellbook, replace one of the cantrips you know or have in your spellbook with the chosen spell. If you prepare spells without a spellbook (if you're a cleric or druid, for example), one of your cantrips must always be the chosen spell, and you prepare the rest normally. You can cast this cantrip as a spell of your class's tradition. If you swap or retrain this cantrip later, you can choose its replacement from the same alternate tradition or a different one

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name:
奥术自发法术
Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Detect Magic.name:
侦测魔法
Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用于感知魔法的存在。你不会获得除魔法存在与否之外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续的法术。你只有在该幻术魔法的效果阶位低于你的侦测魔法法术阶位时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（第3阶） 你得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的阶位或等级，由GM判定。

升阶（第4阶） 同第3阶，但你还会锁定最高阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官相同，你不会得知精确位置，但能将来源缩小至一个5尺立方体范围内（若来源大于该范围，则为最接近的5尺立方体）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Forbidding Ward.name:
禁制结界
Forbidding Ward
Forbidding Ward.description:
你保护一名盟友，使其免受目标敌人的攻击和敌对法术。目标盟友获得+1状态加值，适用于对抗目标敌人的攻击、法术与其他效果的护甲等级与豁免检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{法术效果：禁阻护卫}

升阶（6环） 该状态加值提升至+2。

You ward an ally against the attacks and hostile spells from the target enemy. The target ally gains a +1 status bonus to Armor Class and saving throws against the target enemy's attacks, spells, and other effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{Spell Effect: Forbidding Ward}

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +2.

Ray of Frost.name:
冰霜射线
Ray of Frost
Ray of Frost.description:
你发射一道冰寒射线。进行一次法术攻击掷骰。该射线造成 2d4 寒冷伤害。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害，并且其速度在 1 轮内受到 -10 尺状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{法术效果：冰霜射线}

成功 目标受到正常伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d4。

You blast an icy ray. Make a spell attack roll. The ray deals 2d4 cold damage.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{Spell Effect: Ray of Frost}

Success The target takes normal damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Dizzying Colors.name:
目眩色彩
Dizzying Colors
Dizzying Colors.description:
你释放出一股旋转的万千色彩，根据生物的意志豁免使其陷入不堪重负的状态。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续 1 轮。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，持续 1 轮，并目眩 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物震慑 1 轮并目盲 1 分钟。

You unleash a swirling multitude of colors that overwhelms creatures based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is stunned for 1 round and blinded for 1 minute.

Grim Tendrils.name:
阴森触须
Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
黑暗的触须从你的指尖卷出，在空中疾驰。你对线内的活体生物造成2d4虚空伤害以及@Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]]伤害。线内的每个活体生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物承受一半的虚空伤害且不承受持续流血伤害。

失败该生物承受全部伤害。

大成功或大失败 失败该生物承受双倍虚空伤害与双倍持续流血伤害。

强化（+1）虚空伤害增加2d4，持续流血伤害增加1。

Tendrils of darkness curl out from your fingertips and race through the air. You deal 2d4 void damage and @Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]] damage to living creatures in the line. Each living creature in the line must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half the void damage and no persistent bleed damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double void damage and double persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+1) The void damage increases by 2d4, and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1.

Force Barrage.name:
力场弹幕
Force Barrage
Force Barrage.description:
你向一个你能看见的生物发射一枚凝固的魔法碎片。它自动命中并造成1d4+1点力场伤害。你在施放法术时每额外使用1个动作，你发射的碎片数量增加1枚，最多在3个动作时发射3枚碎片。你可以为每枚碎片分别选择目标。如果你将多枚碎片射向同一个目标，在应用对伤害的加值或减值、抗性、弱点等之前，先将伤害合并。

强化（+2） 你在每次花费动作时额外发射1枚碎片。

You fire a shard of solidified magic toward a creature that you can see. It automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage. For each additional action you use when Casting the Spell, increase the number of shards you shoot by one, to a maximum of three shards for 3 actions. You choose the target for each shard individually. If you shoot more than one shard at the same target, combine the damage before applying bonuses or penalties to damage, resistances, weaknesses, and so forth.

Heightened (+2) You fire one additional shard with each action you spend.

Backpack.name:
背包
Backpack
Backpack.description:
背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳背包而不是将其背在背上，它的负载为轻而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Bedroll.name:
铺盖
Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Candle.name:
蜡烛
Candle
Candle.description:
一支点燃的蜡烛在10英尺半径内提供昏暗光照，持续8小时。

A lit candle sheds dim light in a 10‐foot radius for 8 hours.

Flint and Steel.name:
燧石与打火钢
Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
如果你有足够的时代来捕捉火花，燧石和打火钢在生火方面很有用，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常过于耗费时代而不太实用。即使在理想条件下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也需要至少使用3 动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time-consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Waterskin.name:
水袋
Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
装满时，一个水袋大约装有足够一名小型或中型生物饮用1天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Explorer's Clothing.name:
探索者服饰
Explorer's Clothing
Explorer's Clothing.description:
不穿护甲的冒险者会穿着耐用的衣物旅行。虽然它不是护甲，并且使用你的无甲防御熟练度，但它仍然有敏捷上限，并且如果刻有强效符文，则可以给予 AC 物品加值。

Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with potency runes.

Antidote (Lesser).name:
解毒剂（次级）
Antidote (Lesser)
Antidote (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

解毒剂保护你免受毒素侵害。饮用解毒剂后，你在6小时内对抗毒药的强韧豁免检定获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7z1iY4AaNEAIKuAU]{效果：解毒剂（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7z1iY4AaNEAIKuAU]{Effect: Antidote (Lesser)}

Elixir of Life (Minor).name:
生命灵药（次级）
Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命药剂会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用该药剂后，你恢复[[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 生命值}，并在10分钟内获得对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命药剂（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Minor)}

Crossbow.name:
弩
Crossbow
Crossbow.description:
这件远程武器在一个带握柄的框架上装有类似弓的结构，该框架称为弩臂。弩臂有一种机构用来将弓弦锁定在位，并连接到一个触发机构，该机构释放张力并发射一支弩矢。

This ranged weapon has a bow-like assembly mounted on a handled frame called a tiller. The tiller has a mechanism to lock the bowstring in place, attached to a trigger mechanism that releases the tension and launches a bolt.

Staff.name:
法杖
Staff
Staff.description:
这根长木棍可以帮助行走，并能造成强力一击。

This long piece of wood can aid in walking and deliver a mighty blow.

Bolts.name:
弩矢
Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但结构相似，是弩所使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Arcane Focus Spells.name:
奥术专注法术
Arcane Focus Spells

Ancestral Memories.name:
祖先记忆
Ancestral Memories
Ancestral Memories.description:
早已逝去的施法者的记忆赋予你某项特定技能的知识。选择任意非学识（技能）的技能，或一项与孕育你血脉的古代帝国相关的学识（技能）。你暂时在该技能上变为受训，并可能获得与一位在该技能上受训的祖先相关的其他记忆。如果你尝试一项持续时间超出此法术持续时间的任务或行动，使用较低的熟练度调整值。

升阶（6环） 你暂时在所选技能上成为专家。

The memories of long-dead spellcasters grant you knowledge in a specific skill. Choose any non-Lore skill, or a Lore skill related to the ancient empire from which your bloodline sprang. You temporarily become trained in that skill and might gain other memories associated with an ancestor who was trained in that skill. If you attempt a task or activity that lasts beyond this spell's duration, use the lower proficiency modifier.

Heightened (6th) You temporarily become an expert in the skill you choose.

Writing Set.name:
书写套装
Writing Set
Writing Set.description:
使用书写工具组，你可以起草通信并抄写卷轴。该工具组包含文具，包括多种纸张和羊皮纸，以及墨水、羽毛笔或蘸水笔、封蜡和一个简单的印章。如果你写了大量文字，你可以用额外的墨水和纸张补充你的工具组。

Using a writing set, you can draft correspondence and scribe scrolls. A set includes stationery, including a variety of paper and parchment, as well as ink, a quill or inkpen, sealing wax, and a simple seal. If you've written a large amount, you can refill your kit with extra ink and paper.

Skilled Heritage.name:
熟练传承
Skilled Heritage
Skilled Heritage.description:
你的机智让你能够训练于种类繁多的技能。你在自己选择的一项技能上成为受训。于第5等级，你在所选技能上成为专家。

Your ingenuity allows you to train in a wide variety of skills. You become trained in one skill of your choice. At 5th level, you become an expert in the chosen skill.

Assurance (Survival).name:
把握（生存）
Assurance (Survival)
Assurance (Survival).description:
即使在最糟糕的情况下，你也能执行基本任务。选择一项你受训的技能。你可以放弃为该技能进行技能检定的掷骰，改为获得10 + 你的熟练度加值的结果（不应用任何其他加值、减值或调整值）。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次选择时，选择一项不同的技能，并获得该技能的益处。

Even in the worst circumstances, you can perform basic tasks. Choose a skill you're trained in. You can forgo rolling a skill check for that skill to instead receive a result of 10 + your proficiency bonus (do not apply any other bonuses, penalties, or modifiers).

Special You can select this feat multiple times. Each time, choose a different skill and gain the benefits for that skill.

Acid Splash.name:
酸液飞溅
Acid Splash
Acid Splash.description:
你泼出一团酸液，溅射到你的目标及其附近的生物。进行一次法术攻击。若你命中，你造成 1d6 点酸蚀伤害外加 1 点溅射酸蚀伤害。在大成功时，目标还会受到 [[/r (ceil(@item.level/2))[persistent,acid]]] 伤害。

强化（3级） 初始伤害提升至 2d6，持续伤害提升至 2。

强化（5级） 初始伤害提升至 3d6，持续伤害提升至 3，溅射伤害提升至 2。

强化（7级） 初始伤害提升至 4d6，持续伤害提升至 4，溅射伤害提升至 3。

强化（9级） 初始伤害提升至 5d6，持续伤害提升至 5，溅射伤害提升至 4。

You splash a glob of acid that splatters your target and nearby creatures. Make a spell attack. If you hit, you deal 1d6 acid damage plus 1 splash acid damage. On a critical success, the target also takes [[/r (ceil(@item.level/2))[persistent,acid]]] damage.

Heightened (3rd) The initial damage increases to 2d6, and the persistent damage increases to 2.

Heightened (5th) The initial damage increases to 3d6, the persistent damage increases to 3, and the splash damage increases to 2.

Heightened (7th) The initial damage increases to 4d6, the persistent damage increases to 4, and the splash damage increases to 3.

Heightened (9th) The initial damage increases to 5d6, the persistent damage increases to 5, and the splash damage increases to 4.

Shield.name:
盾牌
Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一道魔法的力场护盾。这算作使用【举盾】动作，使你在你下个回合开始前获得+1环境加值至AC，但不需要空出一只手来使用。

当法术处于效果期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block}反应动作（）。该护盾具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作（）来降低来自任何法术或魔法效果的伤害，即使它不造成物理伤害也可以。在你使用Shield Block之后，该法术结束，并且你在10分钟内不能再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾免疫}

高度强化（+2） 护盾的硬度增加5。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Sorcerer.name:
术士
Sorcerer
Sorcerer.description:
你并非选择成为施法者——你生来就是。你的血脉中流淌着魔法：或许某位神祇曾触碰过你的祖先，某位先辈与原初生物交流过，或某个强大的秘法仪式影响了你的血统。自我反思与研习能让你精炼与生俱来的魔法技艺，并解锁全新、更强大的能力。然而，你血脉中的力量也伴随着风险，你不断面临抉择：你会崛起成为施法者大师，还是坠入毁灭。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.ixBx2wZpnf4qUoEv]{术士}

You didn't choose to become a spellcaster-you were born one. There's magic in your blood, whether a divinity touched one of your ancestors, a forebear communed with a primal creature, or a powerful occult ritual influenced your line. Self-reflection and study allow you to refine your inherent magical skills and unlock new, more powerful abilities. The power in your blood carries a risk, however, and you constantly face the choice of whether you'll rise to become a master spellcaster or fall into destruction.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.kzxu2dI7tFxv6Ix6.JournalEntryPage.ixBx2wZpnf4qUoEv]{Sorcerer}

Human.name:
人类
Human
Human.description:
如同格拉利昂的任何其他族群一样难以预测且多种多样，人类拥有非凡的驱动力，以及忍耐与扩张的能力。尽管在人类崛起为显赫势力之前，许多文明就已繁荣昌盛，但在人类历史进程中，人类建立了一些最伟大也最可怕的社会，而如今他们是内海周边诸国中人口最多的族群。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{人类}

As unpredictable and varied as any of Golarion's peoples, humans have exceptional drive and the capacity to endure and expand. Though many civilizations thrived before humanity rose to prominence, humans have built some of the greatest and the most terrible societies throughout the course of history, and today they are the most populous people in the realms around the Inner Sea.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.7pU8yM7yPMw92SY3]{Human}

Spell Repertoire (Sorcerer).name:
法术库（术士）
Spell Repertoire (Sorcerer)
Spell Repertoire (Sorcerer).description:
你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术曲目。在1级时，你学习两个你选择的1环法术和四个你选择的戏法，以及来自你血脉的一个额外法术和戏法。你从与你血脉相对应的根源的通用法术中选择这些，或从该根源中你拥有许可的其他法术中选择。你可以使用适当法术环位的法术位来施放你法术曲目中的任何法术。

随着你等级的提高，你会扩充这份法术曲目。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就将一个相同环位的法术加入你的法术曲目。在2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；在3级时，你选择两个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，你可能会选择你已拥有法术的更高环位版本，以便你能够施放该法术的升阶版本。

尽管你以相同的速度获得它们，你的法术位与法术曲目中的法术是分开的。如果某个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术曲目，它不会给你另一个法术位，反之亦然。

在你的法术曲目中替换法术

当你在法术曲目中获得新法术时，你可能想要替换掉一些你先前学会的法术。每当你获得一个等级并学习新法术时，你可以将你的一个旧法术换成一个相同环位的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法。你也可以在休整模式期间通过重训来替换法术。

The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice, as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your bloodline. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your bloodline, or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you select two 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might choose a higher-rank version of a spell you already have so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Sorcerer Spellcasting.name:
术士法术施放
Sorcerer Spellcasting
Sorcerer Spellcasting.description:
术士法术施展

你的血脉赋予你不可思议的魔法力量。你可以使用施法（行动）来施展法术，并且你在施展法术时可以提供材料、姿势与言语成分。由于你是一名术士，你通常可以用姿势成分替代材料成分，因此你不需要使用法术成分袋。

每天，你最多可以施展三个1环法术。你必须已知法术才能施展它们，而你通过法术库职业特性来学习它们。你每天可以施展的法术数量被称为你的法术位。

随着你作为术士的等级提升，你每日可施展的法术数量会增加，你能施展的最高环阶的法术也会提高。

你的一些法术需要你尝试一次法术攻击掷骰来判断其效果如何，或让你的敌人对抗你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键能力是魅力，你的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC使用你的魅力调整值。

升阶法术

当你获得2级及更高等级的法术位时，你可以用更强版本的低环法术来填充这些法术位。这会将该法术的环阶提升以匹配该法术位。你必须在你的法术库中拥有你想以该环阶施展的法术，才能将其升阶至该环阶。许多法术在被升阶至特定环阶时会获得特定的强化效果。标志法术职业特性使你可以自由地升阶某些法术。

戏法

戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，它不消耗法术位。你可以随意施展戏法，每天任意次数。戏法总是自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）——这通常等同于你作为术士所能施展的最高环阶的法术。例如，作为1级术士，你的戏法是1环法术；而作为5级术士，你的戏法是3环法术。

你的等级 戏法 1环 2环 3环 4环 5环 6环 7环 8环 9环 10环
1 5 3 - - - - - - - - -
2 5 4 - - - - - - - - -
3 5 4 3 - - - - - - - -
4 5 4 4 - - - - - - - -
5 5 4 4 3 - - - - - - -
6 5 4 4 4 - - - - - - -
7 5 4 4 4 3 - - - - - -
8 5 4 4 4 4 - - - - - -
9 5 4 4 4 4 3 - - - - -
10 5 4 4 4 4 4 - - - - -
11 5 4 4 4 4 4 3 - - - -
12 5 4 4 4 4 4 4 - - - -
13 5 4 4 4 4 4 4 3 - - -
14 5 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 - - -
15 5 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 3 - -
16 5 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 - -
17 5 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 3 -
18 5 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 -
19 5 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 1*
20 5 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 4 1*
* 血脉典范职业特性给予你一个10环法术位，其运作方式与其他法术位略有不同。

Sorcerer Spellcasting

Your bloodline provides you with incredible magical power. You can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity, and you can supply material, somatic, and verbal components when casting spells. Because you're a sorcerer, you can usually replace material components with somatic components, so you don't need to use a spell component pouch.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a sorcerer, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack roll to see how effective they are, or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key ability is Charisma, your spell attack rolls and spell DCs use your Charisma modifier.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd level and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they are heightened to certain ranks. The signature spells class feature lets you heighten certain spells freely.

Cantrips

A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up-this is usually equal to the highest rank of spell you can cast as a sorcerer. For example, as a 1st-level sorcerer, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level sorcerer, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.
